Fellow Conservative,

It’s former **Navy SEAL and current U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy** with a brief warning for you today: The Supreme Court is on the verge of allowing states to kick President Trump off their ballots.

The result of a **Supreme Court** verdict barring a former commander-in-chief from running for public office would be both horrific and historic. Never in the history of our Republic has one individual been more vilified than **Donald J. Trump.**

**My opponent wants Trump off the ballot** because he knows with President Trump at the top of the ticket, he’ll lose his seat in the Senate.

[**ADD YOUR NAME ->**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=b60f1405062f402eb9bdc5c64f1341c8&_e=NMHjjimBpIAIDiZ_cbv6rtYm42Wv5XqoppwTQbEF-vWcEjcAn2smxPJWmBQLKGt9I-wuQy6mMHRw5HLuZQhNuWI6yHYP8Kd1XoyiRsBSA1Ip20i-ctqeigtTqiDfe8v3q1Vi8fs7f4mVsimpnUQVenEKoTrkw_-CDwOeMeDzFHVXsUZA0I6oa4gIdng_I8bPPrbzfl5BHxeohZO9yF2S-Ag-t-esfut8dh8J30rGUfPmlH0CwWoqJepiMcICiagbp1yVdbQtkFQ5aIa6yxvKLt4keWZZzRuzQCf91bg9B5kCJClBoEREUbIA3PSHnu0CM4UwiKb8FzW1QxtvXhNVU-tc461Vl6W2e-NxrfsJL-l6Z0FeHwfsktH7bnqSfTaPcGS1e5n-ZYsxbtSy_BC7YXXVedC8JNHXx8pMWwXBipafuysetjXXNom1mCsfr3x4)
**National Democrats want President Trump off** the ballot because they know that if he’s given a fair shot at winning back the White House, he’ll have next to no trouble beating Joe Biden.

**As a Navy SEAL** , I have a knack for reading people, and I can tell you that having met President Trump, he is a patriot through and through.**Donald Trump LOVES America** , and we cannot let Democrats remove him from the ballot because they know they can’t beat him.

_**I’m working to gather at least 1 million signatures before Trump appears before the Supreme Court on Thursday, urging them to smack down the sham effort to remove Trump from your ballot in November.**_

| | Peter — I am thrilled to share with you two big pieces of news about our campaign for Congress. **First, we just received the endorsement of the Los Angeles Daily News!** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78599840/453880089/1183499175?refcode=2024-02-07-momentum&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=08d386ff-14c6-ee11-b660-002248223848&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDhkMzg2ZmYtMTRjNi1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=op-br_DHErnkhejOayJrzgQYxEzamrTaVAdG9H-VC7Y=) **"If voters want sensible, scandal-free and balanced representation, Nick Melvoin is an excellent choice. He has our endorsement."** The Daily News recognized what set our campaign apart from the rest of the field, highlighting our vision for Congress, one that is focused on working across divides to achieve results for CA-30, instead of the same old cookie-cutter slogans. This endorsement will help us spread our message even wider across the district, and I'm grateful for the support for our movement. **And if that wasn't exciting enough, not only did we meet our end-of-year fundraising goals — we outraised all of our opponents, thanks to supporters like you.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78599842/453880091/1183499175?refcode=2024-02-07-momentum&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=08d386ff-14c6-ee11-b660-002248223848&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDhkMzg2ZmYtMTRjNi1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=op-br_DHErnkhejOayJrzgQYxEzamrTaVAdG9H-VC7Y=) Our campaign to bring a new generation of leadership outraised our closest opponent by more than $130,000, further showcasing just how strong our grassroots movement truly is. These numbers don't just help us fund our get-out-the-vote efforts — they also show voters that we are running a viable race, and that this campaign _can_ (and will!) win. It is _clear_ that our campaign is heading into this final month with momentum on our side. But with a wide-open field and my opponents sitting on huge war chests, we cannot take anything for granted. [**That's why I'm asking you to give $3 today so we can keep our momentum up and win on March 5th.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78599844/453880093/1183499175?refcode=2024-02-07-momentum&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=08d386ff-14c6-ee11-b660-002248223848&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDhkMzg2ZmYtMTRjNi1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=op-br_DHErnkhejOayJrzgQYxEzamrTaVAdG9H-VC7Y=) Your support over the last year has lifted up our movement, and victory is in sight. clean_body: Two big pieces of news for our movement. | | | | Peter — I am thrilled to share with you two big pieces of news about our campaign for Congress. First, we just received the endorsement of the Los Angeles Daily News! = "If voters want sensible, scandal-free and balanced representation, Nick Melvoin is an excellent choice. He has our endorsement." The Daily News recognized what set our campaign apart from the rest of the field, highlighting our vision for Congress, one that is focused on working across divides to achieve results for CA-30, instead of the same old cookie-cutter slogans. This endorsement will help us spread our message even wider across the district, and I'm grateful for the support for our movement. And if that wasn't exciting enough, not only did we meet our end-of-year fundraising goals — we outraised all of our opponents, thanks to supporters like you. = Our campaign to bring a new generation of leadership outraised our closest opponent by more than $130,000, further showcasing just how strong our grassroots movement truly is. These numbers don't just help us fund our get-out-the-vote efforts — they also show voters that we are running a viable race, and that this campaign can (and will!) win. It is clear that our campaign is heading into this final month with momentum on our side. But with a wide-open field and my opponents sitting on huge war chests, we cannot take anything for granted. = Your support over the last year has lifted up our movement, and victory is in sight. These next four weeks will be the most critical time for our campaign — so whether you've given before or not, now is the time when your support will make the biggest impact. = Thankful for your support, Nick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289 |

subject: Coalinga Mayor James Horn Endorses John Duarte
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Duarte For Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/06bdf4a4ba25/john-duarte-launches-campaign-for-13th-congressional-district-9655545?e=76a47b375f)
---
| |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
February 7th, 2024
Contact: Duane Dichiara
Phone: (916) 997-4784
---
| **Mayor James Horn of Coalinga Endorses Congressman John Duarte**
---
| | **Modesto - **Today, John Duarte announced an endorsement from Coalinga Mayor James Horn. Mayor Horn, a respected community leader, has backed Congressman Duarte’s re-election campaign, highlighting John’s commitment to addressing the needs facing the city of Coalinga and the Central Valley.

“John has prioritized the Central Valley and the City of Coalinga,” said Mayor Horn. “He’s ready to help, listen, or work through our toughest challenges. I appreciate his dedication to fighting for our city, residents, and to protect the American Dream. I am proud to endorse his 2024 re-election campaign.”

Congressman Duarte expressed his gratitude after the endorsement, saying, “I am thankful to receive Mayor Horn’s endorsement for my campaign. Mayor Horn has demonstrated exceptional leadership in Coalinga, and his endorsement highlights our shared vision to lift up working families. I look forward to working closely with Mayor Horn and the city of Coalinga to ensure hardworking Californians have more opportunities to get ahead.”

As Congressman Duarte seeks re-election, endorsements from local leaders like Mayor James Horn are a testament to his commitment to Valley families. John continues to prioritize bipartisanship in Washington, putting results over politics when working to solve today’s toughest issues. For more information about John Duarte or the campaign, please visit [www.johnduarteforcongress.com](https://johnduarteforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d614871a572868b235b65477d&id=2cdba49b12&e=76a47b375f). ###

body:
Peter, Far too many people in every corner of our state are struggling to afford their lives due to the outrageously high cost of insulin, a life-saving drug used to treat diabetes. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78600642/453890829/1199800976?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTQ5MGFhZS0xN2M2LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EFJ-FN8BLJhKIrqfBdjY4gSOoKXgTay4P5GcKbhigXk=)
---
Peter,
Far too many people in every corner of our state are struggling to afford their lives due to the outrageously high cost of insulin, a life-saving drug used to treat diabetes.
We know this problem is not an illusion. The price of insulin went up by over 1,100% between 1990 and 2020. We also know some of the main reasons why: Drug markets are heavily concentrated. Pharmaceutical companies abuse and exploit drug patents. And an abject lack of price transparency pervades the entire industry.
In 2018, the Minnesota Attorney General’s Office intervened and sued three insulin manufacturers, alleging they deceptively priced their insulin products, requiring uninsured and underinsured Minnesotans to pay astronomically high out-of-pocket costs based on the list price of the drugs.
**Today, I’m proud to announce that our office has reached a landmark settlement resolving the litigation against insulin manufacturer Eli Lilly that guarantees all Minnesotans, with or without insurance, can buy Eli Lilly’s insulin products for $35 per month for the next five years – starting today.**
This settlement ensures that insulin will be accessible and affordable to every Minnesotan who needs it and is a huge victory for all of the advocates and activists who’ve fought for years, far too often through tragedy, for this outcome.
As the People’s Lawyer, I will always have your back and fight to hold Big Pharma accountable. But I can’t do it alone, which is why I wanted to remind you that Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset and increased on January 1.
[**Peter, that means you can make a $75 donation (or $150 for couples) right now and receive a FULL REFUND from the State. Will you take advantage of this opportunity so we can continue working together to help people afford their lives and live with dignity, safety, and respect?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78600645/453890832/1009342118?refcode=body&amount=75&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTQ5MGFhZS0xN2M2LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EFJ-FN8BLJhKIrqfBdjY4gSOoKXgTay4P5GcKbhigXk=)

clean_body: Peter, Far too many people in every corner of our state are struggling to afford their lives due to the outrageously high cost of insulin, a life-saving drug used to treat diabetes. | = Peter, Far too many people in every corner of our state are struggling to afford their lives due to the outrageously high cost of insulin, a life-saving drug used to treat diabetes. We know this problem is not an illusion. The price of insulin went up by over 1,100% between 1990 and 2020. We also know some of the main reasons why: Drug markets are heavily concentrated. Pharmaceutical companies abuse and exploit drug patents. And an abject lack of price transparency pervades the entire industry. In 2018, the Minnesota Attorney General’s Office intervened and sued three insulin manufacturers, alleging they deceptively priced their insulin products, requiring uninsured and underinsured Minnesotans to pay astronomically high out-of-pocket costs based on the list price of the drugs. Today, I’m proud to announce that our office has reached a landmark settlement resolving the litigation against insulin manufacturer Eli Lilly that guarantees all Minnesotans, with or without insurance, can buy Eli Lilly’s insulin products for $35 per month for the next five years – starting today. This settlement ensures that insulin will be accessible and affordable to every Minnesotan who needs it and is a huge victory for all of the advocates and activists who’ve fought for years, far too often through tragedy, for this outcome. As the People’s Lawyer, I will always have your back and fight to hold Big Pharma accountable. But I can’t do it alone, which is why I wanted to remind you that Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset and increased on January 1. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Keith Ellison Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset and increased on January 1! You can now use your 2023 PCR to contribute up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota. = = | Prepared and paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417 Keith Ellison for Attorney General PO Box 17224 Minneapolis, MN 55417 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . ************** ************ **

Folks — Lack of access to affordable childcare hurts families and hinders parents’ efforts to reenter the workforce. Kids and families deserve better. That’s why I’m proud to co-sponsor the _Child and Dependent Care Tax Credit Enhancement Act_ — which would permanently expand the Child Tax Credit, help families afford high-quality childcare, and set up kids for long-term success. **[Will you show your support for a brighter future for every child and family? __**FIRST:**__ Adam Frisch nearly defeated Lauren Boebert in 2022. He lost by just 546 votes – the closest race in the entire country.
__**THEN:**__ After outraising her again and again, Adam drove Lauren Boebert out of the district because she was so afraid of losing to him!
__**BUT NOW:**__ **Adam’s new potential Republican opponents include an election-denier who was at the Capitol on January 6th – and even Lauren Boebert’s current district director is rumored to run!**
Without Boebert to run against, this race just got a lot harder. But we cannot afford to lose – this is a must-win seat.

clean_body: There are huge updates in Adam Frisch’s campaign for Congress in Colorado. Hello, There are huge updates in Adam Frisch’s campaign for Congress in Colorado. FIRST: Adam Frisch nearly defeated Lauren Boebert in 2022. He lost by just 546 votes – the closest race in the entire country. THEN: After outraising her again and again, Adam drove Lauren Boebert out of the district because she was so afraid of losing to him! BUT NOW: Adam’s new potential Republican opponents include an election-denier who was at the Capitol on January 6th – and even Lauren Boebert’s current district director is rumored to run! Without Boebert to run against, this race just got a lot harder. But we cannot afford to lose – this is a must-win seat. We’ve set a goal of raising another $50,000 to ensure Adam can fight back against the Super PAC lies, but the only way we’ll win this critical seat is if grassroots donors like you give right now: = Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = This next stage of the campaign is going to be difficult, but we cannot afford to lose this seat – or let Lauren Boebert be replaced with another extremist. During an appearance on The Late Show with Stephen Colbert, MSNBC host Joy-Ann Reid highlighted Gloria and the Tennessee Three for taking a courageous stand to protest TN House Republicans’ treatment of families and survivors of the Covenant School shooting. As Joy-Ann said, those small acts of political courage are what can SAVE our democracy. **_[Gloria will never stop fighting until we are free of gun violence, until women have full autonomy over their bodies, and until working people are prioritized over corporate interests. Now, she needs you to donate to send her to Washington so she can get to work.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78600867/453896201/209297649?refcode=ea.1027292c-19c6-ee11-b660-002248223848&ms=ea.1027292c-19c6-ee11-b660-002248223848&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDI3MjkyYy0xOWM2LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0O0owKrRQyKpjQx87OoX-nD0eLPFhZIrIJQUPaCzC2g=)_** The Tennessee Three’s protest wasn’t the first time Gloria had chosen courage when facing opposition from the far right. When GOP House Speaker Cameron Sexton tried to exact political retribution by moving Gloria’s legislative office to an old closet, she refused to back down and kept speaking out. When Republicans BANNED abortion in TN after the fall of _Roe v. Wade_ , Gloria told her own story of lifesaving abortion care. | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care.

For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors.

Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights.

clean_body: She’s one of the courageous leaders who can save our democracy. | = Peter — from Nashville to NYC, EVERYONE is taking notice of Gloria Johnson! During an appearance on The Late Show with Stephen Colbert, MSNBC host Joy-Ann Reid highlighted Gloria and the Tennessee Three for taking a courageous stand to protest TN House Republicans’ treatment of families and survivors of the Covenant School shooting. As Joy-Ann said, those small acts of political courage are what can SAVE our democracy. = The Tennessee Three’s protest wasn’t the first time Gloria had chosen courage when facing opposition from the far right. When GOP House Speaker Cameron Sexton tried to exact political retribution by moving Gloria’s legislative office to an old closet, she refused to back down and kept speaking out. When Republicans BANNED abortion in TN after the fall of Roe v. Wade , Gloria told her own story of lifesaving abortion care. Gloria loves Tennessee enough to stand tall no matter who stands against her. Gloria won’t be silenced by anyone — and she’s the courageous leader we need fighting for us in the Senate. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you! Team Gloria | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Send donations via check to: Gloria for Tennessee 73 White Bridge Rd #103-353 Nashville, TN 37205

body:
Join Us in Our Home (FREE). | | | |
---
| | |
# How We Can Make A Difference for Life, Liberty and Property, Here and Now.
---
|
---
|
---
| Friend,
Life, liberty and property are under attack, but under similar threats we read in the Bible that "[Elisha] answered, “Fear not, for they that are with us are more than they that are with them.” (2 Kings 6:16)

We the People, when we stand on unalienable natural law principles, must stand boldly and need not fear. And we can make a difference. There are several things you can do now, and one urgent help request for my campaign:
---
| [Crucial: Contribute $100 Now>>](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=eb12f76bf1&e=5bb5efcda7 "Crucial: Contribute $100 Now>>")
---
| **Life:**
Join Valerie and me at our home this month for training from experts on what you can do to fight the direct attack on parental rights in the Reproductive Freedom Amendment. _See info below and[get your free tickets now](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=5ae3697ea6&e=5bb5efcda7)_. Also - see below for the hearing TOMORROW on Assisted Suicide.

**Liberty:**
This week I was fighting in court for those fired from their jobs because of their religious or disability exemptions from the "V~" mandates. _As your Member of Congress I will introduce legislation restoring all lost pay and jobs_ of those wrongly terminated, and will include criminal charges to stop future tyranny.

**Property: **
Governor Moore today said he was committed to not raising taxes, for which I applaud and support. But he must not have meant property taxes. _That's because property taxes are universally being raised across the state by an average of over 25-35% with some increases at 50%!_

You may appeal your outrageous and, in my view, unconstitutional, taking of your property with these extreme assessment increases online here: [https://assessmentappeals.dat.maryland.gov/start.aspx](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=d45ef4e83f&e=5bb5efcda7) . As your Member of Congress I will submit legislation rolling back outrageous property taxation. To the naysayers - this is not a state-only issue; the U.S. Constitution prohibits takings of private property by excessive taxation by any government.

**URGENT HELP REQUEST** : the RINO establishment doesn't want an America First, President Trump endorsing candidate in this race like me; but our beloved country cannot survive unless we fight and win. And all I need is for your support in whatever amount tonight. Join our LIBERTY FOREVER Circle for [$100 tonight](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=009bebebe9&e=5bb5efcda7).
Thank you.

Freedom and victory,

Candidate for Congress (R-MD-6)

| [Crucial: Contribute $100 Now>>](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=e0ee6b85fb&e=5bb5efcda7 "Crucial: Contribute $100 Now>>")

All LIFE matters - our special needs son is a treasure and example of why there is a sense of urgency to stand for life. When we were first expecting him, we were told by our doctor that abortion was an option if desired, to which we objected and changed doctors. Our son was born during Down Syndrome week and he is a JOY to our family and so many. Join us (FREE) in our home this month - see below:

name: Team Chris Murphy
subject: The primary is 27 days away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | Read on to learn why Senator Chris Murphy is supporting Dr. Brian Williams:
The Texas primary is 27 days away, so we’re reaching out to ask you to support Dr. Brian Williams’ campaign for Congress in TX-32.

Brian is an Air Force veteran, trauma surgeon, and a member of the team Murphy family. Just like so many in our movement, the issue of gun violence found him. In 2016, he rose to national attention when he led the team that operated on Dallas police officers who were shot during a peaceful protest against police brutality.

Three died on his watch when they were there trying to protect young people exercising their rights. And it is Brian’s voice, as a Black trauma surgeon, that broke through as a community grieved and tried to make sense of what happened.

In 2022, Chris hired him to join our fight to pass the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act. He worked tirelessly to help us break the gun lobby’s 30-year grip on Congress, and now he’s taking on his next mission — running for the open seat in TX-32.

[**Please split a donation between Dr. Brian Williams’ campaign and our reelection today to help us grow our gun safety movement’s power in Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78601031/453902527/2073531359?refcode=em24_240207_FRTDBW_fndt_gq_act___TCM_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240207_FRTDBW_fndt_gq_act___TCM_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=&refcode2=84218749-1bc6-ee11-b660-002248223848&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODQyMTg3NDktMWJjNi1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GOxqmB-TnH9D29qhVBPWsoDjwigEx2owa6whQ6YbJEU=) Brian will bring an important perspective and voice to Congress.

He knows what it is like to have to tell a parent their child won’t survive. He also understands what it’s like to operate on an expecting mother experiencing a deadly pregnancy complication.

He brings a powerful frontline experience, and he will help our movement build power in Washington to end gun violence, restore abortion rights, and deliver real progress for working families.

But he’s going to face his first test at the ballot box in just 27 days. This is an important test of our movement’s strength, so we need to do all we can to make sure he has the resources to win.

[**If you can, please split a contribution between Dr. Brian Williams and Chris Murphy today. He urgently needs our support in the home stretch, and it would mean a lot to Chris and Brian to know you have their backs.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78601043/453902539/2073531359?refcode=em24_240207_FRTDBW_fndt_gq_act___TCM_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240207_FRTDBW_fndt_gq_act___TCM_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=&refcode2=84218749-1bc6-ee11-b660-002248223848&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODQyMTg3NDktMWJjNi1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GOxqmB-TnH9D29qhVBPWsoDjwigEx2owa6whQ6YbJEU=)

clean_body: | | Read on to learn why Senator Chris Murphy is supporting Dr. Brian Williams: The Texas primary is 27 days away, so we’re reaching out to ask you to support Dr. Brian Williams’ campaign for Congress in TX-32. Brian is an Air Force veteran, trauma surgeon, and a member of the team Murphy family. Just like so many in our movement, the issue of gun violence found him. In 2016, he rose to national attention when he led the team that operated on Dallas police officers who were shot during a peaceful protest against police brutality. Three died on his watch when they were there trying to protect young people exercising their rights. And it is Brian’s voice, as a Black trauma surgeon, that broke through as a community grieved and tried to make sense of what happened. In 2022, Chris hired him to join our fight to pass the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act. He worked tirelessly to help us break the gun lobby’s 30-year grip on Congress, and now he’s taking on his next mission — running for the open seat in TX-32. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Brian will bring an important perspective and voice to Congress. He knows what it is like to have to tell a parent their child won’t survive. He also understands what it’s like to operate on an expecting mother experiencing a deadly pregnancy complication. He brings a powerful frontline experience, and he will help our movement build power in Washington to end gun violence, restore abortion rights, and deliver real progress for working families. But he’s going to face his first test at the ballot box in just 27 days. This is an important test of our movement’s strength, so we need to do all we can to make sure he has the resources to win. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being part of our movement. \- Team Murphy = = | | Click to unsubscribe from our email list. name: Zach Shrewsbury
subject: The most anti-immigrant bill in the U.S. history
body:
It didn't go far enough to get the Senate Republicans' support

| | | [ ](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQWU8ExRgcFXGbzhgjTyC-Z6OxNTx_Cq_fX-zZvmV9rTg&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=020724_immigration&n=1)
---
Dear Friend, I grew up with the idea that our country is open to all who seek refuge from wars, hunger, and violence. I grew up believing that we are a generous nation welcoming immigrants who make our country uniquely dynamic, diverse, and culturally and spiritually rich. This week, the political leadership of both major parties wanted to undo the good part of what makes America America. A bipartisan group of Senators, including Mitch McConnell and Chuck Schumer, came up with a “border bill” that gave the President the authority to shut down the border and keep it shut down. It also massively increased funding for immigration detention and border militarization and GUTTED the right to seek asylum in the United States. **According to Amnesty International, these constituted the most anti-immigrant changes to U.S. law in a century.** The $118.3 billion so-called “border bill” also included $60.1 billion in military aid to Ukraine, $14.1 billion for Israel, $10 billion in humanitarian assistance to Gaza, the West Bank, and Ukraine, and $20.2 billion for border security. **The Biden administration hoped to buy Republican support for the primarily foreign military spending provisions by including the draconian anti-immigrant border provisions.** **We need a humane immigration policy AND a peaceful non-military solution to foreign policy disputes.[If you are ready to support pro-peace, pro-immigrant, working-class-forward policies, donate toour campaign and help us on our journey to Washington.](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQWU8ExRgcFXGbzhgjTyC-Z6OxNTx_Cq_fX-zZvmV9rTg&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=020724_immigration&n=2)**
---
| [](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQWU8ExRgcFXGbzhgjTyC-Z6OxNTx_Cq_fX-zZvmV9rTg&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=020724_immigration&n=3 "DONATE NOW") [DONATE NOW](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQWU8ExRgcFXGbzhgjTyC-Z6OxNTx_Cq_fX-zZvmV9rTg&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=020724_immigration&n=3)
---
Encouraged by Donald Trump, Republicans in the Senate voted down the border bill, claiming it was not anti-immigrant enough. **The bill’s restriction on the right of people fleeing persecution at home to seek asylum in another country is a violation of international and U.S. law.** Those fleeing violence, poverty, and the impact of climate change also have humanitarian claims that the bill ignores. U.S.-supported wars and trade agreements favoring huge corporate conglomerates are in large part responsible for these refugees. **That Biden and many Senate Democrats were willing to support the severe restriction on asylum rights to gain support for more war in Ukraine and Gaza is unconscionable.** Now, the Senate Democrats want a vote on the standalone military aid provisions, which are disastrous in and of themselves. We have already provided over 40 billion dollars in military aid to Ukraine since the Russian invasion, and it has led to a stalemate. Will another 60 billion dollars ensure a Ukrainian victory, or will it merely lead to requests for more with no end in sight? The only victor here is the military-industrial complex. **The $14.1 billion in military aid to Israel will contribute to the ongoing genocide of the Palestinian people by Israel. International law refers to genocide as the “crime of crimes.”** The International Court of Justice (ICJ) has already ordered Israel, and by implication, the U.S., to cease actions that violate international law in this regard. Additional military aid to Israel is a moral disgrace. Biden and the Democrats shouldn’t participate in this contest with Republicans to see who can be more repressive and racist towards immigrants to get their approval for more military aid to corrupt and genocidal regimes. **[We are three months away from the primary in this open-seat election and need your help. Can you contribute $10, $25, or whatever you can to propel our campaign to victory in November?](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQWU8ExRgcFXGbzhgjTyC-Z6OxNTx_Cq_fX-zZvmV9rTg&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=020724_immigration&n=4)** Thank you, Zach Shrewsbury (D-WV) Candidate for U.S. Senate
---
| [ ](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQWU8ExRgcFXGbzhgjTyC-Z6OxNTx_Cq_fX-zZvmV9rTg&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=020724_immigration&n=5)
---
| Zach Shrewsbury (D-WV) is running for the U.S. Senate seat as the only electable Democrat in the race. A native West Virginian, a Marine Corps veteran, and a grandson of a coal miner, Zach has a passion for making a difference in his community. He has seen firsthand the struggles faced by working families who are just trying to get by. Zach's military service experiences and his work as a community and climate justice organizer shaped his commitment to fighting for social and economic justice, and he's dedicated his career to making a difference in people's lives. [**For Democrats to keep the Senate, Zach has to win. Support the campaign today.**](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQWU8ExRgcFXGbzhgjTyC-Z6OxNTx_Cq_fX-zZvmV9rTg&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=020724_immigration&n=6)
---

Will another 60 billion dollars ensure a Ukrainian victory, or will it merely lead to requests for more with no end in sight? The only victor here is the military-industrial complex. The $14.1 billion in military aid to Israel will contribute to the ongoing genocide of the Palestinian people by Israel. International law refers to genocide as the “crime of crimes.” The International Court of Justice (ICJ) has already ordered Israel, and by implication, the U.S., to cease actions that violate international law in this regard. Additional military aid to Israel is a moral disgrace. Biden and the Democrats shouldn’t participate in this contest with Republicans to see who can be more repressive and racist towards immigrants to get their approval for more military aid to corrupt and genocidal regimes. Thank you, Zach Shrewsbury (D-WV) Candidate for U.S. Senate | | Zach Shrewsbury (D-WV) is running for the U.S. Senate seat as the only electable Democrat in the race. A native West Virginian, a Marine Corps veteran, and a grandson of a coal miner, Zach has a passion for making a difference in his community. He has seen firsthand the struggles faced by working families who are just trying to get by. Zach's military service experiences and his work as a community and climate justice organizer shaped his commitment to fighting for social and economic justice, and he's dedicated his career to making a difference in people's lives. | "DONATE MONTHLY" | | | ---|---|--- Shrewsbury for Senate · PO Box 82, Fayetteville, WV 25840, United States

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Reflecting on Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
Each year, Black History Month serves as an important time to reflect on, uplift, and learn from the stories of Black Americans.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78601248/453906527/-725726589?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2U2NjMyYWItMWNjNi1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hHnJWOgk3YQnFSDrRJwaxFxwr9rZf_ktsExp-IV9ni8=&emci=3a6632ab-1cc6-ee11-b660-002248223848&emdi=3e6632ab-1cc6-ee11-b660-002248223848&ceid=8470899)
---
| Peter,

Each year, Black History Month serves as an important time to reflect on, uplift, and learn from the stories of Black Americans. One Virginia story that always stands out to me is the story of Mildred and Richard Loving.

Mildred and Richard Loving, a couple from Caroline County, Virginia, were longtime friends who fell in love. Mildred, a Black woman, and Richard, a white man, lived in Virginia under harsh, strict Jim Crow laws that prohibited interracial marriage.

The couple traveled to nearby Washington, D.C. to get married, but on their return to Virginia, they were arrested and sentenced to jail time. They fled Virginia to evade prosecution and further sentencing. However, in a true act of bravery, the couple challenged Virginia’s law, making it all the way to the Supreme Court. In _Loving v. Virginia_ , the Supreme Court unanimously decided in favor of the Lovings and overturned such laws that banned interracial marriage nationwide.

Black History Month is a time to uplift and celebrate stories like the Lovings’ and also remember the stories of those who came before them.

Sincerely,
Abigail
---

| | Our campaign's momentum is relentless, Peter.

Not only are major endorsements rolling in, but we just dropped our latest digital ad!

Our country is already $34 trillion in debt. So what did the career politicians in Washington do last summer? They struck a "deal" to SUSPEND the debt ceiling and spend even more on our credit card.

**Here's the message in our new ad: I was the ONLY Republican in this race to call out that "deal" as BS!**

---
| [WATCH THE AD](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=b5650af63d&e=86e91e802d "WATCH THE AD")
---
| That deal didn't balance the budget, didn't cut spending, and saddled up future generations with even more debt.

So naturally the usual career politicians applauded it, _**INCLUDING MY REPUBLICAN OPPONENT!**_

**Look: we don't need _any_ Republican to represent us in Washington. _We need the right kind of Republican. _**

Someone who grasps how urgent of a crisis our nation is in ... who won't be complacent ... who won't be afraid to fight Washington's business-as-usual and put an end to the status quo.

**That's why I'm running for Congress.** I don't have time to be complacent. Do you?

[**Watch our new ad here ... and then PLEASE make a donation to help keep our paid advertising going!**](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=0ace38bba4&e=86e91e802d)

clean_body: asap | Fellow Patriot, I don’t know where else to turn, so I’m reaching out to you in a pinch. Democrats are waging war against me. As a U.S. Army veteran, I know what it’s like to go up against a dangerous enemy. I used to fight foreign threats, like radical Islamic terrorists. Now, I fight to protect our country here at home. What’s perhaps most alarming: there is growing support for radical Islamic terrorists in Congress from the Radical Left. My top priority: stopping them from destroying our country from within. But I am under heavy fire for supporting Israel and speaking out against the radical Democrats. | Please, don’t leave me exposed. Thank you, SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.) | | | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS Hon. Brian Mast is a retired member of the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. | Mast for Congress · PO Box 3016 · Stuart, FL 34995 · USA

Voter contact looks different in different parts of the state. And our organizers need different tools and resources to make sure voters are registered and have all the information they need to cast their ballot on Election Day.
On college campuses, we have to engage young folks who are worried about their climate and financial futures. Voting on college campuses can be confusing, so making sure students know exactly where and when to cast their vote is crucial to making sure they have a seat at the table.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78601926/453915071/-427486611?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20240207_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWExM2M3MzMtMWZjNi1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6o54Th5PbRaPww5VzsqKZOPjNlZdnSqLjWtQl10Gpq0=)
In Yuma, our team engages with the community at events like the recent Tamale Festival in Somerton, registering first-time voters and making sure folks’ information is up to date.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78601927/453915072/-427486611?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20240207_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWExM2M3MzMtMWZjNi1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6o54Th5PbRaPww5VzsqKZOPjNlZdnSqLjWtQl10Gpq0=)
In places like Tuba City, organizers engage rural communities and register voters through high traffic canvasses, setting up at highly traveled intersections and junctions to meet voters directly where they’re at.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78601928/453915073/-427486611?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20240207_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWExM2M3MzMtMWZjNi1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6o54Th5PbRaPww5VzsqKZOPjNlZdnSqLjWtQl10Gpq0=)
[**And if everyone reading this far pitched in just $4, we’d be able to connect with even more voters in Maricopa county? So what do you say**********,** can I personally count on your contribution today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78601929/453915074/-427486611?amount=4&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20240207_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWExM2M3MzMtMWZjNi1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6o54Th5PbRaPww5VzsqKZOPjNlZdnSqLjWtQl10Gpq0=)

name: Sen. Rick Scott
subject: It’s been a year since I challenged Mitch McConnell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
I don’t regret it.| | | Just about a year ago, I challenged Mitch McConnell for Senate Republican leader.

People thought I was too brazen; some even thought my political career would end. Well, I’m still here, aren’t I?

You see, we work for you, not special interest groups in Washington. I watched as Mitch gave up on our conservative values to please Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and his Establishment friends in DC.

I don't regret it one bit. It's time Washington CHANGED, Peter.

---
Peter,

Gabe Vasquez _pretends_ to care about the crisis on our southern border and wants us to _believe_ he’s trying to fix it...

But his efforts are about as pathetic as they come.

His so-called “immigration reform” proposals have NOTHING to do with securing our border and stopping the invasion, which is getting worse every day. They’re _actually_ about rewarding **amnesty** to those who have broken our laws.

_(Credit: Steven Hirsch, New York Post)_
Last month, Gabe Vasquez **voted AGAINST** a House resolution condemning Biden’s open-border policies and calling on him to secure the border.

And just yesterday, he **voted AGAINST** impeaching Sec. of Homeland Security Alejandro Mayorkas for allowing this border invasion to continue. His blatant dereliction of duty has put every American family at risk.

**Gabe Vasquez’s stance on our border is clear – he fully endorses millions of illegal aliens from all over the world invading our nation.**

There’s no talking his way out of this one, and we need to do everything we can to defeat Gabe Vasquez and hold him, Biden, and Mayorkas accountable for betraying our nation. It is far past time to protect our nation’s sovereignty and PUT THE AMERICAN PEOPLE FIRST!

For America,

Yvette Herrell

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: My work here isn’t done
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Folks — Before coming to Congress, I spent my entire career as a labor activist, fighting to get hardworking people the pay and safe working conditions they deserve. I fought alongside firefighters, first responders, meatpackers, and grocery store workers to ensure they had the power to collectively bargain for better wages and benefits. That’s why standing with and advocating for workers is among my top priorities in Congress. Since being elected in 2022, thanks to the support of the grassroots movement I've: ✅ Introduced the _LEAP Act_ — bipartisan legislation to help fill the job skills gap by providing tax credits to small businesses that hire apprenticeship employees. This bill will prepare folks for careers in growing industries and support local businesses by addressing the need for more qualified workers and easing the costs of training job seekers. ✅ Worked alongside Illinois Governor Pritzker to secure an investigation of U.S. Steel by the Illinois Department of Labor after they laid off hundreds of Granite City plant workers without notice or recourse. ✅ Introduced the _Tools Tax Deduction Act_ — bipartisan legislation to allow apprenticeship employees and construction workers to write off the expense of the tools and equipment required for their profession. **[Although we’ve made great progress, I know that my work here isn’t done. Will you stand with me in this fight by chipping in today to power my efforts to continue advocating for the hardworking families in IL-13 and across the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78602437/453918616/-1193245975?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240207_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmRhYTNhZS0yMWM2LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aFaeAz0maKk38PSX9lvWRw-qsLuRAKLuzJ_sU2F7D_s=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ ****[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78602438/453918617/2093963021?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240207_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmRhYTNhZS0yMWM2LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aFaeAz0maKk38PSX9lvWRw-qsLuRAKLuzJ_sU2F7D_s=) ** ** | | ****[CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78602439/453918618/640857628?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240207_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmRhYTNhZS0yMWM2LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aFaeAz0maKk38PSX9lvWRw-qsLuRAKLuzJ_sU2F7D_s=)****

clean_body: | Folks — Before coming to Congress, I spent my entire career as a labor activist, fighting to get hardworking people the pay and safe working conditions they deserve. I fought alongside firefighters, first responders, meatpackers, and grocery store workers to ensure they had the power to collectively bargain for better wages and benefits. That’s why standing with and advocating for workers is among my top priorities in Congress. Since being elected in 2022, thanks to the support of the grassroots movement I've: ✅ Introduced the LEAP Act — bipartisan legislation to help fill the job skills gap by providing tax credits to small businesses that hire apprenticeship employees. This bill will prepare folks for careers in growing industries and support local businesses by addressing the need for more qualified workers and easing the costs of training job seekers. ✅ Worked alongside Illinois Governor Pritzker to secure an investigation of U.S. Steel by the Illinois Department of Labor after they laid off hundreds of Granite City plant workers without notice or recourse. ✅ Introduced the Tools Tax Deduction Act — bipartisan legislation to allow apprenticeship employees and construction workers to write off the expense of the tools and equipment required for their profession. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **= | | = ** **= | = ** **= | = ** **= Workers are the backbone of our economy. I will never stop fighting in Congress until working-class people across our country have the protections they deserve. Thanks for standing with me in this fight. — Nikki ** ** ** **= Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com | Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

name: Team AOC
subject: AIPAC just reported raising $35 million.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
This is urgent.
#
Firstname, we know that one of the wealthiest conservative PACs in DC — the American Israel Public Affairs Committee — is targeting AOC this election cycle because she’s been critical of the Israeli government’s indiscriminate bombardment of Palestinians.
But we need you to see this headline:
A super PAC created by AIPAC has raised **$35 million in the last six months**. They’re getting huge checks from Republican mega-donors. Just one hedge-fund manager gave $500,000.1
Last cycle, **AIPAC spent nearly $30 million to back 109 Republicans who supported the insurrection**. This cycle, both AIPAC and the United Democracy Project are planning to spend even more to target Alexandria and the Squad.
We need to be prepared for their attack ads and heavy spending against us as the election cycle gears up.
[Will you contribute $5 today to ensure our campaign has the resources to fight back against AIPAC’s massive spending against our progressive movement?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240207-1.84URzN&refcode=em20240207-5780-P_FND_EGR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5780%2E2526796%2EU_rn-W)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240207-1.84URzN&refcode=em20240207-5780-P_FND_EGR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5780%2E2526796%2EU_rn-W)**
When a right-wing group attacks Alexandria and our entire progressive movement, it’s imperative that we have the resources to fight back.
And while AIPAC is funneling big money from Republican mega-donors into Democratic primaries to challenge progressives, AOC relies solely on our grassroots movement to have her back.
[Will you contribute $5 right now to help us defeat AIPAC? AIPAC is going after Alexandria this election year and we need to be prepared.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240207-1.84URzN&refcode=em20240207-5780-P_FND_EGR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=5780%2E2526796%2EU_rn-W)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240207-1.84URzN&refcode=em20240207-5780-P_FND_EGR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=5780%2E2526796%2EU_rn-W)**
In solidarity,
Team AOC
1 - [**HuffPost** : Key Pro-Israel Group Reports Record Fundraising As It Targets The ‘Squad’](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/22277?t=23&akid=5780%2E2526796%2EU_rn-W)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20240207-1?refcode=em20240207-5780-P_FND_EGR_MIS&t=24&refcode2=5780_2526796_U_rn-W&akid=5780%2E2526796%2EU_rn-W)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20240207-5780-P_FND_EGR_MIS&t=25&akid=5780%2E2526796%2EU_rn-W)**

body:

name: Your Response Pending:
subject: FWD: Are you with us, friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
Trump is a growing threat to our country
| | |
---

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Why is Adam Schiff boosting a Republican? 🤔
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Californians deserve a real, honest race to decide who will represent them in Washington.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=37392%2E3422442%2ELcz-Bc)
Have you seen this headline, Derek?
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240207-2?refcode=em20240207-37392&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37392_3422442_Lcz-Bc&akid=37392%2E3422442%2ELcz-Bc)
Because of California’s “jungle primary” system, the top two vote getters, regardless of party, will advance to the General Election in November.
That's why Adam Schiff is paying for ads that boost our Republican opponent. He knows he has a better chance of winning against Republican Steve Garvey than he does against Katie Porter in the General Election.
We’ve seen this show before: Boosting another candidate is a trick politicians use to get an opponent they have the best chance of defeating.
**Derek, so much is on the line on March 5th.** We don’t want to wake up the next morning wondering if there was anything else we could have done to keep Katie in Congress.
**[Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can afford today to help us run our own ads to reach the voters who will decide the outcome of this election?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240207-2?refcode=em20240207-37392&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37392_3422442_Lcz-Bc&akid=37392%2E3422442%2ELcz-Bc)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240207-2?refcode=em20240207-37392&refcode2=37392_3422442_Lcz-Bc&akid=37392%2E3422442%2ELcz-Bc)
Many thanks,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20240207-37392&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=37392_3422442_Lcz-Bc&akid=37392%2E3422442%2ELcz-Bc)**
---

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=37392%2E3422442%2ELcz-Bc)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brady=20Batt=2C=20WAGOP?=
subject: WAGOP State Convention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
All Republicans can join us in Spokane from April 18 - 20 for a fun, engaging, and informative week as we build unity for the 2024 elections.

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

============================================================

Copyright © 2024 Washington State Republican Party, All rights reserved.
Your interest in the Washington State Republican Party, National Republican Committee or Washington state Republican Candidates

Our mailing address is:
Washington State Republican Party
11811 NE 1st St Suite 306
Bellevue, WA 98005
USA

You can ** update your preferences (https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/profile?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4f90cbb438&e=6a281f566d&c=9e604c480d)
or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4f90cbb438&t=b&e=6a281f566d&c=9e604c480d)
.

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Team D'Esposito
subject: Migrants Assault NYPD
body:
Peter,

As a retired NYPD detective with a commendable record of over 600 arrests, Congressman Anthony D'Esposito is deeply committed to the safety and security of our community.

The recent attack on NYPD officers by illegal migrants near Times Square is a distressing reminder of the risks faced by our law enforcement officers, exacerbated by inadequate policies at both the federal and state levels.

In response to this incident, and in line with his extensive law enforcement experience, Congressman D'Esposito has been clear:

"Joe Biden's disastrous border policies let these criminals into our country, Kathy Hochul’s anti law and order agenda has emboldened criminals and Alvin Bragg’s failure to enforce the law has released them back into the streets. These perpetrators should be deported forthwith." body:
Could you complete this in the next 30 minutes for us?
Fellow American,

**Two things:**

name: Hillsdale College via American Briefing
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4jjqqj53ihp7a2kb8u2a9vnpv6nmp1aeru9se88_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpge1oj6c9h2bs) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zb7h28dkvvmsv0dk53hvgk2verfa4c6ok3d0r4o8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpge1oj6c9h2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9t3kvat3qfers40qe0j4m4g2n96q27apfjp6hko_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpge1oj6c9h2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| American Briefing
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zc01q9emhke91n8n8q6rb0kf2h09dm7q7dcdm370_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpge1oj6c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jm8p79d9j6iprect66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni64pj0s1ge8oh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlklkpukumos3khvtilmbb4llfupsi718744muc0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpge1oj6c9h2bs)_

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zafbgv4ogocn6n7s95nueveddkq97fre48bjmlrg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr0ctj61o72cph649fg)

name: Hillsdale College via Trump News HQ
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zli5p6no9qkk859hri0u2mp84l0803mm44116ng8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpge1oj2chh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkdkaj8i4o54jimf7e8pppa6mmsi4ujr2nfgrv6g_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpge1oj2chh2bs) That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb0vsk0qhtpllm9sfbvgm2ok7qu5d6gl7lb45np0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpge1oj2chh2bs)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zskf85an705opj20n4hcbo5v4d13n6d4i4lnqa50_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpie0o31cjh2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfsetloqh7a8i5g480g7iaj7lur0akip28cu5p8g_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpie0o31cjh2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh73t6nfvka7faps59hjokdfajk0cbv6plr64jq0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpie0o31cjh2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkvm0pr68osvarhvn1aeuq197jj3mp66hb98tqng_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpie0o31cjh2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

GOP Presidential
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zugjmt5m1d2gof2t5cfh3ms6a2o6hp1p1munkdg0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpie0o35cth2bs) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsaunn5pfq8drvgrnicnbsa13489eqjpdqbvcrv0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpie0o35cth2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbe2r5hjckinull2e2t7un6sh4ahbfb7i4u2ll1g_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpie0o35cth2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| 1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrdbju5ssgbsb50pc214vqivg74j1qmv48a5bavo_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpie0o35cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8or0c1gj8d5hmjpqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c9j61o30sph2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrhna2ung8qarghujj9so32am8rkas6hboc578e0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpie0o35cth2bs)_
