name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3s6cnbo3ah2kbhtrpifbukskogqbe4v2g71t378_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpie8o71chh2bs) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z149d3m5tbi484l433d4n16bdv3ff9qnpqvn6td0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpie8o71chh2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zoc7kkbtou9ls1tashjh05nl2932h7dkg9l393h8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpie8o71chh2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| ICYMI News

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: media won’t talk about this BIG victory
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

What’s the best & cheapest way to stop Planned Parenthood’s pro-abortion referendums?

**It’s to stop them from happening!**

With the help of _Students for Life Action_ supporters just like you, Pro-Life Friend, that’s exactly what we just did in New Hampshire last week!

After a flood of emails, texts, and calls into New Hampshire’s General Court, _Students for Life Action_ STOPPED pro-abortion radicals in the New Hampshire State House from putting a referendum on the ballot to enshrine abortion-on-demand through 24 weeks.

In fact, pro-abortion radicals in New Hampshire fell flat on their faces.

_I know you’re not going to read about this victory in the media_.

That’s because they’re determined to demoralize every pro-lifer in the country and make each and every one of us believe that nothing we do makes a difference, _so that we’ll give up_.

The Abortion Lobby is FURIOUS that pro-lifers like you are saving lives, and costing them MILLIONS in blood money – money that would be spent electing and reelecting pro-abortion puppet politicians like President Joe Biden.

They don’t care about babies.

They don’t care about women.

All they care about is power.

_Pro-Life Friend, you and I have something so much bigger and better driving us_.

That’s love.

Thank you for all you do, Pro-Life Friend!

**[If you can, please agree to chip in $10 or $25 to help us keep nothing BIG wins the media will ignore](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-shrljit-duchtdja-y/)!**

That’s ok with me, so long as we keep saving babies!

That’s what it's all about.

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, _Students for Life Action_

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: The Declaration of Independence argues that the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights and that just government is founded on the consent of the governed. Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat. A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions. These efforts include: Teaching bright and principled students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, classical liberal arts education, including a required course on the Constitution Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our National Survey on the Department of Justice and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice , which you can access at this secure link: ** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Pro Life Update PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: American Action News
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znqjuq1dsfv2o2v77tbtoijmvds5mg01fcch1q28_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpieaob6chh2bs) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5qpli9fnj1r624i5ot78o71bp16t2c0t2b65ku0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpieaob6chh2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zutpornrpi0c6757ltorki4il25ljjen49n0fthg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpieaob6chh2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history. Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights Hides the corruption of the ruling class Attacks those with traditional viewpoints That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice. By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: The Declaration of Independence argues that the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights and that just government is founded on the consent of the governed. Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat. A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions. These efforts include: Teaching bright and principled students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, classical liberal arts education, including a required course on the Constitution Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our National Survey on the Department of Justice and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice , which you can access at this secure link: ** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Steve Garvey
subject: Defeat Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkM2OmzAUhZ_G7BwZ_8TugkWmJNlMqiqNpkvrYl_AEibINhP17Ssqup_tp3uPznd-3-wNwhTm4QdEbEoqNmXbeTtA-sQ_NLsx9L3ljEvKOGXG1pVvpOZeHCtsas20MErwuhob52ul0ddM9gBH7EAKzpzu0aAErUUVmi2HcWaYkUqyQ_cNpFHgFQAzqvNEMpgwlXwoIyZc1m4KDuaCEA_uGaupGUtZMhEnwi-EXzK6NeHhFeaEfrvYWMFPpHv9_pnommnGGQoSfvHY1YYLVA560YEi4rKWaPNzTQ6JaN_aK72fPwg_bjiiD2skoj3fduIgLhCGmYh2V6ntW3u1v67fT_b93d7PH_bniT7uj_2hOCLax_1B_5tXqfHLK0xTyEdNJBsihOmfXPnS-n8DAAD__0f9iNE)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkM2OmzAUhZ_G7BwZ_8TugkWmJNlMqiqNpkvrYl_AEibINhP17Ssqup_tp3uPznd-3-wNwhTm4QdEbEoqNmXbeTtA-sQ_NLsx9L3ljEvKOGXG1pVvpOZeHCtsas20MErwuhob52ul0ddM9gBH7EAKzpzu0aAErUUVmi2HcWaYkUqyQ_cNpFHgFQAzqvNEMpgwlXwoIyZc1m4KDuaCEA_uGaupGUtZMhEnwi-EXzK6NeHhFeaEfrvYWMFPpHv9_pnommnGGQoSfvHY1YYLVA560YEi4rKWaPNzTQ6JaN_aK72fPwg_bjiiD2skoj3fduIgLhCGmYh2V6ntW3u1v67fT_b93d7PH_bniT7uj_2hOCLax_1B_5tXqfHLK0xTyEdNJBsihOmfXPnS-n8DAAD__0f9iNE)** That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today.**[Will you step up and help strike out this “lineup of liberals” through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkM2OmzAUhZ_G7BwZ_8TugkWmJNlMqiqNpkvrYl_AEibINhP17Ssqup_tp3uPznd-3-wNwhTm4QdEbEoqNmXbeTtA-sQ_NLsx9L3ljEvKOGXG1pVvpOZeHCtsas20MErwuhob52ul0ddM9gBH7EAKzpzu0aAErUUVmi2HcWaYkUqyQ_cNpFHgFQAzqvNEMpgwlXwoIyZc1m4KDuaCEA_uGaupGUtZMhEnwi-EXzK6NeHhFeaEfrvYWMFPpHv9_pnommnGGQoSfvHY1YYLVA560YEi4rKWaPNzTQ6JaN_aK72fPwg_bjiiD2skoj3fduIgLhCGmYh2V6ntW3u1v67fT_b93d7PH_bniT7uj_2hOCLax_1B_5tXqfHLK0xTyEdNJBsihOmfXPnS-n8DAAD__0f9iNE)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkM2OmzAUhZ_G7BwZ_8TugkWmJNlMqiqNpkvrYl_AEibINhP17Ssqup_tp3uPznd-3-wNwhTm4QdEbEoqNmXbeTtA-sQ_NLsx9L3ljEvKOGXG1pVvpOZeHCtsas20MErwuhob52ul0ddM9gBH7EAKzpzu0aAErUUVmi2HcWaYkUqyQ_cNpFHgFQAzqvNEMpgwlXwoIyZc1m4KDuaCEA_uGaupGUtZMhEnwi-EXzK6NeHhFeaEfrvYWMFPpHv9_pnommnGGQoSfvHY1YYLVA560YEi4rKWaPNzTQ6JaN_aK72fPwg_bjiiD2skoj3fduIgLhCGmYh2V6ntW3u1v67fT_b93d7PH_bniT7uj_2hOCLax_1B_5tXqfHLK0xTyEdNJBsihOmfXPnS-n8DAAD__0f9iNE)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I’d consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkM2OmzAUhZ_G7BwZ_8TugkWmJNlMqiqNpkvrYl_AEibINhP17Ssqup_tp3uPznd-3-wNwhTm4QdEbEoqNmXbeTtA-sQ_NLsx9L3ljEvKOGXG1pVvpOZeHCtsas20MErwuhob52ul0ddM9gBH7EAKzpzu0aAErUUVmi2HcWaYkUqyQ_cNpFHgFQAzqvNEMpgwlXwoIyZc1m4KDuaCEA_uGaupGUtZMhEnwi-EXzK6NeHhFeaEfrvYWMFPpHv9_pnommnGGQoSfvHY1YYLVA560YEi4rKWaPNzTQ6JaN_aK72fPwg_bjiiD2skoj3fduIgLhCGmYh2V6ntW3u1v67fT_b93d7PH_bniT7uj_2hOCLax_1B_5tXqfHLK0xTyEdNJBsihOmfXPnS-n8DAAD__0f9iNE)** With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate
---
|
---
| | [**DONATE**](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkM2OmzAUhZ_G7BwZ_8TugkWmJNlMqiqNpkvrYl_AEibINhP17Ssqup_tp3uPznd-3-wNwhTm4QdEbEoqNmXbeTtA-sQ_NLsx9L3ljEvKOGXG1pVvpOZeHCtsas20MErwuhob52ul0ddM9gBH7EAKzpzu0aAErUUVmi2HcWaYkUqyQ_cNpFHgFQAzqvNEMpgwlXwoIyZc1m4KDuaCEA_uGaupGUtZMhEnwi-EXzK6NeHhFeaEfrvYWMFPpHv9_pnommnGGQoSfvHY1YYLVA560YEi4rKWaPNzTQ6JaN_aK72fPwg_bjiiD2skoj3fduIgLhCGmYh2V6ntW3u1v67fT_b93d7PH_bniT7uj_2hOCLax_1B_5tXqfHLK0xTyEdNJBsihOmfXPnS-n8DAAD__0f9iNE)
---
| | |
---
|
---
**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California.I’ve been fortunate to wear many hats in life – from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference.In baseball, it’s not about the individual; it’s about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It’s time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.
---

name: Robertson For Congress
subject: Reminder: Money in Politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robertson for Congress](https://r20
body:
There’s not much we all agree on, but nearly every American agrees that there is too much money in politics.
| | | |
---
# Too Much Money in Politics
---
By Mark S. Robertson, candidate for Nevada's First Congressional District.
There's not much we all agree on, but nearly every American agrees that there is too much money in politics. This results in a system where money interests outweigh the needs of everyday Americans. Politicians can easily become responsive to the wishes of their deep-pocketed donors rather than to the people they are meant to represent. We need to stop this!
Here are a few examples of excesses in political campaigns:
* Last election, a sitting member of Congress gave me this advice: "If you're not in debt at the end of your campaign, then you are not doing it right."
* The campaign of a candidate running against me in this year's Republican primary is already $1.25 million in debt.
* A Democrat in California spent more than $25 million in 2022 to win a seat in Congress.
This is out of control! Imagine how many homeless veterans we could care for with $25 million.
You'll be pleased to know that my campaign has money in the bank and zero debt. During the 2022 Republican Primary, I was outspent by many other candidates, yet I still won by nearly a two-to-one margin over the closest competitor. This was possible because of the grassroots efforts of the thousands of people who know and support me.
This is the advantage of having strong ties to our community. I don't have high-priced consultants or paid campaign workers. People freely volunteer their time, talents, and means to support our campaign. As a result, most of the contributions to my campaign come from people in Nevada. In contrast, most of the contributions to one of my competitors come from California.
We need people in Washington who "walk the talk." It is easy for a candidate to claim he is "against deficit spending" or wants to "balance the budget" while he does the exact opposite in his campaign.
I spent two decades as a financial planner helping Nevadans get out of debt, live within a budget, and reach their financial goals. I walk the talk in my personal life and will continue as I represent you in Washington D.C.
If you like this message and want a member of Congress who walks the talk, please forward this email to as many people as possible.

*******
---

name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama’s revolution
body:
Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. Members of the Republican Party of Milwaukee County were able to meet and welcome to Milwaukee, Jun Yanagi, the Consulate-General of Japan in Chicago 在シカゴ日本国総領事館. **Monroe County**
Monroe County gathered a great crowd at their annual Republican Party Lincoln Day Dinner. The guests heard wonderful messages from some of Wisconsin's best conservative leaders, including RPW Chairman Brian Schimming, Congressman Derrick Van Orden, State Treasurer John Leiber, and many more! This was an excellent start to the 2024 election season.
Great crowd, and wonderful messages from our conservative speakers at our annual 2024 **Jefferson County**
Jefferson County has been staying busy in the new year! In January, they hosted an amazing Pints & Politics, and this past weekend, they continued with their 2024 Caucus. Both events had great turnout and were successes! **Waukesha County**
The Republican Party of Waukesha County had a busy January, with multiple events including: Pints & Politics, Bob & Rocco Gun Show, and a Flea Market. We can always count on our friends in Waukesha to spread the Republican message in fun and creative ways. **Richland County**
The Republican Party of Richland County hosted a Pints & Politics Event in January. It is always lovely to see like-minded conservative coming together! **St. Croix County**
The Saint Croix County Republican Party started their new year off with a bang! The party and its members at a Grand Opening for their brand new Victory Center; the Executive Committee continued their hard work at a local candidate support night. **Kenosha County**
Kenosha County Republicans came out to support their local police department and its leader at the "Steaks with the Sheriff" Fundraiser. The event was a huge success and a reminder of how grateful we are for the men and women who protect us everyday. **Outagamie County**
The Republican Party of Outagamie County's 2024 Caucus is in the books! Members were joined by the incredible Congressman Mike Gallagher and other amazing speakers. **Brown County**
The Volunteer Caucus held last weekend was nothing short of a resounding success! The Brown County Republican Party was honored to have Congressman Mike Gallagher as their special guest speaker, who shared invaluable insights. Numerous dedicated politicians also joined the caucus, enlightening members on their impactful contributions to our state! **Calumet County**
The Republican Party of Calumet County held a wildly successful 2024 Caucus, joined by Congressmen Mike Gallagher and Glenn Grothman, along with a slew of other special speakers! **Rock County**
Rock County had a fantastic grand opening event last night! They heard from a lot of conservative local candidates and congressional candidates, legislators, and our state treasurer! **Walworth County**
The Republican Party of Walworth County held a great messaging workshop this past week. Multiple volunteer showed up to offer their support! **Washington County**
The Republican Party of Washington County welcomed local politicians at their previous Pints & Politics. Tons of Washington County Republicans came out to hear from their leaders! [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdlddn-didthutlhu-ku/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdlddn-didthutlhu-ul/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdlddn-didthutlhu-ur/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdlddn-didthutlhu-uy/) | [ Share ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-fb-xdlddn-didthutlhu-ut/) | [ Tweet ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-tw-xdlddn-didthutlhu-ui/) | [ Forward ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-didthutlhu-931243C5-xdlddn-l-ud)
---|---|---

name: Christine Drazan
subject: Your leaders don't want to repeal M110
body:
Friend,

Over 3,000 of you signed our petition demanding a repeal of Measure 110!

Today we took it one step further and delivered all petition signatures to the Joint Committee On Addiction and Community Safety Response.

I also wanted to remind you of today’s public hearing on HB 4002. Have you registered to testify? You can do so here or by clicking the button below. [https://olis.oregonlegislature.gov/liz/2024R1/Committees/JACSR/2024-02-07-17-00/Agenda]

REGISTER TO TESTIFY [https://olis.oregonlegislature.gov/liz/2024R1/Committees/JACSR/2024-02-07-17-00/Agenda]

Similarly to Measure 110, HB 4002 bill offers false promises and empty solutions. It fails to confront the root causes of addiction and could plunge Oregon deeper into chaos.

We cannot afford to let this bill pass unchallenged. [https://olis.oregonlegislature.gov/liz/2024R1/Committees/JACSR/2024-02-07-17-00/Agenda]

REGISTER TO TESTIFY [https://olis.oregonlegislature.gov/liz/2024R1/Committees/JACSR/2024-02-07-17-00/Agenda]

Together, we can forge a path towards healing and recovery for all.

Thank you,

Christine Drazan

---------- Forwarded message ---------

From: Christine Drazan <info@anewdirection-or.com>

Date: Mon, Nov 6, 2023 at 5:31 PM

Subject: Kotek doesn’t want to repeal M110

To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Friend,

In a recent interview with “Think Out Loud,” Gov. Kotek revealed she has no intention of repealing M110, even though she is aware that is what the people of Oregon want. I believe that the people’s voices should be heard and respected, and that’s why I need your support.

We all know how devastating M110 has been on our communities and our lives. It’s crucial that we do everything in our power to repeal it, which is why it’s imperative that you sign the petition if you haven’t already. [https://secure.anedot.com/a-new-direction/8302023_kotektaskforce_saandor/?utm_source=Housefile&utm_medium=SA-Email&utm_campaign=11.6.2023_M110Repeal_SAAndOr&utm_content=Link]

SIGN THE PETITION TO REPEAL M110 [https://secure.anedot.com/a-new-direction/8302023_kotektaskforce_saandor/?utm_source=Housefile&utm_medium=SA-Email&utm_campaign=11.6.2023_M110Repeal_SAAndOr&utm_content=Link]

Friend, we’ve seen the power of collective action before, and I firmly believe that if enough voices unite, we can create change. We can’t let our elected leaders continue to ignore the people who elected them.

Add your name to the petition before we turn the signatures in to Kotek tomorrow. [https://secure.anedot.com/a-new-direction/8302023_kotektaskforce_saandor/?utm_source=Housefile&utm_medium=SA-Email&utm_campaign=11.6.2023_M110Repeal_SAAndOr&utm_content=Link] Join us in making change in our state.

Thank you,

Christine Drazan

subject: More momentum
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE DUGAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8c30722d3644710666a6b3c4b83ff292/45443/1f6b5cf6d54bb94a3947229f28c3afba/8af06f78e6ac78d8c3d6b838967d376c/45443)

We’ve seen tremendous support since launching this campaign a month ago. First, 21 Georgia Republican Senators endorsed the campaign. Then, CPAC gave me its Award for Conservative Excellence. And now, 5 Georgia House Republicans — all of whom live in the 3rd District — have also endorsed the campaign! **[**We have the momentum. We have the team that can win. We just need your continued support. Will you donate here?**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8c30722d3644710666a6b3c4b83ff292/45443/1f6b5cf6d54bb94a3947229f28c3afba/37d22f2348124cfec3d6b838967d376c/45443)**

[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8c30722d3644710666a6b3c4b83ff292/45443/1f6b5cf6d54bb94a3947229f28c3afba/1074559167f70dacc3d6b838967d376c/45443)

From day one, we said we wouldn’t get outworked, and that we’d start by listening to what’s on voters’ hearts. Working families in this district want someone who’s focused on delivering for them, and who puts results before self-interest. **I’m an Army Ranger, a businessman, and conservative who’s ready to take action and deliver. I just need your help to get the word out.** More good news to come!

name: Full Mag News
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=237623facd0448f0ae232bedf417203e&_e=kStAyneHJBWvBIEAtDvrSuzU6MssIbSeuK3RifNMGXoi1uh4s3zg4p-KRx2wcl0qXqyTorWKGdEWpQ6mUIhoCfjhnAcG1-e6ydxfk9ynVdimniQgfiTFSILugq4VzfkueJlyQO-VLhcnM7DACT24oWnkMq8ktzz7b8NxaO-GE9snLJ-DB5MlTuCwJ-7pfCj4rMFQ0LH1ErqTw5Cn_KQqyauCoH-8d-8KF0GjsAMOE-2GVZYD0Q7FToy9fmVC2ANPHVTygJCkUHrx0_8x9wQhbMZYB6Wh3A8BpbJqRgoDWIoPszeLi3JNl_DrcTF3jbKdqt6g3EyEJhT7m9Rp2Q7758nMOJfbjvbh2gNVH5j_EDBA1VErfb8dnUTE5ddn4iFuZ4ixN5PikKhzEXZPUXEqqw%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=237623facd0448f0ae232bedf417203e&_e=kStAyneHJBWvBIEAtDvrSuzU6MssIbSeuK3RifNMGXoi1uh4s3zg4p-KRx2wcl0qXqyTorWKGdEWpQ6mUIhoCfjhnAcG1-e6ydxfk9ynVdimniQgfiTFSILugq4VzfkueJlyQO-VLhcnM7DACT24oWnkMq8ktzz7b8NxaO-GE9snLJ-DB5MlTuCwJ-7pfCj4rMFQ0LH1ErqTw5Cn_KQqyauCoH-8d-8KF0GjsAMOE-3NTdWJ4Bn4zkDitgcYaQjZxsuEOdb0sbP7ANIlmtCXCr6sSbjcBBabdRznnNCS5lxpLDgSxav8b_9govlJEK6gdcu8bkuxntWM17TAF2RhdId2zMYCfbW5_-MU4Lj1HiCX2YLx1Um9CsvoAjFpYseWaYyzfaeERQNHf2G_Sn5K_A%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=237623facd0448f0ae232bedf417203e&_e=kStAyneHJBWvBIEAtDvrSuzU6MssIbSeuK3RifNMGXoi1uh4s3zg4p-KRx2wcl0qXqyTorWKGdEWpQ6mUIhoCfjhnAcG1-e6ydxfk9ynVdimniQgfiTFSILugq4VzfkueJlyQO-VLhcnM7DACT24oWnkMq8ktzz7b8NxaO-GE9snLJ-DB5MlTuCwJ-7pfCj4rMFQ0LH1ErqTw5Cn_KQqyauCoH-8d-8KF0GjsAMOE-2d-u4skMT_zAh32a2sN0zp0fIymeyOVXaXmTONnU2leOX-P_RBZ_wptZHMbIyclz3dsL48a2ZJon8jgDrWLIqYKBYLIv8VluDQZqqLnqAFcVAVHJZF1IrVTYJle9If4oqS1FlFwSbR99hR2EcYnJaVPAcsJfpq9BRMWkttb98kOw%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

---

Full Mag News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Tom Suozzi
subject: The special election is in just 5 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
and I need your help
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta72c22e5-33d7-4919-adfd-d4384ea560fc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T45c8981e-1d3d-4bd8-9548-2e60cbdf45ca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Hi Peter, it’s Tom Suozzi. Blue Amp Action asked me to reach out with an important message. I’m writing to ask for your support so we can win the NY-03 special election in just 5 days. [**I really need everyone reading this to chip in $10 right away. Let me explain why. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6a69736a-b105-475e-a172-1fb68cd9771c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) With under 1 week left until this critical special election, polling is in the **margin of error** and far right outside groups are spending **nearly $5 million** against me in these final days. Early voting is already under way and we’re running out of time to make our final push to voters. Peter, we can’t afford to fall short here. The whole nation will be watching NY-03. Climate change, immigration reform, gun safety, reproductive rights–all of it is at stake on February 13. As the nation looks to Long Island to see which way we will go, we’ve got to make it clear–**we need a government that can solve our problems and get things done!** [**So Peter, I’m humbly asking–with so much on the line and the whole nation watching, will you rush a split donation right away to help me win this special election and elect Democrats around the country?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb5f53e1a-621e-4045-8a8c-864ca1e2c5dd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf87d1ee9-7ed1-4dba-ba72-319b84589333/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thank you so much for your support. It means the world. Best, Tom Suozzi
---

|

| | | | |

| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/pMva33X58I9aibB2tVh8aQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnp00cP0SoaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2RlcGFydG1lbnQtb2YtanVzdGljZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP3NjPTAxMDQwTjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1kb2pzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtUk9OLTIwMjQwMjA4VwNzcGNCCmXDKbHEZZdsQ8VSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Restore Our Nation

The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history. Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights Hides the corruption of the ruling class Attacks those with traditional viewpoints That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice. By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: The Declaration of Independence argues that the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights and that just government is founded on the consent of the governed. Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat. A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions. These efforts include: Teaching bright and principled students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, classical liberal arts education, including a required course on the Constitution Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our National Survey on the Department of Justice and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice , which you can access at this secure link: ** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. ## Tucker Interview Jolts Journalists
Tucker Carlson's interview with Russian President Vladimir Putin could be released [as early as today](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFyqzAQRb9GdMuIlQC7UPFc0PlNqqRkZFiZTYTkkQTEf59x6jS3uac4cz6u49Wy53D_b1cyxcXRToV3GhFOgHrU1WwcEZKqyDS97LXEc4PVYqa-RU3kkLDHzk4Nnk8aZYPzjdCpW8UGJWqJ8tTItlNtrZwj3bm-JX1WTaeEljRzian-jBzKQs4_406pnuJaebOU8shC_RM4CByO46jXHF6fwIEC3G8Ch0BHFjhsr0lbzmwh22cGF9NKCVz8hhcCS8wFyjZ9UYLJJp9jgMVm4FAo7UwHzbB7O_PKCR5b4SBwsAkul2Z5fyuxSmZ-HOw9564XWt5Xy_7Xs_wV7ScAAP__GBdv_A) and has already stirred up a firestorm of criticism from traditional media. Carlson posted [this four-minute video on X](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz79OwzAQgPGnsbdW5_O_ZPCAkLKVCYkxcpxzY3DiKrm24u2RYGX-hk-_j8t4iaWW7foWVwqc2xgTlweNeOpOaEYj55CJkLSkoDx4A9grlEtQ0CXtwame8hQB3aRSstlPBucOVJQlIKABhE6Bddqedc5kXPaWTK-V08IAzYXbfv5sZeOFcv1uD9rPqa2yhoX5dgj9InAQOPCzMP81gcP7PX3R_hr3erRN4HBw5PshcFDeml73aBVab7y11so9zLdnqbUczgsD1zWW-vvg_8A_AQAA__-lQFQj) explaining why he was interviewing Putin, saying Americans deserved to hear all sides, whether they liked Putin or not. The post has racked up over 90 million views, and the X app has [rocketed to No. 1 ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGPozAUhH-N6V5kHg6GwsU1dLn2SuQ4z8G3xkb2I2z-_YrU24xGM9Jo9P27zTcbYkjPv3Ylwz7P1nF40YwwAKpZNQ_jiZC6hkyrpVYSxxabxXjq0VKnyY_2Tq7X2iL5cRhIeUJnm2BQopIoh1Ze--566bwn1Xt9JTV2bd8JJekROJfL_xwSL-TjO7-oXFxem2gW5q2K7o_ASeDE5BZX9uSWsxY4neMCJ4mnaIHTN_hcVirxDXwEZipwJ5dXqpAytGC3DXKCHerHVs6FziDRUSF74N19UQFnS6w5wbZzSBASU3kFOgROTTGP7QgxhtproeRztSF-zvJv5H4CAAD__2oGcP4)in the App Store charts as people download it in anticipation of the interview. Several major news organizations noted they had requested interviews with Putin as well but have been turned down. [Russian officials said](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L2SrCAQxfGn0awtbPErILiJ2dx0QwuhGXsXYQpQa99-azbe9JzkV_-Px_rQ7Dk8_-uDVHFx1abwRSvCBChXWVvliJC6mlQ7ilEKnFusdzW35HCS2shNbzNORm7j1G-E1DutN6xZoUApUEyt6IeubzrnSA5u7EnOXTt0lRRkucTUfEYOZSfnv-NFqTHxqL3aS3nlqvtX4VLhct93k-gslPL7fy8xeVvh8joLB3jqi6Cc5osSGJ18jgF0AA6F0sV0w0ZGn5lgJ7DsHKUMMRBktmThIMsa3l4QCGKscKmTsq-bvec8jJUUz0Oz_6WVvzr9BAAA__9HDmqx) they felt Carlson was much less biased.
## Haley Loses to 'None of These Candidates'
Republican [Presidential candidate Nikki Haley](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2S4yAQhJ9GynDBgAQKCC5x5ksvVA0wWHOFfgqxdvntt7Txht0d9Fffv8f8QC68Pf_iSr7lfcbY-EUzCCfAzKZPPhMB6Z68stIaCZOCfvFgo3NTVGFQxgFEE40CGadJDRSyND17kGAkSKfkMOrhpnMmM2Y7kJm0GnVnJCVue73933lrC-Xy2V9Ub3Ff--KX1o6z0386uHdwx2Oj93lNV6iNY6EO7hu9MKG4nsRR6eREW2Ms4qi8Yv2IcDWi1a_1EAsW-ohktQrZYVBkk0Gr7RSlTRq1DYNToa8-HW8uhc_RdkY-V-Tyw9R-E_QdAAD__09nZU4) suffered another primary election loss in Nevada Tuesday, except this time, she lost to "none of these candidates." In a ballot that didn't feature former President Trump, Nevada voters preferred anyone but Haley by a 2-1 margin. No delegates were at stake in the primary; they'll be awarded after Thursday's caucus. Haley's campaign avoided Nevada, where Trump had a strong lead. He wasn't on the primary ballot, [but his allies pushed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1vwyAUAH-NvRHx8Qx4YOiSLV07Whge8WswWDZ1lH9fpXPH0y2n-7pNN0-Zyv3Tr-haqpMPjU6cJLNMwgR9dAlRourRCcMNcDkK2S8u4RzEjNaYBFagtjZYPhvJZw2Gp6EnJ7kELrkVfNBquKiUEHQyA8KohFYdcIzU6n75rlTagim_6on7JdS1z25pbTs69dHJayevfiv4PN7qDXujkLGT14Knj57FWnyOrO0_68YKPR7EFp_xxUotyIIvkaJveLA4BFRaW8DZIIhookQDQY-DwVGMut9d3J6UMx3adMDvq6f8F9T-u_MbAAD___V2ZSc) an effort to get voters to select "none of the above" rather than Haley. The next Republican primary will take place on Feb. 24th in Haley's home state of South Carolina. She faces another tough contest there, trailing Trump by more than [30% in the polls](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGO8yAQBOCnwZ0tWLCJC4q_cZe_vdIieAkbYWPBXk55-1NSXz2fNKP5uq5XT5mO-3-_o-NYVh-YnrhCf-nBrKbbXEQE1B06ZaU1EmYFXXLWbKO_3XCOwaCO0kYVLmoOYMGOcrIdOZBgJMiLkuOkx0HHiGaKdkQzazVpYSRuxKUOj0IHJ4z5VZ5Yh1D2LrvEfDah_wlYBCxnLQ8M3IZIT-RElV9I98Rv_I5Lzu3DsNGGB_dnpd3XV18FLO8hApZWvjn1wdeS6fAClq667fyhnKlNVhh53z3lTz3_9cVvAAAA__9zKWDK).
## New Sports Streaming Service Unveiled
A new sports streaming platform announced as a joint venture by ESPN, Fox Sports, and Warner Bros Discovery will likely [cost over $40 a month](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0D2zoyAUxvFPgx0OHkBNYbGNXbbd0kE4RHZ4ceAkbr79Tu5tb_v8m988f-7b3YQY8uO3SbiQL5uxFF64AZ85qE11bvGIgLLDZZjEpATcBuiOZZDezbvVGpzZJ42ojZ-thHGelUYlurCAACVAzIPQo9S99B7V6CeN6iaHUTIl0AUqtf9bQqYDfXyXF9beltTF5SA6G5O_GKwM1uu6-opPwto-ncG6P1vI2BqDNaELhhNG_E7tLJUab1TRpJAf_IyGfKmJh2zj030mF1rGN_flH7elETd7eSFXIpVMB7d5t_zj5wK4mBisXV3ceYUYQxsnpsQjmRC_qPTTb_8DAAD___owcEs) and further disrupt the embattled cable TV business. The new company would offer an all-in-one package of programming that would include sports channels such as ESPN, TNT, and FS1, making up what the industry calls a "skinny bundle" -- cheaper than cable but more than a single streaming service. While it could cut into the traditional cable business, it also holds [risks for the partners.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD2PtCAURn8Ndhi8oGhB8TZ287ZbGkYuI7t8GLwZsv9-49bbPM2TnJOcj8f2sCGG_PpvExryZbM7hTduwGcOalOdMx4RUHZoBi20ErAM0B1mHJcnzE7APA9ay3l0sLjnIian0C9y6oIBAUqAmAcxTnLspfeoJq9HVIscJsmUQBeo1P6zhEwH-vhd3lj7vaQumoPovJj8x2BlsLbW-j0_9_tksN5oBquAezSDNWPj11kqXfyiijaF_OJntORLTbwdljgV_pVL6w9KsavGnS3EGK5JMyVeyYb4K6a_KvwEAAD__4N2XHM) Analysts say it's unclear how large an audience there is for a sports service at that price that doesn't include providers like CBS Sports and NBC Sports.
* * *

**➤ ****Senate****Republicans** on Wednesday shot down the border security bill that also contained aid to Israel and Ukraine. Majority Leader Chuck Schumer said he'll now try to pass a stand-alone bill for aid to Ukraine. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAUAL8GNiJ4gLEHhi7e0rWjhe1H_FpsLCCJ8vdV27Xr3XDSfVyna6BEx-097OhbzFNYGj1wAtELMJPhq4-IgJqjV046I2FQwDcfQVnTqcHZfpjdEqLtEB2iNBKiXhUnDxKMBNkraTttLzpGNF10Fs2gVaeZkbhSy-XymeloG8b0yg8slyXvPPmttbMy_cZgZDC2DTdK6ccxGLe844HPymCseISGDEZjrB6sFX9AFDzvc6IlHFXMKS9fYqYzlEY1HGLOZcUiKi73Qu0lVgyJwciLX88npUS1c8zI2x7oN8nbf2--AwAA__8dHmYn)) ➤ **Meanwhile,** House Democrats rejected a GOP-led effort to pass a stand-alone aid bill for Israel under rules that required two-thirds approval. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d9564cd0f7fd49bd9d2ad6a202c78597&_e=o1brDPhNWAlW5ougCfsbk1KZSLmXlrUzIcllE02e72lp891OOXgV6AU0iN19QHoKIf1qpC70Npv9T_B0UCatwlFv69j24eymX6IT_3mhh1BPMJ0lTl_nMxRCiZ2EPX8oheeF5_KyZMIknNViMBQEVWC3aSGX-EMRyjyrPmzvtjHGxFtRlWeoFaYiQIMWHUzpkqDywhTNkSze4oY62cqX7wukWHG3sziV_6mau3BOA_S1ULudvg5y94cbl_xjdc3S69wmrpRMonpb1dojG86H18ZZnLHNTfxdxliXFWWvmdmBrJrRkKG54PeWeF6XFUkIcDTePD7L4Xc7a2ByhxxGtA87wBcdBpCxXCzRLIornTg9LJFedGon6hBN8r8XVHKlRSEllE3jV5fYpZfyu4ZctbjAn4XCvdTszVczPigFE7M%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d9564cd0f7fd49bd9d2ad6a202c78597&_e=o1brDPhNWAlW5ougCfsbk1KZSLmXlrUzIcllE02e72lp891OOXgV6AU0iN19QHoKIf1qpC70Npv9T_B0UCatwlFv69j24eymX6IT_3mhh1BPMJ0lTl_nMxRCiZ2EPX8oheeF5_KyZMIknNViMBQEVWC3aSGX-EMRyjyrPmzvtjHGxFtRlWeoFaYiQIMWHUzpkqDywhTNkSze4oY62cqX7wukWHG3sziV_6mau3BOA_S1ULudvg5y94cbl_xjdc3S69wmrpRMonpb1dojG86H1xtF_x3agu0ITEyfovM8DF8LRBx5otInkRLx6A2DNT9cTc-b9Z_POSUFweX7mW8AO5rkwZ5C6OfZayAcYPVKifMVF-iB2Y1dgYHfE0X5bRHDmJtFHASVOA7QdeCFduymnkZHKMyFt13xOLQOsJBug4w%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d9564cd0f7fd49bd9d2ad6a202c78597&_e=o1brDPhNWAlW5ougCfsbk1KZSLmXlrUzIcllE02e72lp891OOXgV6AU0iN19QHoKIf1qpC70Npv9T_B0UCatwlFv69j24eymX6IT_3mhh1BPMJ0lTl_nMxRCiZ2EPX8oheeF5_KyZMIknNViMBQEVWC3aSGX-EMRyjyrPmzvtjHGxFtRlWeoFaYiQIMWHUzpkqDywhTNkSze4oY62cqX7wukWHG3sziV_6mau3BOA_S1ULudvg5y94cbl_xjdc3S69wmrpRMonpb1dojG86H18i43jd9ro83aidL13NlgC8N859wuNIgbOcWMrvo91xPm4OHX0RUrv-bNBAZ0nRNLQh9RqHO7uP7ei5DmACGpAz2UexKxGF49UPrhmnGgVBzXzZLn4033AZegrbLMqXrU5XiXtwRUZyvh8WUUo4WrrA%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d9564cd0f7fd49bd9d2ad6a202c78597&_e=o1brDPhNWAlW5ougCfsbk1KZSLmXlrUzIcllE02e72lp891OOXgV6AU0iN19QHoKIf1qpC70Npv9T_B0UCatwlFv69j24eymX6IT_3mhh1BPMJ0lTl_nMxRCiZ2EPX8oheeF5_KyZMIknNViMBQEVWC3aSGX-EMRyjyrPmzvtjHGxFtRlWeoFaYiQIMWHUzpkqDywhTNkSze4oY62cqX7wukWHG3sziV_6mau3BOA_S1ULudvg5y94cbl_xjdc3S69wmrpRMonpb1dojG86H19SJ1GGgvRED_KLB_k5pc7OXOggXAuMW8iBjihegDS0Zd_kFiafGewtt6sbqlvv7EqDBJToQ-PBzoGdMlGiajtgQir8YjczjJ3rJnHKdv5AVSjx9DdLR4mlx9uVbMlgvI9LhN9bNhkgBr1R5WwU0nOM%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---

| |
---
---

| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3345847065994b708591a357747a09db&_e=IXN7slFt2fqDENIGiU_KOcK6G_-9fDSaBe43p9vh1gVCPebz35rM_WlfuvM-OSkW0Z-oAI6Nvns1OMrulHYB1BpKiAyEad3iZHfI6GE34cg02RmDoJ9CtICFGHwLu4_7_RNU9Ve8FrCS9Ms7iNpZ69PwINQLjUH2V3KsFGaszrZgKyFqbsdkm7mCyrfWd2vl0Bzs3U58Oal3OGHCrnPGXpZa-hoa4oZJWPkXJV2_cvFZdqcZvB6TQQOkTcbGnmHg4AmgXsH0lJkHEA6prrxBswGTzTk5yRaQXeo16C2rpsBgKK6pUUiGln-SEsSJxMrbX1K2CL871SgQ4oFsZcSkaoy21W2oEQJivs9laNwXqiePmhKoxDUcwCPer1UjYVTDGNpmJwcvdzs6DVRHiWuLRQ%3D%3D)** That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today.**[Will you step up and help strike out this “lineup of liberals” through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3345847065994b708591a357747a09db&_e=IXN7slFt2fqDENIGiU_KOcK6G_-9fDSaBe43p9vh1gVCPebz35rM_WlfuvM-OSkW0Z-oAI6Nvns1OMrulHYB1BpKiAyEad3iZHfI6GE34cg02RmDoJ9CtICFGHwLu4_7_RNU9Ve8FrCS9Ms7iNpZ69PwINQLjUH2V3KsFGaszrZgKyFqbsdkm7mCyrfWd2vl0Bzs3U58Oal3OGHCrnPGXpZa-hoa4oZJWPkXJV2_cvEpeXky4mg40ggUa1HJUhfTdyBNpHwUOqiu7X46CNs6FRWbZ7LK29TThlN6eDlJLL039LRXMsbR0vW1U-yTJWn2TnkQcHu2aOsf2u71_oC85uvuAdICThfvYofQTTyxqg6iVgqGDzw91fstbJFLwQ_L_UUJz9zCVF0oez-J_9-7NQ%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3345847065994b708591a357747a09db&_e=IXN7slFt2fqDENIGiU_KOcK6G_-9fDSaBe43p9vh1gVCPebz35rM_WlfuvM-OSkW0Z-oAI6Nvns1OMrulHYB1BpKiAyEad3iZHfI6GE34cg02RmDoJ9CtICFGHwLu4_7_RNU9Ve8FrCS9Ms7iNpZ69PwINQLjUH2V3KsFGaszrZgKyFqbsdkm7mCyrfWd2vl0Bzs3U58Oal3OGHCrnPGXpZa-hoa4oZJWPkXJV2_cvEEEC2OCHNTMaYdpShE3uA51xDb--n4ptYy2FQtXojdVJKoeDdftPKOC4l1ReSqiCgi1BlT7V-uc3z3yJm2rVN59i08euND2sZlhYhXPKoFuvx7zOG5gZ7f0dmh0T2byeXY4KnhHXdd67jnWFI9qOTbtqmy141XGgb8PlauGvBRNA%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I’d consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3345847065994b708591a357747a09db&_e=IXN7slFt2fqDENIGiU_KOcK6G_-9fDSaBe43p9vh1gVCPebz35rM_WlfuvM-OSkW0Z-oAI6Nvns1OMrulHYB1BpKiAyEad3iZHfI6GE34cg02RmDoJ9CtICFGHwLu4_7_RNU9Ve8FrCS9Ms7iNpZ69PwINQLjUH2V3KsFGaszrZgKyFqbsdkm7mCyrfWd2vl0Bzs3U58Oal3OGHCrnPGXpZa-hoa4oZJWPkXJV2_cvHWdEP8Za6EF4Pn-zYjpWCxbsfrodaKLdZOsxaz7WkR5Op58ldkOLWkBEc9-8mK880tVwzqY0CLczvUIAUceOo7Hu3FGn2dP0VdWobryBcrJCNEtAPhD4_4cSJH1ZRatbk2Is_JoqYdPfEAmYWALlSNaSvznA4MelUBzdSmXrM55w%3D%3D)** With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---

Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=53357a11d60c4a5a86766a92d3f829d5&_e=tMsAIBPMekWzUTMoTpdAzsWV97-UL_8pkRs44Icd5nsajQuEKobjkE-ppG5tdS7g_fRG1R_6OGCwMHzNjUCMnRGPHSlSJEt8Yyv26qfWhiAQ6JB_YYKp9w4HE8HZzg5KCqcn3AnFtih4pcR5wHGyWLQKw252WCUQJENYiIOrD-I4wxyxO8q0lGS0JL-5J8ya1FUrnNhGjmzTNfMKLJZk_lmnntven8VjxrOo4FWlMbdOAFtSR3CiZmx6w4Tfgv7o_NoWOJ-Nk01JaPOb92mgHigTrgRnXFC2I9kBVZQ9mlr-dtrC45l-6udc8l5kEXtcP4ilmxW9cdyt1eA0TVNxVnBcWABg43KYAwxUIzLuJxm_kPwlsDfgUiAOiIW7cPIPK0rVLRssbg_m9d0xc9FAGakoUflH8mEadyKG8vDT66k%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=53357a11d60c4a5a86766a92d3f829d5&_e=tMsAIBPMekWzUTMoTpdAzsWV97-UL_8pkRs44Icd5nsajQuEKobjkE-ppG5tdS7g_fRG1R_6OGCwMHzNjUCMnRGPHSlSJEt8Yyv26qfWhiAQ6JB_YYKp9w4HE8HZzg5KCqcn3AnFtih4pcR5wHGyWLQKw252WCUQJENYiIOrD-I4wxyxO8q0lGS0JL-5J8ya1FUrnNhGjmzTNfMKLJZk_lmnntven8VjxrOo4FWlMbdOAFtSR3CiZmx6w4Tfgv7o_NoWOJ-Nk01JaPOb92mgHgQdT4PQJH1cxziz6znr-b8nudOsJEqFqXFFgaUbhhHePPBIaaA8qgfg9M8OvWSzmgw7inhp8_hPFJP0JyPZQO-0iROWoY56iq_y1iCVNkb-58SG1x05xkRKEziEq-tOHNOHPwuIm7bEX8d1e3jRRhU%3D) That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=53357a11d60c4a5a86766a92d3f829d5&_e=tMsAIBPMekWzUTMoTpdAzsWV97-UL_8pkRs44Icd5nsajQuEKobjkE-ppG5tdS7g_fRG1R_6OGCwMHzNjUCMnRGPHSlSJEt8Yyv26qfWhiAQ6JB_YYKp9w4HE8HZzg5KCqcn3AnFtih4pcR5wHGyWLQKw252WCUQJENYiIOrD-I4wxyxO8q0lGS0JL-5J8ya1FUrnNhGjmzTNfMKLJZk_lmnntven8VjxrOo4FWlMbdOAFtSR3CiZmx6w4Tfgv7o_NoWOJ-Nk01JaPOb92mgHsZXz_dxT3qlgVtshs9xzGhNoSf_-jos7tFID04wvnL5F5zQre3leZP9GCiEDLSq8P7x8-hna527vGQFsaKB3LYxz7ZLS_j900WhjGAtdNoQ8-Tn_uId-Mds1uLWWXxbKgC5XI5BQabSaJl8YoBW-ro%3D)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Freedom Nation Today

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Gordon=20Ackley?=
subject: Official caucus results
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands
body:
Election Night Party at Frenchman's Reef | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9c6dc355a6f2/re-hey-9346029?e=d30db4cde8)
---
| |
---
| | My fellow Republicans,

Election Day is finally here. Today is the Virgin Islands caucus. This is our one and only opportunity to vote for president in 2024.

Polls on St. Thomas at Bluebeard’s Castle and on St. Croix at the La Reine Chicken Shack are open from 7 a.m. to 6 p.m. On St. John, voting at the Lovango Rum Bar in Cruz Bay is between 10 a.m. and 4 p.m. Those without a current voter registration can same-day register with the party at the polling locations. Just bring a U.S. passport or Virgin Islands driver's license.

Official results will be announced at our Election Night Party at the Morningstar Buoy House Beach Resort at Frenchman's Reef on St. Thomas. The food and drinks are free. Doors open at 6:30 p.m. with results expected at 8 p.m.

If you're unable to attend the party, you can watch our [live broadcast](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=144b9ec117&e=d30db4cde8) on YouTube. [Here's the link (click here)](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=8e32ffcca0&e=d30db4cde8).

It doesn't matter who you support. Just get out and vote today.

Let's do this,

Republican Chairman Gordon Ackley
---
| | **2024 VIRGIN ISLANDS CAUCUS**
Thursday, February 8 (all voting in-person)
Pre-register to vote by [clicking here](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=e77860e82f&e=d30db4cde8)
St. Croix: 7 a.m. to 6 p.m. Atlantic at La Reine Chicken Shack, Christiansted
St. John: 10 a.m. to 4 p.m. Atlantic at Lovango Rum Bar, Cruz Bay
St. Thomas: 7 a.m. to 6 p.m. Atlantic at Bluebeard's Castle, Charlotte Amalie
---
| **_Paid for by the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands.
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
www.republicanpartyinthevirginislands.com_**

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=4a1e7eb3fa&e=d30db4cde8&c=4154257cb9) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=4a1e7eb3fa&t=b&e=d30db4cde8&c=4154257cb9).
