name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a54c52caa4264d56b1b146286ec4915d&_e=oqRw-vpRJIxAojgaBt0-jkjXwoE8y1YGFs028a1x4V5823y6LQd418qnQlpqhmEj6Jwl4dUF7UjiO37rtm6f7eXVUCHNrE3RN723lqK3hvFUPpz60xuw5z6r0h1NjYXJficxaXHdzXk0Js7uh33-CCc9R29_Jx_HjPhCNDCpdye2zaKKbxtbQmEoGe6xLSScSMsNF__paLnviVxkYsgaVftm5jQAtni-1LUJLbjNxLBFUOB5t13WnBzdNsj6UP1VVPQfmPpMNhTcd4N_jpdFfMIlMWmcG_v0eGzxrQVUwezo_PIOuVSEdaF623noFenxGGnKOS8g6us1rZ3zZIXzPV1AQ3CTX9iYDNJAY6W3U1_ZFTrooUpxAYXRLXSdHoyGZN7ZFeyDl7-3YM8aNP7oNm_6ve--CGFSYSj1E_WRSRo%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a54c52caa4264d56b1b146286ec4915d&_e=oqRw-vpRJIxAojgaBt0-jkjXwoE8y1YGFs028a1x4V5823y6LQd418qnQlpqhmEj6Jwl4dUF7UjiO37rtm6f7eXVUCHNrE3RN723lqK3hvFUPpz60xuw5z6r0h1NjYXJficxaXHdzXk0Js7uh33-CCc9R29_Jx_HjPhCNDCpdye2zaKKbxtbQmEoGe6xLSScSMsNF__paLnviVxkYsgaVftm5jQAtni-1LUJLbjNxLBFUOB5t13WnBzdNsj6UP1VVPQfmPpMNhTcd4N_jpdFfMCgl75eeByf6zZmgFZPBHbcijFMaXwZpRqA3w4hTcpudw8UhZohBDl_B6ELF6UOZ6w_6z7UmBHtGpre5lghN5APM9tfiFvc_wNOTJQwdhbWrCIpOZx0wYFNRFQWSnfWhcullGehPtWGDPNwZu82c2Y%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a54c52caa4264d56b1b146286ec4915d&_e=oqRw-vpRJIxAojgaBt0-jkjXwoE8y1YGFs028a1x4V5823y6LQd418qnQlpqhmEj6Jwl4dUF7UjiO37rtm6f7eXVUCHNrE3RN723lqK3hvFUPpz60xuw5z6r0h1NjYXJficxaXHdzXk0Js7uh33-CCc9R29_Jx_HjPhCNDCpdye2zaKKbxtbQmEoGe6xLSScSMsNF__paLnviVxkYsgaVftm5jQAtni-1LUJLbjNxLBFUOB5t13WnBzdNsj6UP1VVPQfmPpMNhTcd4N_jpdFfD3fqkzJisdRxOYGKrTpYFNUH7NzzpiPU2iwGRd8TUYbzHVJ4AV9cVSkKsbgBkI06dFQuxWXJp2dDW6yn3Yjfcu-Wq-6tHEtFHr8ctVAzbN03xgrjikdcGnEa1nka44G3l_jJBiccWKjFAp94rlcyBw%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a54c52caa4264d56b1b146286ec4915d&_e=oqRw-vpRJIxAojgaBt0-jkjXwoE8y1YGFs028a1x4V5823y6LQd418qnQlpqhmEj6Jwl4dUF7UjiO37rtm6f7eXVUCHNrE3RN723lqK3hvFUPpz60xuw5z6r0h1NjYXJficxaXHdzXk0Js7uh33-CCc9R29_Jx_HjPhCNDCpdye2zaKKbxtbQmEoGe6xLSScSMsNF__paLnviVxkYsgaVftm5jQAtni-1LUJLbjNxLBFUOB5t13WnBzdNsj6UP1VVPQfmPpMNhTcd4N_jpdFfDFyBjIwYrmJ9l9Hsytlq0-EKDP3OXiYViVxkqHsxPInhaCb1O4kw3ongTX6DI75SfBp6KLSluisIYqFtdIoh1GKhl8c4NMk-EF2K7M5AKsPKLs_zckOg7u49qoGN912rOZeBykbEz3Luc7U7E5Zofg%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=86fe7e619692440f8989efacc8e89b51&_e=Vviod76U8wi0S_lH3qkbY0ZShK4NrR_Phj-s3kmf5xuEBqERPD4jbFmeiCTKbsPY5ETRpUGUCnO0PSbAmQktEaoTp_le7mM_4s-zFTlHPbGP0ipu4pCDT54YtMf7jfgx-ZPBVk_sNgNQLmYUnMSJn7dc_ImrBVXpZD58l7IBRpMaIELDt5ZUZSjpq7GsDBkpYUKgsFKfE9oM18W-pVKdNpiqc7Y9mcHPNKkVukYuHKjICK2HNRWKujVWeGzj2P8QuNPBIpTr8p0fiHD7Lq4TePVo7e3UtradgDlZ63A6nLew4sQ-CySsz1eWF2i3c3bKt0jQhcIHpLLRTm46MqJL0UUqv4DKt3EiqaYOLTNPErt6t-KNKb2fSNd7O00heDso_LqArw8qHUfbxnnIFge3SQ%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=86fe7e619692440f8989efacc8e89b51&_e=Vviod76U8wi0S_lH3qkbY0ZShK4NrR_Phj-s3kmf5xuEBqERPD4jbFmeiCTKbsPY5ETRpUGUCnO0PSbAmQktEaoTp_le7mM_4s-zFTlHPbGP0ipu4pCDT54YtMf7jfgx-ZPBVk_sNgNQLmYUnMSJn7dc_ImrBVXpZD58l7IBRpMaIELDt5ZUZSjpq7GsDBkpYUKgsFKfE9oM18W-pVKdNpiqc7Y9mcHPNKkVukYuHKjokJBkV-_gstGXYMrfUOBJSodcQV76XMwdYPS0HF6LW35KAjXkGfdKXbgAih7BGef_OHPc_N3WOkyrGFOMdxeeyYf8eY-2OIcIki5caOlcmIDk4Wx6FV4oBWd_lqmOHoHjzDC8DTc3zqxI_ASi8ncBNLIEqUue2gg05Rr9qJrBRw%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=86fe7e619692440f8989efacc8e89b51&_e=Vviod76U8wi0S_lH3qkbY0ZShK4NrR_Phj-s3kmf5xuEBqERPD4jbFmeiCTKbsPY5ETRpUGUCnO0PSbAmQktEaoTp_le7mM_4s-zFTlHPbGP0ipu4pCDT54YtMf7jfgx-ZPBVk_sNgNQLmYUnMSJn7dc_ImrBVXpZD58l7IBRpMaIELDt5ZUZSjpq7GsDBkpYUKgsFKfE9oM18W-pVKdNpiqc7Y9mcHPNKkVukYuHKiB7M6VsGF8bxjIF-B2PnDpCVHfZ2LPbLJMlx8NSf7wGWj6NceV6_v0Nu18r4dOMBDbcmysZ-QccMeHyrQnJmlBWQ6Ya7Uq6Em0HlQLnQToXQIAX4afnF7E8-vsYAXwRc5Jfdlxvw1VHeYr5mKvbCqu-smTTguCxoq3G0PEtOuOUQ%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

---

Conservative Liberty Wire
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=86fe7e619692440f8989efacc8e89b51&_t=sa0ooV5VWlmklCQtC4VK55N8SuK7FeHY-2IDIq7rThIDbA80JmvBVmdyFm8g2I7gjcw2H4U7RdP7M4pVmzyllnka1NptkSC3tiBQicSyHnpzcEW9B5EGuVXj_qsQDJBDcZQtMYI_oTNrh3nBdgkdYlI1X67fcG-zopu1mpyW9d0%3D)

_**Democrats just reserved more than 27 million dollars worth of attack ads against me this fall**_.

It's clearer than ever that _**my candidacy scares the Democrat powerbrokers in D.C**_. If I'm going to have a real shot at winning this race, I'm going to need every conservative donor in the country to get involved.
[**MAKE AN EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION ->** ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d09d2ba7465d445abece5ea1dead36cc&_e=In6Iy92cvQj5mn1wzMc_Auzi0rVEFJnCmpHGyx8fpCFj485s7qYNxXAZo3QlKMAogKRftao4X4WrxQdM8KBLTXC-tEV1Hzsc6y4IKQ5-ncPNCF5Y5OUolKlwx3uiUBr8zMYOaFaaVmkXG_JxvO-M7rzOX5O0TI8eKMmLgLJUc_609gCisw0hFv5REquHR0wgXjO1dbV_T6cZzYxDNksMBxjnoyLZl5D6J3-VzclcvUV2fu3YTg7zLS_nzvrQoEj9kb9Isz8_kf9Ip_AjMnhXsDOEsVptgfyBiNKDZfYRC7HdrRs-gunF5NEUR2xKCPNudhK5ia54M9-4v7kKWmI8bmrzelkSb3gw0GOxhnWSnOjI4Q6bF1nvTm7HXJmEZHaeXrO5xUnUgrk19rwYAGolOsApT0Btss9Mxkgmi7GzFo4%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

I've been saying since I got into this race that it would likely be one of - if not the - most expensive Senate matchup in 2024. This week, Washington Democrats announced they will spend - AT LEAST - **$27 million attacking me on TV in Montana this fall**.

It turns out my instinct was right. My Democrat opponent hasn't been in danger of losing his seat since he was elected in 2006. Now, with me in the race, Democrats are afraid there is a real risk of losing this critical Senate seat. **They said they 'd spend heavily to defeat me, and now we know that when it comes to the Montana Senate race, Democrats mean what they say**.

[**MAKE AN EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION ->** ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d09d2ba7465d445abece5ea1dead36cc&_e=In6Iy92cvQj5mn1wzMc_Auzi0rVEFJnCmpHGyx8fpCFj485s7qYNxXAZo3QlKMAogKRftao4X4WrxQdM8KBLTXC-tEV1Hzsc6y4IKQ5-ncPNCF5Y5OUolKlwx3uiUBr8zMYOaFaaVmkXG_JxvO-M7rzOX5O0TI8eKMmLgLJUc_609gCisw0hFv5REquHR0wgXjO1dbV_T6cZzYxDNksMBxjnoyLZl5D6J3-VzclcvUV2fu3YTg7zLS_nzvrQoEj9y9OA_P09cVIyyf2iEDUgUmviGhPZxJg6G-UJx3DmGzA8jOjuHNXDCws4B4x50wvRHtkTNuq8NuwTSktEn3bANU7lVuXqLv1CU3QZe4uMUEZQVEYGT1XjjoJTq_oNm_vqpLGJxLYpeYkPT0Tv0d9UQg5rZst_MMNURg946ZwiqKE%3D)
Here is where things stand:
1. Democrats have already spent more than **11 million dollars** to blunt my momentum and have earmarked an additional 27 million for the fall. But trust me, this is just the beginning.

1. Last quarter, my opponent raised 5.5 million dollars - a record - and his quarterly fundraising totals will only increase with each quarter that passes.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d09d2ba7465d445abece5ea1dead36cc&_e=In6Iy92cvQj5mn1wzMc_Auzi0rVEFJnCmpHGyx8fpCFj485s7qYNxXAZo3QlKMAogKRftao4X4WrxQdM8KBLTXC-tEV1Hzsc6y4IKQ5-ncPNCF5Y5OUolKlwx3uiUBr8zMYOaFaaVmkXG_JxvO-M7rzOX5O0TI8eKMmLgLJUc_609gCisw0hFv5REquHR0wgXjO1dbV_T6cZzYxDNksMBxjnoyLZl5D6J3-VzclcvUV2fu3YTg7zLS_nzvrQoEj94imv7zBiKQesklKY3yPvWhX4KyWg3mciJ6hnBgpfFqQlxFXb6hrl6qLXMA_hn2u5zPEvP0g-dr_FNDpvcqf67xTLWmIMVUKTMC00aNoxmgJGxMpKIUX8PgTKceTZOuhEDL8FfjTLniCJ-mtrKu4b2DSvicze4z09P1V8GopSFFE%3D)
[**MAKE AN EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION ->** ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d09d2ba7465d445abece5ea1dead36cc&_e=In6Iy92cvQj5mn1wzMc_Auzi0rVEFJnCmpHGyx8fpCFj485s7qYNxXAZo3QlKMAogKRftao4X4WrxQdM8KBLTXC-tEV1Hzsc6y4IKQ5-ncPNCF5Y5OUolKlwx3uiUBr8zMYOaFaaVmkXG_JxvO-M7rzOX5O0TI8eKMmLgLJUc_609gCisw0hFv5REquHR0wgXjO1dbV_T6cZzYxDNksMBxjnoyLZl5D6J3-VzclcvUV2fu3YTg7zLS_nzvrQoEj9JxmjWLKLroVOZrnHVVHhb623xTs-Hw2zP_9eosUo9C68dPePYnUeSCo2HFCJF_IeO_alpOMuJhAxXbHtssAYxanMV9Z6hN4vl8cCXg1pD-B4xqhGTA18EENz0J-THSQkju0Po2hc1n8ifYR9YpNfXu540al8Y11nGVL_FCxR-eo%3D)

Fellow Conservative, without your support, there is no way I will win this race. My opponent will spend and do whatever it takes to win another term - **even if that means destroying me, my family, and my business with his lies**.

I need to raise $10,000 by the end of the day today, or else I may never get ahead. If you've previously contributed to my campaign, I'm asking you to double your investment. **[If you've not yet contributed to my campaign, there is no better time than the present](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d09d2ba7465d445abece5ea1dead36cc&_e=In6Iy92cvQj5mn1wzMc_Auzi0rVEFJnCmpHGyx8fpCFj485s7qYNxXAZo3QlKMAogKRftao4X4WrxQdM8KBLTXC-tEV1Hzsc6y4IKQ5-ncPNCF5Y5OUolKlwx3uiUBr8zMYOaFaaVmkXG_JxvO-M7rzOX5O0TI8eKMmLgLJUc_609gCisw0hFv5REquHR0wgXjO1dbV_T6cZzYxDNksMBxjnoyLZl5D6J3-VzclcvUV2fu3YTg7zLS_nzvrQoEj9BPwHFqv6R8n3y6bQHv0ODKjuoDwtSt6fFgfHMaaJ5oiuNqhl5GJSb3OPaLhvRoYjdY-p6y4nYT8w84hukXqvO5cJFO9NVR4am-oSfBj8xEJs5OeMPy-Yh5HKLFUx9OUO3H4iGXAHjjfGA9HkISCxf86T1XgkW8AKumgGuVm-jyw%3D)**.

This race is far too important for any single conservative to sit on the sidelines and watch. **[We need you on the field](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d09d2ba7465d445abece5ea1dead36cc&_e=In6Iy92cvQj5mn1wzMc_Auzi0rVEFJnCmpHGyx8fpCFj485s7qYNxXAZo3QlKMAogKRftao4X4WrxQdM8KBLTXC-tEV1Hzsc6y4IKQ5-ncPNCF5Y5OUolKlwx3uiUBr8zMYOaFaaVmkXG_JxvO-M7rzOX5O0TI8eKMmLgLJUc_609gCisw0hFv5REquHR0wgXjO1dbV_T6cZzYxDNksMBxjnoyLZl5D6J3-VzclcvUV2fu3YTg7zLS_nzvrQoEj9lgps_jNB9IjdLWTzIdwGPei149TuYVmfe53S1cZcN_rk5SkgaRh-La8fPzpmmw3lSKsqH6TCXT-PyHImQnACl8aNAkXxUZ-tWM00qelD7h_SuMeu9K-8MbWRWHUfvU1z_EozsxzvK8wBC4y08Q67cQMWwAasyvJi-Tky4jxT0hs%3D)**.

If you can't donate today, that's OK, but please don't delete these messages or unsubscribe from my supporters list. Tim Sheehy

WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b5fda8b2630041cda0e748fde7f37d7c&_e=SzfcYWWwViyNgGnvjiV2HE-kmSQGde6jvojbaqu3-upvdQ-V1OHsc40Mv5FM68vRNTk8zaCLrJZ3UYXmJY5VjmjpRIFL7pcet1OZIkMpazsKnr22v1tNvrpqHNemctJVPvW1Qo5DhJOq9SlJENRVBv-LYE7fkRKBCLoCFkbG95znjCAGzy01GnKxv_sMQ2OxLWN8es3XaGaO0y1H2f0ImDOSiVg3M4IgkGc3dqS0xQw7jv-Hd7hS5HAL_QDN_-V_V8rGQRx-20_x_2JlP8V64432ayZPL09EstIBOHjxZ1EvkssQ6COa6ywPUjhNlVxlWuPTN49svgLHezFrc5j0NMwL9a0Iae_PP7NV1NMLBuj5KbgD5lZimUw6M50jyDgJm-jQPxowsbnYKDmjdXrCr9ihpPnU0KZPLYpUqEqTldY%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b5fda8b2630041cda0e748fde7f37d7c&_e=SzfcYWWwViyNgGnvjiV2HE-kmSQGde6jvojbaqu3-upvdQ-V1OHsc40Mv5FM68vRNTk8zaCLrJZ3UYXmJY5VjmjpRIFL7pcet1OZIkMpazsKnr22v1tNvrpqHNemctJVPvW1Qo5DhJOq9SlJENRVBv-LYE7fkRKBCLoCFkbG95znjCAGzy01GnKxv_sMQ2OxLWN8es3XaGaO0y1H2f0ImDOSiVg3M4IgkGc3dqS0xQw7jv-Hd7hS5HAL_QDN_-V_V8rGQRx-20_x_2JlP8V648KSoesZM411wRKN4SpH2n6VL5Y62RVopdl2_pJ-fYGq5ZJnTIIozxTZGXOE5WVIbfo_esyN_mZNvcYJ6IPGUO8el69SpcpPyz69ee8UgdcF11I-JkoWgcHq_aGeK2S37nQIOHDMAum_zMPmko43xFM%3D) That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b5fda8b2630041cda0e748fde7f37d7c&_e=SzfcYWWwViyNgGnvjiV2HE-kmSQGde6jvojbaqu3-upvdQ-V1OHsc40Mv5FM68vRNTk8zaCLrJZ3UYXmJY5VjmjpRIFL7pcet1OZIkMpazsKnr22v1tNvrpqHNemctJVPvW1Qo5DhJOq9SlJENRVBv-LYE7fkRKBCLoCFkbG95znjCAGzy01GnKxv_sMQ2OxLWN8es3XaGaO0y1H2f0ImDOSiVg3M4IgkGc3dqS0xQw7jv-Hd7hS5HAL_QDN_-V_V8rGQRx-20_x_2JlP8V64-28MGIPCsBzl44TdPA5eKsDWq9ulm8cTPu8a5CiRSA9DfwTw8uh31NIQByf1a1iC1zlKsaGA3RVm0k6l8z4FI2UhRy7zm5boArwdi3r1y3_LdtCnBuvUGC3CaaygmsT9_T-w69845QRAiwe_6NzV5w%3D)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Navy SEAL Alert
subject: Major Announcement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
27 million dollars. The amount of money Washington Democrats just announced they plan to spend against me this fall attacking me on TV.

|
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683156%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KeoblHwse8zXA6pxb3WW8g&sysid=1)

**_27 MILLION DOLLARS_**

_**Democrats just reserved more than 27 million dollars worth of attack ads against me this fall**_.

It’s clearer than ever that _**my candidacy scares the Democrat powerbrokers in D.C**_. If I’m going to have a real shot at winning this race, I’m going to need every conservative donor in the country to get involved.
[**MAKE AN EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION→** ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683157%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8JW1xqWV%2fuXmEWCN41N19Q&sysid=1)

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve been saying since I got into this race that it would likely be one of - if not the - most expensive Senate matchup in 2024. This week, Washington Democrats announced they will spend - AT LEAST - **$27 million attacking me on TV in Montana this fall**.

It turns out my instinct was right. My Democrat opponent hasn’t been in danger of losing his seat since he was elected in 2006. Now, with me in the race, Democrats are afraid there is a real risk of losing this critical Senate seat. **They said they’d spend heavily to defeat me, and now we know that when it comes to the Montana Senate race, Democrats mean what they say**.

[**MAKE AN EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION→** ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683157%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8JW1xqWV%2fuXmEWCN41N19Q&sysid=1)

Here is where things stand:
1. Democrats have already spent more than **11 million dollars** to blunt my momentum and have earmarked an additional 27 million for the fall. But trust me, this is just the beginning.

2. Last quarter, my opponent raised 5.5 million dollars - a record - and his quarterly fundraising totals will only increase with each quarter that passes.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683158%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sQyjEmGIrAiVFr0APVL3og&sysid=1)
[**MAKE AN EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION→** ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683157%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8JW1xqWV%2fuXmEWCN41N19Q&sysid=1)

Fellow Conservative, without your support, there is no way I will win this race. My opponent will spend and do whatever it takes to win another term - **even if that means destroying me, my family, and my business with his lies**.

I need to raise $10,000 by the end of the day today, or else I may never get ahead. If you’ve previously contributed to my campaign, I’m asking you to double your investment. **[If you’ve not yet contributed to my campaign, there is no better time than the present](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683159%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Z1EgHO2n9PwQokDZcw%2f1GQ&sysid=1)**.

This race is far too important for any single conservative to sit on the sidelines and watch. **[We need you on the field](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683150%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TSepHeLFYwkm3wQjfo1AzQ&sysid=1)**.

If you can’t donate today, that’s OK, but please don’t delete these messages or unsubscribe from my supporters list. In the coming months, you’ll hear more about this race with every passing day; it might not seem like a priority to you today, but when you realize that flipping the Senate depends on victory in Montana, perhaps you’ll **[consider sending us a contribution.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683151%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xFe0SFUjw2dHaxXLdsza0g&sysid=1)**

For America's Future,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

|
* * *

“
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683152%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m%2fhFeMkDO%2b%2bZmSJBME4Wdg&sysid=1)

* * *

| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xHC8xRPpJRWRz-DYyoYsVw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnp2k8P0SoaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtUk9OJnV0bV90Yz1ST04yLTIwMjQwMjA4VwNzcGNCCmXDSM3EZbx25FlSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. ---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xHC8xRPpJRWRz-DYyoYsVw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnp2k8P0SoaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtUk9OJnV0bV90Yz1ST04yLTIwMjQwMjA4VwNzcGNCCmXDSM3EZbx25FlSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---

I’d consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xHC8xRPpJRWRz-DYyoYsVw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnp2k8P0SoaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtUk9OJnV0bV90Yz1ST04yLTIwMjQwMjA4VwNzcGNCCmXDSM3EZbx25FlSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.

body:
Join us at one of these inspiring events for a powerful vision of a better future.

|
---
| | | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_7_24_rs_a2&n=1)
---
|
---
An Exclusive Preview to Memorable Experiences with RFK, Jr.!
From free voter rallies to exclusive private receptions, each event promises a unique opportunity to engage with RFK, Jr., hear his vision for the future, and get a memorable selfie with our future president!
Seize the moment and be part of an unforgettable experience! [RSVP now!](https://www.kennedy24.com/events?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_7_24_rs_a2&n=2)
|
* * *
---
Free Voter Rallies & Events
[Grand Rapids, Michigan](https://www.kennedy24.com/grand-rapids-voter-rally?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_7_24_rs_a2&n=3) \- Saturday, February 10th at 1:00 PM
Don't miss the thrilling opportunity to see RFK, Jr. discuss our efforts to secure a spot on the MI ballot and unveil his platform of truth and honesty. Join us for an event you won't want to miss!
[Brooklyn, New York](https://www.kennedy24.com/brooklyn-bhm-event?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_7_24_rs_a2&n=4) \- Sunday, February 18th at 1:30 PM
Come join us for a Black History Month celebration where Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. will present his plan for Black America. This event will feature a round table, African performers, and an interview with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. followed by Q&A.
|
* * *
---
Private Receptions & Events
[Jackson Hole, Wyoming](https://www.kennedy24.com/jackson-hole?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_7_24_rs_a2&n=5) \- Thursday, February 8th at 4:30 PM
The private reception with RFK, Jr. will include Jackson Hole’s finest wine and most delicious bites. Join us for a special Q&A session and get your picture with the future President!
[Livonia, Michigan](https://www.kennedy24.com/detroit-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_7_24_rs_a2&n=6) \- Saturday, February 10th at 6:30 PM
Experience an exclusive evening of support and connection at a private reception. Enjoy heavy hors d'oeuvres, cocktails, inspiring remarks, and a unique photo opportunity with RFK, Jr.
[Bergen County, New Jersey](https://www.kennedy24.com/bergen-county?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_7_24_rs_a2&n=7) \- Saturday, February 17th at 6:30 PM
Attend an exclusive event in the Metropolitan NYC area, offering a rare opportunity for an intimate Q&A session with RFK, Jr. with hors d’oeuvres, cocktails, and photo opportunities.
[Los Angeles, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/night-of-laughter-la?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_7_24_rs_a2&n=8) \- Wednesday, February 21rd at 7:30 PM
Experience an unforgettable evening of laughter as Cheryl Hines hosts "A Night of Laughter with RFK, Jr." Secure your tickets now to enjoy performances by Tim Dillon, Rob Schneider, and more!
[Newport Beach, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/newport-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_7_24_rs_a2&n=9) \- Saturday, February 24th at 7:30 PM
Join us at a private venue in the heart of Newport Beach for a special event. Experience an intimate Q&A session with RFK, Jr. while enjoying hors d'oeuvres, cocktails, and memorable photo opportunities.
[Las Vegas, Nevada](https://www.kennedy24.com/march-las-vegas-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_7_24_rs_a2&n=10) \- Friday, March 8th at 6:00 PM
Please join Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. and Cheryl Hines at this in-person fundraising event which includes hors d’ oeuvres and cocktails, remarks from the candidate, Q&A, and a photo opportunity.
[Austin, Texas](https://www.kennedy24.com/austin-private-dinner?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_7_24_rs_a2&n=11) \- Friday, March 15th at 6:30 PM
Along with a very special dinner with RFK, Jr., this exclusive gathering includes business leaders, entrepreneurs, leading podcast hosts, media personalities, celebrities, and industry influencers.
|

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3cb7c17eaa894e25af106987f7b4bf8b&_e=qmuUEGM9GVLMZFGP6qsuI3aqJyi3cdKOAqN4Gw351q4yKaGuype75HjARQNoz6i8Lre2aHJtm3nnqpEoAFjQUQ-x9lIsQfvixHiMgE_99FDXmwESP3_11vk-TSSQUGcPj8bYraJIwRIAL4jfnJyXAhhVn2n5UTBXH-3Z1tBcM_IQL0fraAajyKHd0-mucEy_0gFu1q_GzB_qFkfMLGjhqgHm1pJhUiMsMyISYzR-P3FVjuMbIyZIocngCVgVWy9C31-QNQdbr-BkGD4RQL_pg8B0vaNygaUpsN1Axz3WEi-kLqofVkS1Y6WINR1MTeaWPpBPxgKBVzW10226B6x90hhnwgfvk8ZQfl5zm34mhkFJCy7jB-f3KF6JayfjFqaPYDuatAy3kCwqfs19x-xFiw%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3cb7c17eaa894e25af106987f7b4bf8b&_e=qmuUEGM9GVLMZFGP6qsuI3aqJyi3cdKOAqN4Gw351q4yKaGuype75HjARQNoz6i8Lre2aHJtm3nnqpEoAFjQUQ-x9lIsQfvixHiMgE_99FDXmwESP3_11vk-TSSQUGcPj8bYraJIwRIAL4jfnJyXAhhVn2n5UTBXH-3Z1tBcM_IQL0fraAajyKHd0-mucEy_0gFu1q_GzB_qFkfMLGjhqgHm1pJhUiMsMyISYzR-P3GZ--yBKp8j6ulJKmclBwggZW2V1Thm8st_Vd4DvCy8qX9qlIxm9x982r7cX7qyxz3Lj70hneN86Yk6ozExSCLLic6bX2tZo5M6zF8DKjACs4dpGLOyYewlK41uhcMLVuFUhtROaTHNZvGX7YxhRQyjvnQFHUZMyLXtXKAhejT4AA%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3cb7c17eaa894e25af106987f7b4bf8b&_e=qmuUEGM9GVLMZFGP6qsuI3aqJyi3cdKOAqN4Gw351q4yKaGuype75HjARQNoz6i8Lre2aHJtm3nnqpEoAFjQUQ-x9lIsQfvixHiMgE_99FDXmwESP3_11vk-TSSQUGcPj8bYraJIwRIAL4jfnJyXAhhVn2n5UTBXH-3Z1tBcM_IQL0fraAajyKHd0-mucEy_0gFu1q_GzB_qFkfMLGjhqgHm1pJhUiMsMyISYzR-P3GJDWz0MqCwvwFW5KJoD50Q_gXEIKV1UzUySqzLGlzk9K6UBaOLMgQceYfObeibUIJmefJdfsH7ifShZpcY2ONgRdkJ8L0qAyDbibpCJav_ByQHBamC-jIG7_bWXBWCVyWlfe58mUvbwXd4dfWMHIzhSaidTmRyY3lfeQC4SAZvaA%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Defend the Constitution
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=3cb7c17eaa894e25af106987f7b4bf8b&_t=fr2g6UnbFQLlNMsBKU_1oiMizlPfDZQ9AqHI_1k7s6d3hU05SVXo6cJ0XsEoks58W2sT4zqdqaI2s11rI5JrnU5HuyMxoILpIMnT2yoC0g--IAysxB64hvAtlU4OHHzzPld_5hL4Rq_kje0iuHAq8Oe8timaltUTdrk8NpulZZs%3D)

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: I am sweating BULLETS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is the worst possible news at the worst possible time.

I’M SWEATING BULLETS OVER HERE, FOLKS!!!

Future Forward Joe Biden’s top Super PAC just pledged 250 million dollars in a last-ditch effort to DESTROY my father’s America First agenda. They’re unloading 140 million dollars on TV and 110 million dollars online to HAMMER seven key battleground states with anti-Trump propaganda.

Fox News called it the “largest ad purchase in US history,” and it’s aimed directly at my father and his closest allies in the final phase of the election.

This is the worst possible news at the worst possible time. It comes just days after finding out Congressional Democrats outraised Republicans to the tune of 25 million dollars.

We have never needed you more. So as an emergency countermeasure, I’m teaming up with my friend, Majority Leader Steve Scalise, to set a goal of raising two million dollars between now and the end of the month. https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683176%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=trIQZ37XTTbT504K%2b1ZgMA&sysid=1

Yes, it’s dawned on me that this is our most ambitious fundraising target yet

But if we can’t convince everyone reading this to pitch in a few bucks, our chances of reinstating my father as president, saving our Conservative House Majority, and winning back the Senate will drop like a LEAD BALLOON!

So with all due respect, would you be willing to step up right here and right now?

>" class="buttonstyles" conversion="false" data-linkto="https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683177%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jWs%2bXcWVJ2mq0NLPzDKaFg&sysid=1" href="https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683176%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=trIQZ37XTTbT504K%2b1ZgMA&sysid=1" style=" font-size: 20px; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; color: #FFFFFF; text-align: center; text-decoration: none; font-weight: bold; display: block; background-color: #A82008; border: 2px outset #A82008; padding: 8px 20px; border-radius: 6px; -moz-border-radius: 6px; -webkit-border-radius: 6px;" target="_blank" title="Yes, Add Five Bucks >>">Yes, Add Five Bucks >>

>" class="buttonstyles" conversion="false" data-linkto="https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683177%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jWs%2bXcWVJ2mq0NLPzDKaFg&sysid=1" href="https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683176%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=trIQZ37XTTbT504K%2b1ZgMA&sysid=1" style=" font-size: 20px; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; color: #FFFFFF; text-align: center; text-decoration: none; font-weight: bold; display: block; background-color: #A82008; border: 2px outset #A82008; padding: 8px 23px; border-radius: 6px; -moz-border-radius: 6px; -webkit-border-radius: 6px;" target="_blank" title="Yes, Add Ten Bucks >>">Yes, Add Ten Bucks >>

>" class="buttonstyles" conversion="false" data-linkto="https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683177%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jWs%2bXcWVJ2mq0NLPzDKaFg&sysid=1" href="https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683176%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=trIQZ37XTTbT504K%2b1ZgMA&sysid=1" style=" font-size: 20px; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; color: #FFFFFF; text-align: center; text-decoration: none; font-weight: bold; display: block; background-color: #A82008; border: 2px outset #A82008; padding: 8px 19px; border-radius: 6px; -moz-border-radius: 6px; -webkit-border-radius: 6px;" target="_blank" title="Yes, Add Fifty Bucks >>">Yes, Add Fifty Bucks >>

>" class="buttonstyles" conversion="false" data-linkto="https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683177%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jWs%2bXcWVJ2mq0NLPzDKaFg&sysid=1" href="https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683176%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=trIQZ37XTTbT504K%2b1ZgMA&sysid=1" style=" font-size: 20px; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; color: #FFFFFF; text-align: center; text-decoration: none; font-weight: bold; display: block; background-color: #A82008; border: 2px outset #A82008; padding: 8px 23px; border-radius: 6px; -moz-border-radius: 6px; -webkit-border-radius: 6px;" target="_blank" title="Yes, Add Even More >>">Yes, Add Even More >>

Please do not underestimate how urgent this is.

Mike Johnson, Elise Stefanik, James Comer, Newt Gingrich, and Byron Donalds have all contacted you recently because this is the single most important election in American history.

And by all accounts, this race could be decided by a handful of must-win battleground states. We absolutely cannot let them be plastered WALL-TO-WALL with Fake News and anti-Trump propaganda without having our own message cut through the BS.

We need a show of strength like our movement has never seen before it’s the ONLY WAY we can stop a complete Liberal takeover of our country. Please step up right now to make your mark on history! https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683176%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=trIQZ37XTTbT504K%2b1ZgMA&sysid=1

Thanks for all you do for your country,
Donald Trump Jr.

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683176%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=trIQZ37XTTbT504K%2b1ZgMA&sysid=1

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683178%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AP%2fGyyLtx9QtIRTMYJEZJw&sysid=1

This is Steve Scalise.

As your Majority Leader, I’m respectfully asking you to fill out my MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683178%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AP%2fGyyLtx9QtIRTMYJEZJw&sysid=1 at your earliest convenience. Good morning, Peter.
Sorry for reaching out first thing in the morning. I’m up early looking over our fundraising numbers while drinking my coffee.
My team just crunched the numbers, we’re still $13,758 short of our mid-month goal—and we only have until 11:59PM to make things right.
We’ve done a good job of closing the gap over the past couple of days, and I truly appreciate how this team showed up for us. But truthfully, I’m worried about hitting our goal.

I need you to step up in this critical moment: If just 3,444 supporters split a donation between Blue Amp Action and Tom Suozzi before midnight, we’ll be able to rush the necessary resources in the final leg of this race, ensure our ads reach every critical voter and bring this win home. By retaking New York’s Third Congressional District after George Santos brought shame to the halls of Congress for far too long we will send a clear message to extreme Republicans: your days in power are numbered. Can I count on you to help me prove just how strong Democrats are by splitting $10 between Blue Amp Action and Tom before midnight? Fellow Conservative,

It’s former **Navy SEAL and current U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy** with a brief warning for you today: The Supreme Court is on the verge of allowing states to kick President Trump off their ballots.

The result of a **Supreme Court** verdict barring a former commander-in-chief from running for public office would be both horrific and historic. Never in the history of our Republic has one individual been more vilified than **Donald J. Trump.**

**My opponent wants Trump off the ballot** because he knows with President Trump at the top of the ticket, he’ll lose his seat in the Senate.

[**ADD YOUR NAME ->**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=7fcbe1f41cec403abf3d0076ce8c0484&_e=xZOVXS1lmtBEp4zPNUlR750BDuwwbC0T5x8b6KU3VcbnPh7F7jzz2-4Xec18bPQQdghxKfsHseG9G7XS0Dd2DEuUfgDxS3dAY78fARQFUtQ7ChAGvcVGI1BHMJ74cFfl9-dmIBh_toytcNrXE4N6eeV4cejgpnJvljKH1Wc_YQk1mHIJdC187-euKavp6otQFRZyT5UZO8mI028B-ZH6Tq9yXC5espwhy6nGhZUCDSg1a8fkpqHmSl9IxTR95JQ5WTviZo0KbTnZNhmb56EBCg_19LERVadVjfD6e1v5YDY0LtnkvEEgvHfNHK6sGzhMvoH3QdrwlocVxwg2GlXR37blaikyCj4JrYDiXIaIcuWTbaX19QuyHHaG0VrbEpG96oNxg73xMQQxfvDCj1Oj_QZmxiqPYWVw9LoM08Ukocl3DK1CMt8exfu1xadFynGy)
**National Democrats want President Trump off** the ballot because they know that if he’s given a fair shot at winning back the White House, he’ll have next to no trouble beating Joe Biden.

**As a Navy SEAL** , I have a knack for reading people, and I can tell you that having met President Trump, he is a patriot through and through.**Donald Trump LOVES America** , and we cannot let Democrats remove him from the ballot because they know they can’t beat him.

_**I’m working to gather at least 1 million signatures before Trump appears before the Supreme Court TODAY, urging them to smack down the sham effort to remove Trump from your ballot in November.**_

[**ADD YOUR NAME ->**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=7fcbe1f41cec403abf3d0076ce8c0484&_e=xZOVXS1lmtBEp4zPNUlR750BDuwwbC0T5x8b6KU3VcbnPh7F7jzz2-4Xec18bPQQdghxKfsHseG9G7XS0Dd2DEuUfgDxS3dAY78fARQFUtQ7ChAGvcVGI1BHMJ74cFfl9-dmIBh_toytcNrXE4N6eeV4cejgpnJvljKH1Wc_YQk1mHIJdC187-euKavp6otQFRZyT5UZO8mI028B-ZH6Tq9yXC5espwhy6nGhZUCDSg1a8fkpqHmSl9IxTR95JQ5WTviZo0KbTnZNhmb56EBCss4CdIJhx97kZyYgPJsKIXfUtOs_8FUU7cJzRCrAbpd58G2dT1VFGlEt7aSXTqkOUX5kvXFM948SIdU6oNrZdAPjtWRbKSbLrEWJFCUPFtHlAtOI256DLNoGnuurTmQZIwFqTXaRi2FhWyraE9kGHsXLO5EE82fV2fFfZivkOIz)
Please Stand with President Trump by **[signing my NATIONAL PETITION](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=7fcbe1f41cec403abf3d0076ce8c0484&_e=xZOVXS1lmtBEp4zPNUlR750BDuwwbC0T5x8b6KU3VcbnPh7F7jzz2-4Xec18bPQQdghxKfsHseG9G7XS0Dd2DEuUfgDxS3dAY78fARQFUtQ7ChAGvcVGI1BHMJ74cFfl9-dmIBh_toytcNrXE4N6eeV4cejgpnJvljKH1Wc_YQk1mHIJdC187-euKavp6otQFRZyT5UZO8mI028B-ZH6Tq9yXC5espwhy6nGhZUCDSg1a8fkpqHmSl9IxTR95JQ5WTviZo0KbTnZNhmb56EBCseHQ7oQHVGZAqrZjqU4eY9u81KC699s2kJ9TYRkBIOOBfAaBuoM2dyfK9lOaqLk3ASLyd2F65kzxS3iyBrPrN1qNI_E39qilU3DKqHJG4SsAPrz8NMZbyQ-0W7KCUu3c__O8sAx6phLP56_i0yY073SaJSvgp8eEsLPdXTyK_FA)** telling the Supreme Court to instruct ALL 50 STATES to allow President Trump’s name to appear on your ballot this November.

For America's Future,

Tim Sheehy

clean_body: Former U.S. attorney thinks it's “likely” Trump will be disqualified from the Ballot. | | - Fellow Conservative, It’s former Navy SEAL and current U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy with a brief warning for you today: The Supreme Court is on the verge of allowing states to kick President Trump off their ballots. The result of a Supreme Court verdict barring a former commander-in-chief from running for public office would be both horrific and historic. Never in the history of our Republic has one individual been more vilified than Donald J. Trump. My opponent wants Trump off the ballot because he knows with President Trump at the top of the ticket, he’ll lose his seat in the Senate. National Democrats want President Trump off the ballot because they know that if he’s given a fair shot at winning back the White House, he’ll have next to no trouble beating Joe Biden. As a Navy SEAL , I have a knack for reading people, and I can tell you that having met President Trump, he is a patriot through and through.Donald Trump LOVES America , and we cannot let Democrats remove him from the ballot because they know they can’t beat him. I’m working to gather at least 1 million signatures before Trump appears before the Supreme Court TODAY, urging them to smack down the sham effort to remove Trump from your ballot in November. Please Stand with President Trump by telling the Supreme Court to instruct ALL 50 STATES to allow President Trump’s name to appear on your ballot this November. name: Steve Garvey
subject: Help me strike out Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmikntim414p3nfsrcuqvgodfpmrn7p4uunnbhrg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c5i61o72c5h2bs)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrh4if7qg93i3vep2eo8cul9q49f6e63ffubsr2g_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c5i61o72c5h2bs)** That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today.**[Will you step up and help strike out this “lineup of liberals” through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zidh6qj7uguebmjaqbv8mp6sd754hvc0rda0cn50_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c5i61o72c5h2bs)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2mjetcmh3n9dug103eaib8d7rt1t4uf0j33mecg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c5i61o72c5h2bs)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I’d consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuqsrmuuvrqap96cspne762oqupoob5ifkuifn20_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c5i61o72c5h2bs)** With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate
---
|
---
| | [**DONATE**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjdi39voof2he9c1a264ph3i20ui95i9u3fcu36o_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c5i61o72c5h2bs)
---
| | |
---
|
---
**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California.I’ve been fortunate to wear many hats in life – from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference.In baseball, it’s not about the individual; it’s about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It’s time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.
---
[**More About Me**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdtusk9tbeghgvfpmflg3hs6fp4h657hghpkrqd0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c5i61o72c5h2bs)
---

---

But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference.In baseball, it’s not about the individual; it’s about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It’s time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future. | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PO Box 532389Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389 | | | Trump Train News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Biden-Harris Dems
subject: $1. What do you say?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
The donation we’re asking you to make before midnight tonight. | | |
---
. That is the contribution Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are asking you to make before midnight tonight. Yes, just $1. for every time you've been grateful Joe Biden beat Donald Trump in the 2020 election. to make sure we defeat Donald Trump in November. because while we are facing many millions in attack ads, it's your individual donations that allow us to fight back. | We are excited to invite you to an upcoming event hosted by Greater Georgia in partnership with Blexit Georgia and Let's Win for America: The New Conservative Coalition: Black Leaders of Georgia.
Moderated by Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler, this fireside chat will highlight the power and priorities of black voters ahead of the 2024 election. Featured panelists include:
State Representative Mesha Mainor Albany City Commissioner Jalen Johnson Let's Win for America Chairman Kelvin King Blexit City Director Michaelah Montgomery
Polls - as recently as [this week](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FYgc-CyPRiQ9yv16DhRl0XBbGi7Eke4GhPNQFM-pmYt-c8nkiXSBSndcw_mfnLTHWjgd1c3_VZ9wo188H3xLlcBRfJnhDCaVFlIlXQi78caz0Qsl9hS1Iv0ilakBo5VDkkCqdMUQnFBG7sIkA4aOLZJMHvy1UVrHu_kPclQzhrqmlJeb24VHXNEPwqR6hZI2mWK1XKDBCbVFqo5EkGiVEU77mx4aDjqbMW_XKsvSYFQ=&c=_zNhaOqagvxrl34qiKmDU_qOeuPNiCBUb4YvashkUDcZ9z3-I-OcSg==&ch=ov-vtGQ87Edf0OGlyslXB06IDJCMpprLWzU4FlDP6Tcc73n6MKsNAg==) \- show that Democrat support from black voters has shrunk by twenty percent over the last three years. We'll discuss all this and more - in an insightful, open, and honest conversation ahead of November.
Free food and drinks will be provided. Please RSVP by clicking the button below!

subject: We can’t let my multi-millionaire opponent buy this race

body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8WZMr7r4_z9xL6bWBjqzGIXZ0XksB-YrElTSY-7mShSGtDSgRMu4W0wXWkaPGroMa7wOnJvrEZJagx29f2n5Rr_Ysphv9P0hhE5jo3FUG9BGkuDtXMCTu3JJSwblLlDhpWRhNecJQtXIUxV5IJjEiLmt5my3siJymhJvwNBB_6pdxEQwygpYSRPzEP3f_8NVJQh33zgFmOsRPN58IFvJOjssEsMEMpqA2f_H_QArdkHM_Q3yQm2lqMC1dRqP_xi9sfg_dgjaVIdomlMmVVukqhEdkATSFI0fZB2wEa0wc98EM9xRKK2jyH0GJviN0INwNlXn_KAwDSjo8u4OjH1THtWfzaB3CYqQM6ZngAr8Zo-6/43o/UCHS3UJTSoiyfLjZ7iTUKA/h0/Ic4FzcYdpVeeFQx9IkIQKySmix-K7URef_fpoJZZDIg) | | [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x7ESlwpd39wyaaM2DOMklJKRB-czn2GC2HDE6ruHwxo4o3MEOFHqQauDkwBg44tFVe5jVbOu0bRNsR_FpIAcib3ZpoTf8bHKUNuLzkOjXVtqK8Zc9pxcRnSEdR8HGH0nUIoc5MxfwS7LRByXEqNlqi-1PFGCoix8vEr0hL-oIKQ4Xf2git2sARnM7nR2P8HtTpwo5FqjzZBcjIIbcIoTNTH1hulp6QANNSAhsqftQnHbLhkCE-89ygqWeWvVLgrofhUQeKimsoHbHvuyD2sksb06yaVlcLFs3HwMOZxi4PdgRsB8WdXmGpoGauAh6FaetDetfTC75W0UjyMnx6Fc-KsORhAEuvNciHrheLhVOT_iKkAuqRI5IIqaRC1id5zmayqEMvwGdxQJKNjqt3ACFJOUVHQt3wn0H0qPBr3b02JYEVkJ1zjQYz2s5vnhV4TxE/43o/UCHS3UJTSoiyfLjZ7iTUKA/h1/YxR-0bRt9ccUwia8VmMeabwD5LMu9ZhE9p8nEFIRsSU)
Peter, we know that my opponent is a multi-millionaire who’s able to bankroll his own campaign — but if you think about it, here’s what that actually means:

**He thinks he can buy this election.**

In fact, he’s already spent *checks notes* _**more than $30 million of his own money**_ on ads, talking to the same voters we _need_ to reach in order to win.

It’s a massive financial advantage, Peter, but I’d still much rather be running a campaign like ours than like his. [Before I explain why, can I count on you to split a donation between my Maryland Senate campaign and The Collective PAC ASAP? ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x7ESlwpd39wyaaM2DOMklJKRB-czn2GC2HDE6ruHwxo44gv3gJoKfTlbI1O26LOnjRFpte9kJqbNTWNxUHwcoMa2vi9nvCCZCRTlBQqPYPMZcG2VU7gSerzc0xDe8g-Yq1PQN0cvRtkCKsEFkrVcExnoF1l0jR2bCSYcnRBQcTmvDU8KFhTgAdnxzmCIbBHdgYlYnqSliTrZ2FYGZxu7gs8oC2V18vPGsI37RBQQJ9Hg2aa5T0M7AWPIwpVqlGj2o2alk5xoB8tmCJxY6Ad9NQLVWj87-0rQQdGtG9JuREcDQnydt1yMpy9QzJPCAZ2bs1ftfSF9EjrdlU2RBOuYIFl3k9wwI1z4sfE4BVKb0mSnALdCxPpyNqtoFJLJedEhuYx7kJRB95h041iDr5x0ZXoMd4MbnufAMqqMGpJWdFfLAZT5PtWiQZQM0yzn_iN3I/43o/UCHS3UJTSoiyfLjZ7iTUKA/h2/JpcuVLfBWlwTHeTMd2bd6vNe7PWT3Z6WJYm22wk8imk) | | [RUSH A DONATION](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x7ESlwpd39wyaaM2DOMklJKRB-czn2GC2HDE6ruHwxo44gv3gJoKfTlbI1O26LOnjRFpte9kJqbNTWNxUHwcoMa2vi9nvCCZCRTlBQqPYPMZcG2VU7gSerzc0xDe8g-Yq1PQN0cvRtkCKsEFkrVcExnoF1l0jR2bCSYcnRBQcTmvDU8KFhTgAdnxzmCIbBHdgvD4mqCrK0mfBZYKrXa5Dk4xbA9rUhAv_L6Xh5WoTlJpSn1j5hSTMu_1Ps571r5NBwa0UmWbTm9yT0ZjSupGejtpjP3eiQ3pBPEALCGQaqa2ETU8I_wYCDMai7ENym5k_D08dthc3pbx6a1-YZlWEai5BSOCKj9-6mgco5ymdPdDDkc0DkLBTK6b6n6PV4EeUiY6Rl05flIwTWkFwsKq3GUBZrthtnY31HnV3__vrpJtLRoMvCK5_wCXuvIWJxaLg/43o/UCHS3UJTSoiyfLjZ7iTUKA/h3/aLGdHyG17ciWbDTqQ_W6LbNzwAxiLrwzl6LPDpQ3MiI)

The truth of the matter is that stories like mine don’t usually make it to the Senate. The average U.S. Senator is 64 years old and a multi-millionaire. _It’s time we change that._

We should all be able to look at the Senate and see ourselves reflected. And that’s why this grassroots movement means everything to me. Our stories deserve representation. And I’ll fight every day to make it so.

_Look, Peter, the last thing our country needs right now is another multi-millionaire buying a seat in the U.S. Senate._

[And with an ambitious February fundraising goal, I need this grassroots team more than ever to equip our team with the resources to fight back and win this Senate race. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, we know that my opponent is a multi-millionaire who’s able to bankroll his own campaign — but if you think about it, here’s what that actually means: He thinks he can buy this election. In fact, he’s already spent checks notes more than $30 million of his own money on ads, talking to the same voters we need to reach in order to win. It’s a massive financial advantage, Peter, but I’d still much rather be running a campaign like ours than like his. | | The truth of the matter is that stories like mine don’t usually make it to the Senate. The average U.S. Senator is 64 years old and a multi-millionaire. It’s time we change that. We should all be able to look at the Senate and see ourselves reflected. And that’s why this grassroots movement means everything to me. Our stories deserve representation. And I’ll fight every day to make it so. Look, Peter, the last thing our country needs right now is another multi-millionaire buying a seat in the U.S. Senate. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Angela Alsobrooks and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Let’s do this! —Angela Alsobrooks The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from The Collective PAC, please .

A **jaw-dropping increase of $114.3 BILLION** in our national debt! It's time for patriots like you to take a stand and safeguard your financial future. **A Financial Crisis by Biden's Inaction:**
In a stark departure from the past, the Federal Reserve, which once operated with a surplus, is now hemorrhaging losses. These losses, my fellow Americans, are **being passed on to you** , the hardworking citizens, as the Treasury is forced to issue more debt to cover the Federal Reserve's shortfalls. In 2023, following an inflation-driven surge in the federal funds rate, the **Fed began hemorrhaging money at an alarming rate.** **Your Financial Survival is at Stake:**

Friend – you're on my list of the most engaged grassroots Democrats across the country. **That’s why I’m personally reaching out to ask you to take my new Senate Strategy Survey.**
Experts say that Nevada could once again decide Senate control. And according to recent reports, national Republicans are ALL IN to flip this seat: Mitch McConnell _handpicked_ a far-right wacko to run against incumbent Jacky Rosen – and he’s backed by a shady MAGA billionaire who’s already dumped $2 MILLION into his efforts to turn Nevada red.

I made a list of what I thought were the most engaged Democrats to participate in my exclusive Senate Strategy Survey. But with the midnight deadline approaching, I’m still waiting for your response. Our survey results will be incomplete unless we receive your input from TN before the midnight deadline, so please: | | Thanks for doing your part to help Democrats defend Nevada and the Senate. – James Carville \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Carville, James Date: Wed, Feb 7, 2024 Subject: You’re on my list, friend | | | Friend – you're on my list of the most engaged grassroots Democrats across the country. body:
Republican voters are still throwing their support behind Trump and his MAGA agenda. A Trump victory tonight will push him one step closer to the nomination – and potentially even the White House. | | |

---|---

clean_body: Republican voters are still throwing their support behind Trump and his MAGA agenda. A Trump victory tonight will push him one step closer to the nomination – and potentially even the White House. | | | | | ---|--- After holding their non-binding primary earlier this week, Nevada Republicans are holding a binding caucus tonight. Let’s get one thing clear: Donald Trump is almost guaranteed to sweep the caucuses. It’s obvious that Republican voters are still throwing their support behind Trump and his MAGA agenda. A Trump victory tonight will push him one step closer to the nomination – and potentially even the White House. Donald Trump winning again is a huge threat to our democracy. After every new victory, his state-level allies get a boost to their campaigns, putting them in a stronger position to win this November. If they win, fundamental freedoms like abortion access and voting rights will be at greater risk. That’s why grassroots Democrats in your state and across the country are pouring in donations to defeat Trump’s right-wing allies and BLOCK his ultra-MAGA agenda from gaining ground in our statehouses: | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thank you, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by DLCC PAC. name: Mike Soboleski for Congress
subject: Endorsements for Mike Soboleski for Congress
body:
28 Endorsements for Mike
| | | | Thank You Everyone for the Support - Mike
---
|
---
| Mike Picks Up 28 Endorsements for February!
---
| I am so incredibly humbled and grateful to my friends and colleagues for their endorsements of our campaign for Congress. We have 28 total endorsements so far! The list includes 25 legislators currently in office, including two Senators. Endorsers also include retired Chief of Police and former Representative Dick Pickett, Franklin County Commissioner Bob Carleton and Franklin County Sheriff Scott Nichols.
The support we have received so far is incredible! It is proof that our campaign has the winning message and principles to beat Jared Golden in November. With the support of these great people and YOU we will win and bring conservative values back Maine CD2.
I just wanted to take a minute to share the great news with you. I'll be hitting as many Republican caucuses as I can this weekend, so if you are able try to make it out to one in your area. Get out and make your voice heard. It is time for the silent majority to be silent no longer. Together we can do this!
Our message of border security, fiscal responsibility, economic prosperity and defending our God given rights is resonating all over the State of Maine. My 100% Conservative rating from CPAC reflects my voting record and our list of endorsements proves that. I love this state with all my heart, and it would be my honor to represent you in Washington, DC. It is truly humbling and energizing to receive such support from people I truly respect. Thank you to everyone for all of the support it is most appreciated.
I can't wait to see you on the campaign trail!
Mike Soboleski
---
| | SHARE
---
---
| |
---

**Democrats are doing everything they can to keep President Trump out of the 2024 Presidential election** ...from begging the courts to kick him off the ballot to pushing “gag orders” to try to silence him.

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

clean_body: | | | Fellow American, 302,000. That’s how many illegal migrant encounters there were at our Southern border in December alone. It’s horrifying, but unfortunately, it’s not shocking. Joe Biden has completely lost control of our border - and instead of letting willing states bring back law and order, he's threatening to shoot down their citizens for defending law abiding Americans. I stand with Texas and Governor Abbott in their mission to secure our border and help keep Texans - and all Americans - safe. Fellow American, as a former Green Beret, I fought to protect Americans from foreign enemies every day. But never did I think we’d have to defend our citizens from foreign criminals on our soil - let alone with the federal government REFUSING to do anything about it. Countries have laws and countries have borders, and right now, Joe Biden is upholding neither. It’s up to Republicans in Congress and across the country to step up when our so-called Commander in Chief won’t, and I’m counting on you. Thank you, Pat Harrigan | | Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee | | Pat Harrigan is a former member of the U.S. Army. name: Seth Magaziner (personal)
subject: Rhode Island celebrates Black History Month
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress
body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=%2BbFSvflpG6CPL0NW6cVU7zLWpdet1Nc1T3Lh%2F6zeTIaL2D%2F6QOkFppqJFjA9zW%2Ba7i5Rpy0MJwT3Fmu%2Bb5YDtSt4IG3H1Hx7L7BdIbqNlsRtV0I8siCqcioQuCCvdEm8vsq7V3O%2FoQBweVGwv8EdVx7seSrOpfwthcsrpP5w9X4W3POfYuGAjh%2FdAlZAbbNjzNIg9kpwt5LyBXj0DwExDZuISlJjVdstS6OZGb4hDcxTdmxbuW7s5u8XPQad%2F4EGB9Qh3emMND56diG6te2jJPYhll2lUPkBq8DX2x%2B7GcMb1wj7z1pgiI%2FQDrOf61PK9AWyGyzdP6AEMYw7y%2BbKw7rB8hJVNyUBCw7yHrJfjcRDI7qkGjfaXFFIOutK%2BoQB0YY4LhYhTN4J632%2F0BefDCbVPZ95681DErRscenfutKISTBb16gFscProZD1CKr7)
---
| |
---
Hi Peter,

February is Black History Month, and I’m proud to stand with Black Rhode Islanders as we celebrate their achievements in the face of historic and ongoing discrimination.

African Americans have made innumerable contributions to our state. Black Rhode Islanders formed the 1st Rhode Island Regiment to help our nation win its independence during the Revolutionary War and have continued to serve in our armed forces at a disproportionately high rate. Rhode Island’s history, economy and culture have been shaped by African Americans; their stories and triumphs are central to our state and nation’s identity.

We still have a long way to go in the pursuit of equity and equal opportunity. From mass incarceration to gun violence, Black Rhode Islanders are faced with institutional obstacles. As we celebrate this important month, we must remain cognizant of the work we have yet to accomplish. I hope you’ll join me in taking a few minutes to contemplate how racial prejudice has played a role in your community as we recognize and celebrate our Black friends and neighbors.

Thank you,

Seth

subject: Tucker Carlson's Putin interview
body:
Carlson has a long history of cheerleading Putin's authoritarianism to his right-wing, American audience.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78628072/453975976/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTlkNTg5ZWEtOTZjNi1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7WPgOKz0W9pJddUczIiJzbJeUZuPt5YGrvNGsFU3zpQ=&emci=b8985374-95c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=19d589ea-96c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=14016711)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78628077/453975980/-593472309?refcode=20240208_EM_Tucker+Putin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTlkNTg5ZWEtOTZjNi1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7WPgOKz0W9pJddUczIiJzbJeUZuPt5YGrvNGsFU3zpQ=)
Peter,
Tonight, Tucker Carlson will air an exclusive interview with Vladimir Putin. If you think the interview will be hard-hitting, think again. From his time at Fox News to his new show on "X," Carlson has a long history of cheerleading Putin's authoritarianism to his right-wing, American audience.
That includes arguing that the U.S. should support Russia's invasion of Ukraine and labeling President Volodymyr Zelenskyy as a dictator. It also includes praising Russia's "traditional values." Those values include Russia's abuse of LGBTQ+ rights.
Peter, Carlson may be what Putin and the KGB call a "useful idiot," but he's an idiot with a large platform to spread an alarming amount of Russian propaganda and misinformation. **In fact, his “X” video announcing the Putin interview reached 100 million viewers in 24 hours. **
[**At COURIER, our mission is to protect democracy from guys like Carlson, who platform right-wing authoritarianism and propaganda.
