name: Team GIFFORDS
subject: [ALERT] Donald Trump is speaking at an NRA event tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Remember this: A “loyal friend” and “fearless champion” of the NRA will be no friend to our movement to end gun violence.
#

We’ve got some news for you, team: Donald Trump is headlining the NRA’s gun show in Pennsylvania tomorrow.
As always, he is going to parrot gun lobby lies and claim that the only way to end America’s gun violence crisis is by selling more guns.
After all, Trump told the crowd at the April 2023 NRA convention, "I was proud to be the most pro-gun, pro-Second Amendment president you've ever had in the White House ... And with your support in 2024, I will be your loyal friend and fearless champion once again as the 47th president of the United States."
**We need to take Donald Trump’s word here. A “loyal friend” and “fearless champion” of the NRA will be no friend to our movement to end gun violence.**
[**So please, in preparation for Donald Trump’s NRA speech tomorrow, will you make a contribution of $3 or more to GIFFORDS PAC today? Your donation sends a powerful message that our gun safety movement has the power to take on and beat the NRA and Donald Trump.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb24.CYoP11&refcode=em240208-1-30&t=1&akid=7616%2E3935704%2EvpkTSJ)

name: Gallego for Arizona
subject: Sinema’s Decision 🕒
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Without putting too fine a point on it, her decision will shape the rest of this race.
#

Peter — the clock is ticking.
Kyrsten Sinema has to make a decision about running for re-election soon. That’s not just speculation — there is a federal filing deadline in just two months.
Without putting too fine a point on it, her decision will shape the rest of this race.
If she runs we have to fight out a three-way campaign, and that’s not ideal by any means.
If she doesn’t run that means the MAGA-right and the national GOP will focus all of their attention, all of their attack ads, on one person: Ruben.
Back in 2022, millions of dollars were already being spent on attack ads at this point in the race. Those millions haven’t hit yet.
But after Sinema’s decision we can expect to get absolutely clobbered with a barrage of attack ads from the right. They know Arizona is absolutely critical to taking back the Senate and re-electing Trump, and they won’t let this one go easy.
It’s coming soon. And we have to be ready.
[**Please, make a $3 donation to Ruben’s campaign for U.S. Senate. He’s going to need your help if he’s going to fight back against the onslaught of attacks coming his way.](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-feb24.Oewwi1&refcode=em240207-2-120&t=1&akid=1937%2E734936%2EG1Zlyu)**

name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: YOU have what it takes to help us WIN in November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
Share your insight with the GOP.
[](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=53adb235e1a74f04a20255e7ba93a892&_e=NjBHN_I0okMDlDzqxpgd3CIYRm34P1JRQo0kxzJhy7BeuHmkInJkWDHbHuVOKrW8o-H9EpfjI56mo8DCEhPN5ytGQ22RpqviWeH1XDlZnH12vWshmmNuMgRkX_uRGN1nW64TYOUTZvydEctkucDYcvKSNGh24n_wrkP1NYK5QFDdYAyhh5RfVofNNf6F0oULjN16SEQVFEm0VDJY298YsAXG1OsXvvVxey-k6_5qbw5zycLTki33dWMb7m-Zv1iTeF4fZSJ83hU_ZwBUmb8JnP9A78jODZ4b-UPP04QqN7aHnr-6p92B3CiTN5qPMQNFD_oTFd-rqSCJ7IG89HdMWMs8G0NiZo5-Cso9HIy5UpRVDZ1vfZlw4D7HA_BBHkZIsu3WCgJxeeQye7EDqT1WuCiIUcu-4rQV4wHpVwaHKq_69ziqCQWdtfmCX84un7oDyGRA_i_WpjJhjphB848_DjTY4lYtrK13_jxvSIe6JyX0LX5rzlxi3_gh5qwIEh1A) **** ****

Fellow American,

When Ronna McDaniel asked if I knew any true American Patriots who should be trusted to complete the **[2024 Party Platform Audit,](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=53adb235e1a74f04a20255e7ba93a892&_e=NjBHN_I0okMDlDzqxpgd3CIYRm34P1JRQo0kxzJhy7BeuHmkInJkWDHbHuVOKrW8o-H9EpfjI56mo8DCEhPN5ytGQ22RpqviWeH1XDlZnH12vWshmmNuMgRkX_uRGN1nW64TYOUTZvydEctkucDYcvKSNGh24n_wrkP1NYK5QFDdYAyhh5RfVofNNf6F0oULjN16SEQVFEm0VDJY298YsAXG1OsXvvVxey-k6_5qbw5zycLTki33dWMb7m-Zv1iTeF4fZSJ83hU_ZwBUmb8JnP9A78jODZ4b-UPP04QqN7aHnr-6p92B3CiTN5qPMQNFD_oTFd-rqSCJ7IG89HdMWMs8G0NiZo5-Cso9HIy5UpQGIoWq5Id44ePbzSji2eIEoJ9vMBjp21lFq3zJF-MWC2eH_qByKTk4ywuu-EoW7YBAe-kobwEHovtbfna5OHUiS28CFf0IfhWf_nsbI8_0YhJdCJUz9Ek2bHC1STj5wAOPTqVEno6EPPFB8d5WJPsk "2024 Party Platform Audit,")** your name came to mind right away.

[](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=53adb235e1a74f04a20255e7ba93a892&_e=NjBHN_I0okMDlDzqxpgd3CIYRm34P1JRQo0kxzJhy7BeuHmkInJkWDHbHuVOKrW8o-H9EpfjI56mo8DCEhPN5ytGQ22RpqviWeH1XDlZnH12vWshmmNuMgRkX_uRGN1nW64TYOUTZvydEctkucDYcvKSNGh24n_wrkP1NYK5QFDdYAyhh5RfVofNNf6F0oULjN16SEQVFEm0VDJY298YsAXG1OsXvvVxey-k6_5qbw5zycLTki33dWMb7m-Zv1iTeF4fZSJ83hU_ZwBUmb8JnP9A78jODZ4b-UPP04QqN7aHnr-6p92B3CiTN5qPMQNFD_oTFd-rqSCJ7IG89HdMWMs8G0NiZo5-Cso9HIy5UpRc47cvmcoC16yOyj7b1Syhc9MD51Hv9q_HeHr-eVzTPOaK8kf4-S-4fuJivmpOsKeRv6nWIcmeS6l7STYBHsqpuc_9lxZNTkoG7n2kbyQhn7dLFNlHCrOPDHTxAQAqTmBTpeOqQHKg1ADrbmo7Vcpg)

If we're going to retire Joe Biden, we need every area of the Country represented, and I'm looking for the most politically active Patriot to represent your area in our **[2024 Audit](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=53adb235e1a74f04a20255e7ba93a892&_e=NjBHN_I0okMDlDzqxpgd3CIYRm34P1JRQo0kxzJhy7BeuHmkInJkWDHbHuVOKrW8o-H9EpfjI56mo8DCEhPN5ytGQ22RpqviWeH1XDlZnH12vWshmmNuMgRkX_uRGN1nW64TYOUTZvydEctkucDYcvKSNGh24n_wrkP1NYK5QFDdYAyhh5RfVofNNf6F0oULjN16SEQVFEm0VDJY298YsAXG1OsXvvVxey-k6_5qbw5zycLTki33dWMb7m-Zv1iTeF4fZSJ83hU_ZwBUmb8JnP9A78jODZ4b-UPP04QqN7aHnr-6p92B3CiTN5qPMQNFD_oTFd-rqSCJ7IG89HdMWMs8G0NiZo5-Cso9HIy5UpSKoRmH0rH4YxkXU7TXnwOFVY6mDnbKDTZOb6YMvdoocBl6033ca9HsttAL0AJsOgWMTqtCuL2HxckxAxM93miRtZZpZV8rJzuXafpJ3CQ5akEbBKoio2JzKJ0_R1r1jGWMZMCmM4LL-tbABQVVBBxr "2024 Audit")**.

I'm reaching out to extend a personal invitation to join me for the opening of our new GOP Battlestation in Virginia Beach. As we gear up for the upcoming elections, we are excited to be opening a new GOP Battlestation in Virginia Beach to help make sure Congresswoman Jen Kiggans wins this November. This race is one of the most important in the entire country, so I’m heading to Virginia Beach to meet with voters and kick off our voter outreach efforts! Join Congresswoman Jen Kiggans and me on Saturday, February 10th, at 10:30 AM as we officially open the doors at 4001 Virginia Beach Blvd, Suite 113, Virginia Beach, VA 23452. This event isn't just about cutting ribbons; it's about rallying together with proud Americans who want to get our country back on track! I’m thrilled about the opportunity to connect with fellow supporters who are passionate about making a difference. To help us plan accordingly, please RSVP using the link below: https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=df1d0f1de3fefe4d4c5c5407c4766906a037261eb8cd9c1fdad2f5488d2e7fc4247bfbea0b1404fc5984a2e320a40e133fce459bd6bcd4ae40dc9de113a3ed79 RSVP Link Your attendance at this event would mean a great deal to Jen and me. name: Matthew Diemer
subject: If I had a million dollars
body:
| |
---
Peter, Max Miller spent $1.4 million dollars on a house in our district so he'd be eligible to run for Congress. Then he put $1 million into his campaign so he could buy the race. Max didn't earn any of this money himself. He was born rich and is able to live off of a massive trust fund. **Unlike Max Miller, I've worked for every single last dollar I've earned.** I didn't grow up knowing I'd have a trust fund to fall back on. I grew up not knowing If I would have a meal for dinner that night. If I had a million dollars lying around, I sure as hell wouldn't ask you for money. I'd make this a fair race and easily defeat Max Miller. Last cycle, we went up against Max Miller's $3 million dollar campaign with a massive fundraising disadvantage and still almost beat him. We can beat Max this cycle with better fundraising. Unlike Max Miller, I don't have a million dollars lying around. This will be a tight race, and our campaign is relying on the grassroots to win this thing. [Will you donate $10, $25, $50, $100, or anything you can spare to help us take down former Trump aide Max Miller?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDZWX9f_QGXYt8-x-WTsfwRzXyGU1aw8byyMd0nh5gm_ZIqZETqjd15112cs2UCaCaIl_l1_Q760oXkna4Y1EtsOEZefXnUuz_vWj6gEY9C2B7bWPLNHNxJALBz2BrHUvRhdMv_elUvIrURV7p0hhKrECb_dh7Up59Auoitj9hh94te-LmxKNtJTiXekWs00MFOgyzOASGrMQ__LdgXQmF22GJZI3z2-PUMAeo6kiX_O6KmWoxgvmvbFOrb8l40TJebnsoj_ql5We6JgtAHE-ZQDvZjt3SoG5u8N8JtfcbI3-bR8jE76guOVLzZ2c1Kd8/43o/w9BniXA3QJ-5Lw-nkgZckw/h0/b54OnVGEVChodxkzr6H6VPa7fCg2-hNBf-wQouBh1KA)

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: DeVos family is doubling down on Mike Rogers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1112%2E135344%2EC7Wq-n)

Friends -
As Michiganders know, for decades the DeVos family’s #1 issue has been weakening Michigan's, and the country's, public education system. Betsy DeVos used Michigan as her petri dish before becoming Trump’s Secretary of Education, and his longest serving cabinet secretary.
The DeVos family has supported opponents of mine in the past, and it looks like they’re ready to double down on this Senate race.
**One of Republican Mike Rogers' first FEC reports was filled with donations from a bunch of members of the DeVos family — contributions totaling $46,200 all made on one single day, just before last year's September 30th deadline.**
Mike Rogers has already started to see a flood of support from deep-pocketed Republican donors like Betsy DeVos, corporate PACs, and Super PACs who will all spend millions of dollars on his behalf in order to flip Michigan red. In 2020, the DeVos family contributed over $1.6 million to candidates and PACs which have spent over $10 million to super PACs to influence races like ours.
So these contributions are likely just the beginning of the support Mike Rogers will receive from this powerful family.
But this campaign has something Mike Rogers' campaign lacks: lots and lots of regular people giving what they can, when they can.
Just one peek behind-the-curtain of a recent Mike Rogers' FEC report shows he raised less than 5% of his money from individuals making small-dollar donations.
By contrast, the majority of the donations we receive come from people contributing significantly smaller donations than the DeVos family made to Mike Rogers.
And what you may not know is that the single greatest source of individual donations to our campaign is the response to emails like this.
[**That’s why I would love to earn your support today. Your help using this link to make a $3 contribution to my campaign for United States Senate would be a great rebuke to the DeVos support.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-feb24.z4X5uQ&refcode=em240208-1-660k&t=2&akid=1112%2E135344%2EC7Wq-n)**

name: Brad Finstad
subject: Strike down that job killer!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress ](http://links
body:
Finstad for Congress

If you are unable to see the message below, [click here to view](http://links.thelukenscompany.mkt6815.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDk0MTcwMDkS1&r=MTYyNDE1OTk1MzM1OAS2&j=MjY0MDgzODk3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0).
| | | |
---
| | Friend, In case you missed it, the Supreme Court seems to be on the brink of overturning “the Chevron doctrine.” This would be a HUGE win for conservatives, getting rid of bureaucrats’ power to make laws that kill jobs and impose radical environmental regulations. [**_DEFEAT BIG GOVERNMENT_**](http://links.thelukenscompany.mkt6815.com/els/v2/YeEYCrWd3afr/TG1NSGRBZzhiSzBRMldqQldDeFZ3alY1OGxVWHFQeVNCUnVuQ2dnSWlwT2hydkVTRkY2TTRoaS9lekZGVDlrWi9PTHFmTjkxb2pxT3VWRGtLLzhnd2RsaGpJUjFRQm5OU1VxdTdxWU9xK1YxOFBzbDNWSjhiQT09S0/)
[** _SUPPORT BRAD FINSTAD_**](http://links.thelukenscompany.mkt6815.com/els/v2/mrZkBe~3k0SV/TG1NSGRBZzhiSzBRMldqQldDeFZ3alY1OGxVWHFQeVNCUnVuQ2dnSWlwT2hydkVTRkY2TTRoaS9lekZGVDlrWi9PTHFmTjkxb2pxT3VWRGtLLzhnd2RsaGpJUjFRQm5OU1VxdTdxWU9xK1YxOFBzbDNWSjhiQT09S0/) Rooted in a Supreme Court ruling from 1984, the Chevron doctrine forces courts to defer to a federal agency’s interpretation of unclear statutes. This undermines the separation of powers outlined in the Constitution because it grants agencies discretion without clear guidance from Congress. The result is that any time a new president enters the White House, we also get a massive overhaul of laws affecting every aspect of our economy. And particularly when we get a new Democrat president, we get a severe increase in punishing laws imposed by unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats. As Justice Kavanaugh noted during oral arguments, there are “ _**shocks to the system every four or eight years when a new administration comes in, whether it’s communications law or securities law or competition law or environmental law.”**_ Hopefully, the Court follows through and removes this Big Government albatross from the backs of American farms and small businesses. But no matter what, we must remain vigilant in the fight against overbearing federal policies, which is why I am so grateful for [**_your support_**.](http://links.thelukenscompany.mkt6815.com/els/v2/q0gjMwaAzjSK/TG1NSGRBZzhiSzBRMldqQldDeFZ3alY1OGxVWHFQeVNCUnVuQ2dnSWlwT2hydkVTRkY2TTRoaS9lekZGVDlrWi9PTHFmTjkxb2pxT3VWRGtLLzhnd2RsaGpJUjFRQm5OU1VxdTdxWU9xK1YxOFBzbDNWSjhiQT09S0/) Thank you and God bless you. clean_body: Finstad for Congress If you are unable to see the message below, . | | | | | | Friend, In case you missed it, the Supreme Court seems to be on the brink of overturning “the Chevron doctrine.” This would be a HUGE win for conservatives, getting rid of bureaucrats’ power to make laws that kill jobs and impose radical environmental regulations. Rooted in a Supreme Court ruling from 1984, the Chevron doctrine forces courts to defer to a federal agency’s interpretation of unclear statutes. This undermines the separation of powers outlined in the Constitution because it grants agencies discretion without clear guidance from Congress. The result is that any time a new president enters the White House, we also get a massive overhaul of laws affecting every aspect of our economy. And particularly when we get a new Democrat president, we get a severe increase in punishing laws imposed by unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats. As Justice Kavanaugh noted during oral arguments, there are “ shocks to the system every four or eight years when a new administration comes in, whether it’s communications law or securities law or competition law or environmental law.” Hopefully, the Court follows through and removes this Big Government albatross from the backs of American farms and small businesses. But no matter what, we must remain vigilant in the fight against overbearing federal policies, which is why I am so grateful for Thank you and God bless you. Brad Finstad | | | | | | ---|--- | | PO Box 923New Ulm, MN 56073 | | | | |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nancy=20Dahlstrom=20for=20Alaska?=
subject: House Republican Conference Chair Elise Stefanik Endorses Nancy Dahlstrom for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Dahlstrom for Alaska]()
body:
Stefanik joins Gov. Dunleavy and Speaker Johnson in backing Dahlstrom’s bid | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/nancyforalaska/stefanikendorsesdahlstrom?e=a20d8ad2ed)
---
[](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=db393369cc&e=a20d8ad2ed)
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Contact: [press@nancyforalaska.com](mailto:press@nancyforalaska.com)

**House Republican Conference Chair Elise Stefanik Endorses Nancy Dahlstrom for Congress** _Stefanik joins Gov. Dunleavy and Speaker Johnson in backing Dahlstrom’s bid_
**Anchorage, AK** \- Today, House Republican Conference Chair Elise Stefanik endorsed Lt. Governor Nancy Dahlstrom for U.S. Congress.
**"Lt. Governor Nancy Dahlstrom is the type of strong America First fighter we need in Congress. I'm excited to endorse Nancy as we look to flip this critical congressional seat and maintain a Republican majority in the House. Alaskans can trust Nancy to fight for them every day in Congress and that is why she is our best chance to win this seat,”** stated Chairwoman Stefanik.
Stefanik was first elected to the House in 2014 and was the youngest woman ever elected to Congress in United States history. Now, she serves in Republican leadership as the Conference Chair.
Stefanik joins a growing list of leaders and organizations backing the Lt. Governor in her bid for Alaska’s at-large seat. Both [Governor Mike Dunleavy ](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=e4331e996d&e=a20d8ad2ed)and [Speaker of the House Mike Johnson ](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=3f97deb5b2&e=a20d8ad2ed)have announced their support for Dahlstrom, along with [Winning for Women](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=953476d15f&e=a20d8ad2ed), a national organization committed to electing conservative women.
The race is set to be one of the most competitive in the country and has [shifted towards Republicans](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=b982c55e45&e=a20d8ad2ed) after the Lt. Governor launched her campaign at the end of the year.
**“I am honored to have the support of Chairwoman Stefanik. She is a true conservative leader that never backs down from a tough fight,”** stated Lt. Governor Nancy Dahlstrom. **“Alaska needs new representation in Congress to fight for our freedoms, protect our state, and secure our country. I look forward to flipping this seat and joining Chairwoman Stefanik in Congress to get to work.”**
_Nancy Dahlstrom currently serves as the Lt. Governor for the state of Alaska. Nancy was first appointed to serve as a State Representative in 2003 and then served as a Senior Advisor for Military Affairs. In 2018, Nancy took on the role to serve as the Commissioner of Corrections and was a leader in cracking down on crime and ensuring criminals serve their time. As Lieutenant Governor, Nancy has prioritized public safety, energy security, and emergency preparedness._
# # #

|
---
| | | | [](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=cc7837b2c2&e=a20d8ad2ed)| [](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=fe95cf421f&e=a20d8ad2ed)| [](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=2fe9613cd4&e=a20d8ad2ed)

name: Monica De La Cruz
subject: Did you know this about me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
We probably have a lot in common

| |
---
| | | | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt73no8afhk2mma28b2pilogchagsn1kp8t0d3ug_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c5h66o32c9h2bs) | Hey Friend,

Just wanted to take a second & introduce myself.

My name is Monica De La Cruz- I'm a free-thinking Hispanic woman & Christian conservative running to defend the most competitive congressional seat in America.

In the 2022 midterms we made history when we successfully flipped this seat red in a region that has voted blue for over a hundred years.

It is now the one seat Democrats need to win back to completely control the federal government- scary, I know.

I too am afraid of what happens to America under the rule of Democrats- but what I'm not afraid of is taking them head on.

Joe Biden, the liberal media, and the radical left despise me for who I am and what I believe.

_**They 're the very same people who will tell you my skin color determines who I am & nothing else.

The people who will tell you I can't be pro-life or pro-family because I'm a woman.

The people who will tell you that I can't be pro-law enforcement & pro-border security because I'm Hispanic. **_

My being & my values destroy the entire platform of the Democratic party & the liberal narrative.

And don't they know it!

**That's exactly why Joe Biden & the Democrats are raising millions of dollars right now- to defeat me at all costs.**

They're going to spend, say, and do whatever it takes to flip this seat back to blue, and ensure it stays that way for another hundred years.

_**[So I'm asking for your help today: will you take the Democrats head on with me & defend this seat by chipping in just a few bucks?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0pdg1fmjd1jrounnft09d0damhrb03joebmcs00_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c5h66o32c9h2bs "So I’m asking for your help today: will you take the Democrats head on with me & defend this seat by chipping in just a few bucks? ")**_ | [**CLICK HERE TO CONTRIBUTE**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp5d666clcfg1ia47h2637s6hlu5i055gt3snldg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c5h66o32c9h2bs)
---

I hope I can count on your support & I'll never forget who stood with me from day one of this campaign!

Thank you!
Monica Da La Cruz (TX-15)

|
---
| | Paid for by Monica for Congress
---

PO Box 4605
McAllen, Texas 78502

[Privacy Policy](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7hsenf73l54tufqt6k9am0sk6rt6t1l2ks51g18_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c5h66o32c9h2bs)

name: Crow HQ
subject: re: The Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Friend,

This morning, the Supreme Court will hear a case that could decide the future of this election. Here’s what you need to know:

The Supreme Court will hear oral arguments in Trump v. Anderson. A few weeks ago, the Colorado Supreme Court ruled that Donald Trump was ineligible to be president. This case will decide whether he can remain in the race.

Facts are facts: The Constitution protects the right to vote and bars candidates who abuse the process or engage in insurrection. Donald Trump has done both.

But with three Trump-appointed judges on the Supreme Court, there’s no telling what could happen.

No matter the ruling, we know that Donald Trump and his MAGA allies are going to go all-in on this election. The MAGA movement is going to use their resources to attack their enemies and grab their way back into power — especially now that Trump sees Colorado as a top threat.

Jason has never been afraid to stand up to bullies to protect the rule of law. That’ll be even more important as we get ready for the coming election:

Ahead of the Supreme Court’s ruling, will you rush in $10 to help reelect Jason and fight to keep Colorado blue? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-february-2024?amount=10]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-february-2024?amount=10&express_lane=true]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-february-2024]

Thank you,

— Team Crow

Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. Jason is fighting for you, your family, and the American people in Congress — and he's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Will you pitch in now to help him continue working for us?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-february-2024]
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States
www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [https://www.jasoncrowforcongress.com/] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com]

name: Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate
subject: NEW: GOP lawmakers block attempt to add exceptions to Missouri’s total abortion ban
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
This is Josh Hawley’s legacy.
#
Peter — there’s something happening in Missouri that you need to know about.
**FIRST:** Josh Hawley led the charge with his corrupt family business to criminalize abortion and overturn Roe v. Wade. He even admitted that the whole reason he got into politics was “because of his opposition to abortion.”
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43650?refcode=em20240208-4775&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4775%2E614464%2E2ZkZRW)
**[FIGHT BACK NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43650?refcode=em20240208-4775&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4775%2E614464%2E2ZkZRW)**
**THEN:** Missouri became the first state in the nation to completely outlaw abortion rights after Roe was struck down by the Supreme Court. Hawley said he was “thrilled.”
**AND NOW:** Hawley’s control-obsessed allies in the Missouri legislature are doing everything in their power to continue his legacy by blocking access to abortion and reproductive freedom in our state — _in all cases, under all circumstances._
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43650?refcode=em20240208-4775&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4775%2E614464%2E2ZkZRW)
**[FIGHT BACK NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43650?refcode=em20240208-4775&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=4775%2E614464%2E2ZkZRW)**
All these politicians were elected to represent everyday people and their freedoms, not to rule over us and tell us how to live. **That’s why I’m running for Missouri’s Senate seat to defeat Josh Hawley, end these Big Brother attacks on abortion, and finally give people the power to make decisions about their own bodies, families, and lives.**
**[Will you help me get it done by rushing a donation of any amount to my grassroots campaign today? He even admitted that the whole reason he got into politics was “because of his opposition to abortion.” THEN: Missouri became the first state in the nation to completely outlaw abortion rights after Roe was struck down by the Supreme Court. Hawley said he was “thrilled.” AND NOW: Hawley’s control-obsessed allies in the Missouri legislature are doing everything in their power to continue his legacy by blocking access to abortion and reproductive freedom in our state — in all cases, under all circumstances. All these politicians were elected to represent everyday people and their freedoms, not to rule over us and tell us how to live. **About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

clean_body: Can you spare 30 to 60 seconds to answer four questions about the upcoming election? | | Fellow Conservative, It looks like your name is still missing from my petition. Would you please take a moment to complete the very brief questionnaire now? Democrats are doing everything they can to keep President Trump out of the 2024 Presidential election ...from begging the courts to kick him off the ballot to pushing “gag orders” to try to silence him. They are pulling out ALL the stops. But clearly, it’s not working. New polls show President Trump is ahead in 5 out of 6 swing states. I’ve been 100% behind President Trump since day one , and I love how everyday Americans EMBRACE him each time the Washington swamp pushes him away. We need Conservatives from across the country to rally together and back President Trump NOW. I’ve set a goal of identifying 1,776 conservatives in the next 30 minutes who stand ready and willing to help put President Trump back in office. America can’t afford four more years of Joe Biden, but we must act fast.America can’t afford four more years of Joe Biden, but we must act fast. I’m counting on you to join me in this - President Trump needs our help today - President Trump needs our help today. For Freedom Jim Jordan | About Jim Jordan: Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable. In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate. As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending. He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio. | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

name: Doug White
subject: Breaking Silence: Meet Our New Advisory Board and Unmasking the Threat - Ignorance is not Bliss!
body:
Voices from all across Central Washington
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/e7Os9OeYM/c?w=sPHeZ5pGA6I-KCaeu8kmnCYIjxgloZbsZqEZX4hhdbU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucnVyYWxhbWVyaWNhbnN1bml0ZWQub3JnL3NvL2U3T3M5T2VZTT9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9)_**

| | Advisory Board
---
| | We are a locally grown, grass roots organization and the voice of our many communities will be heard. Our inaugural Advisory Board is a beautiful cross section of Central Washington. To read their full bio's visit [https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/advisoryboard](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/e7Os9OeYM/c?w=5CL1bm0XvRfDdNHJ3CADy-NmJ7VQHBDbqFxuJ4Ewt0o.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucnVyYWxhbWVyaWNhbnN1bml0ZWQub3JnL2Fkdmlzb3J5Ym9hcmQiLCJyIjoiNDE1NzYwNzEtNjhkNC00YjIwLTk4NjktNDVhM2QwYzhmNGUyIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMjc3ZTdmNGEtMDBlMy00OGZjLWJiOTctNjU0YjNmYTM3NGE4In0)

That is our plan! Our Goal is 100 New Recurring Donations in February. We are going to reach our target one donor at a time. You can be the first.

| | Ignorance Is Anything But Blisss
---
| | The poll numbers are providing a clear picture of what we in Central Washington already know: the majority of Americans are oblivious to politics, and this poses potentially the greatest threat to our democracy since the Civil War. "Disproportionate doom seems to be a new American affliction," writes Financial Times's John Burn-Murdoch ([FT paywalled](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/e7Os9OeYM/c?w=_-_HD1McNBd4cdUaad7JCySGEOe9cKfO9BrpWALwfuI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZnQuY29tL2NvbnRlbnQvOWM3OTMxYWEtNDk3My00NzVlLTk4NDEtZDdlYmQ1NGIwZjQ3IiwiciI6ImM2ZTIxNmMyLTllY2EtNGE4OC1iM2Y5LTRhZDFlZDQ3ZTVmYSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9)). Those least tuned into politics are more likely to rate their economic situation significantly more dire despite all indications to the contrary, as suggested by a [TLP/ YouGov national polling](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/e7Os9OeYM/c?w=TjGiwxa4JYrmE6h0md6RZbizu6be6td7KoEEsmzBib0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9kM25rbDNwc3Z4eHBlOS5jbG91ZGZyb250Lm5ldC9kb2N1bWVudHMvVExQX3dhdmUyX2Nyb3NzdGFicy5wZGYiLCJyIjoiYzZlMjE2YzItOWVjYS00YTg4LWIzZjktNGFkMWVkNDdlNWZhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMjc3ZTdmNGEtMDBlMy00OGZjLWJiOTctNjU0YjNmYTM3NGE4In0) reported by [John Halpin of the Liberal Patriot](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/e7Os9OeYM/c?w=eVxNDTIaZ3x5LNa6vikX_qw-h4-c1oMhnQZ8CX9i-lI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGliZXJhbHBhdHJpb3QuY29tL3AvdHVuZWQtb3V0LXZvdGVycy1hcmUtdGhlLW1vc3QtbmVnYXRpdmU_IiwiciI6ImM2ZTIxNmMyLTllY2EtNGE4OC1iM2Y5LTRhZDFlZDQ3ZTVmYSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9). In Central Washington, we are blessed with diversity, with half our population being Latino and home to the Confederated Colville Tribes and the Yakama Nation. These historically disenfranchised groups, coupled with the fact that 80% of the district's residents have never heard a pro-democratic message, explain the shift in sentiment and voters moving to the far-right by double digits ([Split Ticket](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/e7Os9OeYM/c?w=rHcNt6eeC5_pCnCizD8TIepnZ-NAtjkgYBxjgS8sxRw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zcGxpdC10aWNrZXQub3JnLzIwMjMvMTIvMDQvd2hhdC1kby1hZ2dyZWdhdGVkLWNyb3NzdGFicy10ZWxsLXVzLWFib3V0LTIwMjQvPyIsInIiOiJjNmUyMTZjMi05ZWNhLTRhODgtYjNmOS00YWQxZWQ0N2U1ZmEiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ)). Feel the joy! Recognizing a problem is the first step to a solution. While we may not know all the reasons eligible voters are "tuned out," we have foundational understandings that provide clear paths of action. The vast majority of Central Washington residents have a household income half that of King County. Maslow's [hierarchy of needs](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/e7Os9OeYM/c?w=sYdiiVX4LR4psghOd_RCmodxOsfB6FxUldYFIUJX3BQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wc3ljbmV0LmFwYS5vcmcvcmVjb3JkLzE5NTUtMDIyMzMtMDAwIiwiciI6ImM2ZTIxNmMyLTllY2EtNGE4OC1iM2Y5LTRhZDFlZDQ3ZTVmYSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9) explains it well; addressing basic needs must precede pondering the fates of humanity, or the struggle will blind you from all else.In our digital world, where information is primarily delivered electronically and manipulated by algorithms, choices presented to us are exaggerations of our interests rather than a reflection of the world as it is.Political messaging, driven by money and polling, tends to focus on population-dense urban areas rather than Tonasket. Rural Americans United understands this and is strategizing to overcome these obstacles. Since last October, we've been broadcasting pro-democratic messages all across Central Washington, assembling a diverse group representing our community. We are all amazing, and together, we will get this done!

name: Nikki Haley
subject: When I was sworn in
body:
I hit the ground running and delivered results for the people of our state.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=506920a5bd224ed19ce8131f26b5a310&_e=suehN99Ibckh5K9ESCU1BHmgwoLnpn-rU9sBq-MjDsMkxY1lc5b45rPFyj3EPbOsx6gF4vnKlMpxPDCcp4kdDiGLHgfzDX6Jwq943PeFZx_d70HMtQXZLKeoGyvI-f9CJKPp6nqkAcsxhw73mYCBQA0fGRKAvLI8KXpXHY8wCYNTRiOfgrG17foajFc5sCAn322YT7fMP7g431xcdqtqkJOCI_niVhJsjFRBsh2Z6E-UJp3aNZTwF33Lx0xcX5o-MdxfjeIxkX5afMpW3KkGxpO5HDbBrcJdlNfNYvAkKmWDXBRABOsyi5SuxhhRhx97wvHvuTAumgOhAYYyy6DmUhR3WfmFhfoQ1NTdttl5YZ2CXUSjStEOAtQw7pPpxayNv_na8VeUiQWZtRf4XPE4F2KokbhCC6RfdRav2iBkj_g4BVJz8L2_Wvrzu0z1CAwPKu0oaULmWtJaFJeCQXkLDgjAbEynjBbfyAys28wq08o6TY4xv8q-oVpHKwXZc9iec05-WYQ-w9YCTfTFDtGkqnT2cKfGpmm8alI1Gui0TdQYRtTwXx1tzsZ222PBxhR-EeYDn7q1LJ1VB-QPwjgalwzE_XVNzIispqheyIhQ9I62HWvt_laOoGnaGkRu4mjG)
---

Friend,

When I was sworn in as governor of South Carolina over 13 years ago, it was one of the greatest honors of my life.

I hit the ground running and delivered results for the people of our state. I worked hard to slash our state's double-digit unemployment rate from 11% down to 4%. I cut taxes. I signed one of the toughest illegal immigration laws in the country.

We passed voter ID, and tort reform, and ethics reform, and we moved 35,000 people from welfare to work.

People were referring to South Carolina as "the Beast of the Southeast," which I loved.

_But, winning this race didn 't come easy..._

---

From the day I launched my campaign for governor, the odds were stacked against me. I was the least known and least funded GOP candidate. Just months before the primary, I was polling in fourth place.

But like every race I've run, I fought and I won. Then I got to work and proved why I deserved to be there.

This race is no different.

_No matter the attacks that come our way ...

No matter how much the establishment tries to silence your voice...

No matter how much the political elite so desperately wants to lie to you and tell you this race is over... _

None of that matters.

Because I'm not going anywhere. Americans don't want a coronation - they want an election. And we're going to give them one!

I will never stop fighting for our country's future, and I know I have an incredible team of grassroots supporters like you who are fighting right alongside me.

**We have a country to save, and I know we can get it done!** But it's going to take all hands on deck, which is why I need your help today.

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

clean_body: I hit the ground running and delivered results for the people of our state. | | | | | | Friend, When I was sworn in as governor of South Carolina over 13 years ago, it was one of the greatest honors of my life. I hit the ground running and delivered results for the people of our state. I worked hard to slash our state's double-digit unemployment rate from 11% down to 4%. I cut taxes. I signed one of the toughest illegal immigration laws in the country. We passed voter ID, and tort reform, and ethics reform, and we moved 35,000 people from welfare to work. People were referring to South Carolina as "the Beast of the Southeast," which I loved. But, winning this race didn 't come easy... | From the day I launched my campaign for governor, the odds were stacked against me. I was the least known and least funded GOP candidate. Just months before the primary, I was polling in fourth place. But like every race I've run, I fought and I won. Then I got to work and proved why I deserved to be there. This race is no different. No matter the attacks that come our way ... No matter how much the establishment tries to silence your voice... No matter how much the political elite so desperately wants to lie to you and tell you this race is over... None of that matters. Because I'm not going anywhere. Americans don't want a coronation - they want an election. And we're going to give them one! I will never stop fighting for our country's future, and I know I have an incredible team of grassroots supporters like you who are fighting right alongside me. We have a country to save, and I know we can get it done! But it's going to take all hands on deck, which is why I need your help today. "Will you please pitch in a generous contribution of $25 or more to help me fund my campaign and win this race?" | Our campaign is the last best hope of stopping another Trump-Biden nightmare. I am committed to the fight, but I cannot do it alone. It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation to help continue the momentum, reach more voters, host more events, and take one step closer to victory. Your donation will not only help continue the momentum, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign ahead of the South Carolina primary in less than 3 weeks. "We can get this done. But, it’s up to us to make it happen. That’s why I need your help today." Thank you! My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. subject: Today could be the darkest day in American history, Friend

body:
Today's the day the Supreme Court could STRIP Trump from the ballot!

|
---
| | |
Today's the day, Friend.

Today the Supreme Court will rule on whether or not President Trump's name can appear on the ballot in Colorado.

_**And a new report suggests the Supreme Court is "likely" to rule against President Trump. **_

Make no mistake about it, Friend. **If the Supreme Court allows President Trump 's name to be taken off the ballot, we will have lost America.**

---
| | | [DEMAND PRESIDENT TRUMP APPEAR ON THE BALLOT](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zs7cm0i294dfthih6gdevk8beriulh2vprqe8g7g_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c5h6eo76c9h2bs "Generic Button")
---

Taking a former President and the leading candidate for the GOP nomination off the ballot is BLATANT Election Interference.

House Republicans refuse to sit by idly while the Republican Presidential nominee is taken off the ballot. **[We've released our OFFICIAL petition to keep Trump on the ballot, and we need you to sign it before today's hearing.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9p90ghuo2hsce147bc0ro5jl968iske3gg2oqvo_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c5h6eo76c9h2bs "We’ve released our OFFICIAL petition to keep Trump on the ballot, and we need you to sign it before today’s hearing.")**

History will not be kind to those who sit and watch as this atrocity unfolds before our eyes.

**[Will you add your name to DEMAND President Trump appear on the ballot?](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqphgu94np94of8v4s0lr4nk1m10phv9st189r3g_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c5h6eo76c9h2bs "Will you add your name to DEMAND President Trump appear on the ballot?")**

name: PA Trump Alert
subject: Before Trump takes the stage in PA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1931%2E552475%2EKECpFi)
This is urgent, Peter.
**Donald Trump will be in Pennsylvania**** _tomorrow_****to fire up his far-right MAGA base**. Before he gets here, we need to show the strength of this campaign and send a powerful message that he can’t flip the Commonwealth red.
[**Can you rush whatever you can to re-elect Bob Casey and keep PA blue?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240208-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240208-1&refcode2=1931_552475_KECpFi&akid=1931%2E552475%2EKECpFi)
Donald Trump’s visit to the Commonwealth is no coincidence. **He knows that** **the path to both the Senate**** _and_****the White House runs through Pennsylvania**.
This is a crucial moment. If we don’t have the resources to fight back, it could be the difference between winning and losing.
**[That’s why we’re asking for your help to fight back and show that this team has what it takes to go toe to toe with Trump and his far-right allies.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240208-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240208-1&refcode2=1931_552475_KECpFi&akid=1931%2E552475%2EKECpFi) **

clean_body: This is urgent, Peter. Donald Trump will be in Pennsylvania tomorrowto fire up his far-right MAGA base. Before he gets here, we need to show the strength of this campaign and send a powerful message that he can’t flip the Commonwealth red. Donald Trump’s visit to the Commonwealth is no coincidence. He knows that the path to both the Senate andthe White House runs through Pennsylvania. This is a crucial moment. If we don’t have the resources to fight back, it could be the difference between winning and losing. Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue. Thanks for being on Team Casey. Together, we can keep PA blue and send Bob Casey back to the Senate to continue delivering for working families. — Team Casey Bob Casey is running for Senate to cut through the gridlock, stand up to powerful corporate special interests, and fight for hardworking Pennsylvanians.

name: Tony Vargas
subject: BREAKING: my race is a toss-up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
|
---

| | | [**BREAKING:
Top analyst just declared my race a "toss-up"**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78639243/454000811/1698357921?refcode=20240208_em_fr_b1_tony_30_op_v1&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjMyOWI2NC1hMWM2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9tTA0riDqzY6yMzMSdPTbtjrfTQ2Qse0wLIi4akLQvk=)
---
[**_I had to reach out as soon as I heard: Top experts just announced I’m in a "toss-up" race to unseat Don Bacon. Truly, I can win this race — but now, I need to raise $6,498 in the next 24 hours to take on Bacon’s special-interest millions and flip this seat for hardworking Nebraskans. Can I count on you to rush in $15 ASAP? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78639244/454000820/1698357921?refcode=20240208_em_fr_b1_tony_30_op_v1&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjMyOWI2NC1hMWM2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9tTA0riDqzY6yMzMSdPTbtjrfTQ2Qse0wLIi4akLQvk=)
I’m so excited to bring you this news!
[**My race was just rated a "toss-up" — because grassroots donors like you have stepped up to power my campaign!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78639246/454000822/1698357921?refcode=20240208_em_fr_b1_tony_30_op_v1&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjMyOWI2NC1hMWM2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9tTA0riDqzY6yMzMSdPTbtjrfTQ2Qse0wLIi4akLQvk=)
I have one of the best chances in the entire country to unseat a vulnerable Congressman and help Democrats take back the House.
[**_That’s why I need to raise $6,498 in the next 24 hours to ensure I have the resources to keep our campaign firing on all cylinders, unseat Don Bacon for good, and WIN this critical race. I can’t get to Congress alone, so will you send in $19, $14, or even just $1 in the next 24 hours? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78639248/454000824/1698357921?refcode=20240208_em_fr_b1_tony_30_op_v1&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjMyOWI2NC1hMWM2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9tTA0riDqzY6yMzMSdPTbtjrfTQ2Qse0wLIi4akLQvk=)
In a race this close, the stakes couldn’t be higher:
Reproductive freedom, gun safety, good paying jobs for Nebraskans...
[**It’s all on the ballot this year.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78639249/454000825/1698357921?refcode=20240208_em_fr_b1_tony_30_op_v1&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjMyOWI2NC1hMWM2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9tTA0riDqzY6yMzMSdPTbtjrfTQ2Qse0wLIi4akLQvk=)

name: Travis Nembhard
subject: From Dunkin’ to DC: My path to Congress is not traditional
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Nembhard for Congress
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/105170/images/Frame%201.png]
Friend,
I want to share a personal story—one that I think will help you understand why I chose to run for office and why you can trust me to fight for you in Congress. It's a story of grit, hard work, and public service that began in the most unexpected place: Dunkin' Donuts.
Fresh out of law school, I landed the influential role as an assistant attorney general investigating civil rights violations. It was a dream job, but there was a catch—it was unpaid. So just like so many Americans today, I worked a second job to make ends meet and took on the night shift at Dunkin' Donuts, commuting three hours round trip each day.
Picture this: trading a suit for a Dunkin' apron, handling legal briefs by day and mopping floors and baking bagels by night (yes, they do bake their own bagels). It wasn’t easy, but it was the only way I could afford to do what I love and that has always been to help combat injustices. Every day, I remembered the sacrifices my parents made as Jamaican immigrants to give me and my brothers a good education and the opportunity to succeed. I have since made it my mission to ensure those opportunities are available to others. In that unpaid position, I always remembered who I was fighting for – workers being paid sub-minimum wages, tenants forced into dangerous living conditions by slumlords, and everyday families facing discrimination.
Whether it was my time working in the Obama White House, as a financial regulator investigating white-collar crime, as the youngest judge in DC, or now as a first time Congressional Candidate – I take the lessons learned during these experiences everywhere I go. Remembering who I fight for and why I keep going.
This campaign won’t be easy, but nothing worth fighting for is.
Your support, however much you can afford, fuels this campaign and our shared commitment to fight injustice and to protect working families.
Best,
Travis Nembhard

clean_body: = = Let me explain why it’d be a huge help: There are less than 9 months left until Election Day. And over the next 9 months, our campaign will need to hire more staff, run ads, and knock on thousands of doors to get out the vote and win this tossup race for Congress. It won’t be easy. Our opponent just dropped $700,000 of his own money into his campaign, and the top House GOP Super PAC (the one that spent $260 million last cycle) already polled our district and called it a “top priority.” Every reliable monthly donation – whether it’s $5 or $250 per month – helps us build the campaign, expand the coalition and fight back. = | | = | = Thanks for your help, Shane Kristen for Michigan, Campaign Manager | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to . | | = | Paid for by Kristen for Michigan Committee to Elect Kristen McDonald Rivet 2600 Center Ave Bay City, MI 48708 United States

body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Email%20Logo.png] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Sam%20Headshot.png]
ACROSS THE COMMONWEALTH
VOTE TODAY! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Make%20A%20Plan%20To%20Vote.png]
You can vote for November's elections NOW! Vote at your Registrar's office during business hours. Saturday early voting is available October 28th and November 4th. Learn More [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
Find your local Registrar's office here: https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/VWCC.jpeg] 15 years of the Community College Access Program at VWCC
Learn More [https://www.wdbj7.com/2023/09/26/virginia-western-celebrates-15th-anniversary-ccap-program/] CCAP is a successful public/private partnership that pays the cost of tuition for three years at Virginia Western Community College if a qualified student does not have sufficient financial aid to pay tuition costs.
This program has helped over 4,200 students achieve higher education!
CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT
https://karenforvirginia.com/ [https://karenforvirginia.com/] Karen Jenkins for HB-89
Donate Here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/karenforvirginia] Karen Jenkins is a life-long resident of the City of Suffolk. Throughout her lifetime she has passionately advocated for others and currently serves on the Suffolk School Board with a proven track record and history of accomplishments. She is running for the House of Delegates for the 89th District to continue delivering results for the people of Virginia.
She is a champion for education, public safety and mental health. As your next Delegate for the 89th District, she will continue to fight and vote for meaningful policies and legislation to support the needs of the district. At the state level, she will be positioned to write and sponsor bills and laws to benefit the schools and communities in the 89th District and throughout the commonwealth.
LOCAL CANDIDATE EVENTS
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/lily%20canvass.png]
Canvass for Lily Franklin!
On Sundays, join Team Lily at the South County Library Parking Lot from 12 - 12:30 pm for a Roanoke canvassing event!
Bring your walking shoes, a charged cell phone, and water. When you arrive to their launch location you will receive a brief training and literature before being sent out to turf. Questions? Email Beth at egunter3@gmail.com [egunter3@gmail.com] or call 540-353-3645.
South County Library Parking Lot, 6303 Merriman Rd, Roanoke, VA 24018
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/sam%20and%20trish.jpg]
Canvass for Sam and Trish!
*this is a place holder until the new facebook event is created*
Join us Sunday to canvass for Sam and Trish! Meet our Field Coordinator, Dom, on September 3rd at the Williamson Road Library, 12:00pm.
Located at 3837 Williamson Rd, Roanoke, VA 24012.
IN THE COMMUNITY
https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story [https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story] https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424 [https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424]
Roanoke River Contamination Settlement Reached Roanoke Young Democrats Canvass Tailgate
Without current regulations, the water contamination caused by these companies could have been so much worse. Come out to support Roanoke Valley Democratic candidates!
Read More [https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story] The Roanoke Young Democrats will be enjoying pizza, coffee, donuts and more before canvassing to knock for Trish White-Boyd, Sam Rasoul, Lily Franklin, Samantha Newell, Jade Harris, & Nancy Horn. Door knocking will begin about 12:30 pm!
Read More [https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424]
Roanoke EnVision Center Kids Movie Night - Sept. 28 Fall Harvest Festival
The movie is free and there will be snacks and much more! Fall into wellness at the Harvest Festival!
Read More Celebrate the end of farm season with fun experiences for the whole family. Try new activities to support your well-being. Connect with others in a beautiful outdoor space. Free meals available with registration. This event is free and open to everyone!
Read More [https://web.cvent.com/event/19422342-be4f-417d-9fc3-6a6bf883e794/summary]
https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992 [https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992] https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/ [https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/]
Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game - Oct. 1 Henrietta Lacks Statue Unveiling - Oct. 4
Join us for the 6th Annual Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game, being held at the Home of the Salem Red Sox - Carilion Clinic Field. A dignified sculpture will commemorate the ongoing and long unrecognized contributions of Roanoke native Henrietta Lacks, who unknowingly provided the world with the HeLa cell, fueling decades of life-saving and life changing research.
Physicians, nurses and administrators will suit up for each hospital during the nine-inning contest. Proceeds will benefit the American Heart Association. Unveiling is October 4th at 11 am at Henrietta Lacks Plaza.
Admission is $5 at the gate, kids under 10 free. Gates open at 1pm and the game starts at 2pm. 410 3rd St SW, Roanoke, VA 24011
Read More [https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992] Read More [https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/RCDC.jpeg] Join the Roanoke City Democrats!
Roanoke City Democratic Committee meetings are now in-person and open to non-members. We meet the 3rd Thursday of each month. This month we are meeting at 6 pm at the Main Library (706 S Jefferson St, Roanoke, VA 24016). Sign up for meeting reminders and other information here [https://www.roanokedemocrats.com/subscribe] .
Join us for a social hour every first Thursday of the month at Leonore Restaurant, 128 Campbell St. SW, 5-7 pm.
Join Roanoke Young Dems! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/RYD.png]
Meetings occur on the first Monday and third Sunday of every month in person and virtually. The goal of RYD is to help improve our community and to promote the names of Democratic candidates and policies.
Contact: YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com [YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com] to get involved!
Donate Today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/samrasoul]
Thank you for your support! If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out to me anytime.
My very best,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Screen%20Shot%202022-07-29%20at%203.44.06%20PM%20%281%29.png]
Del. Sam Rasoul
https://www.facebook.com/SamRasoulVA [https://www.facebook.com/SamRasoulVA] https://twitter.com/Sam_Rasoul [https://twitter.com/Sam_Rasoul] https://www.instagram.com/sam_rasoul/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/sam_rasoul/?hl=en]

Roanoke, VA 24037
United States

name: INDEMS
subject: Retire Rokita
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, Did you see the big news? Todd Rokita’s political future is in big trouble. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78641504/454005141/405560545?refcode=240208Rokita&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2VhYzc4YS1hM2M2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=41_nEs7gtmUv8GZf8JcUVAlh6Y6Bp3LjofBwU7d2efU=) Last week, Sabato’s Crystal Ball moved Indiana’s attorney general race from ‘Safe Republican’ to ‘Lean Republican’. **[2024 is our chance to stop Rokita, and restore respect for the rule of law in the AG’s office. name: Diane Sare
subject: 02/09 Friday Symposium –– War is STILL a Racket
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sare for Senate
body:
| | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240209_symposium_blast&n=1)
---
Friend, Smedley Butler (1881-1940), a highly decorated Marine, was tapped to play the lead for a fascist Wall Street-led coup against the FDR government. He refused to play the role and instead began the process of unmasking the military-financial complex he had served, writing books such as "War Is A Racket." Suzanne Klebe will present on Butler's legacy as whistleblower and anti-war writer within the greater context of FDR's anti-colonial intention for post-WWII U.S.A. By understanding Butler's story, we can develop a conceptual basis by which to proceed in breaking apart the corruption of the military-financial complex, today. **NB: This week's symposium will be online only, at the live-stream linked below.**
### [NY Symposium, Friday, February 09, ](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=rnE9YhnYr4J_7Au8CsjhkI1KbYEQT1O7uLNDvxbreFRZotaIqamxyYXnIGOmPCn89gUO9K5K63xcyvRmFXQd3Q&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240209_symposium_blast&n=2)[8:00 p.m. ](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=rnE9YhnYr4J_7Au8CsjhkI1KbYEQT1O7uLNDvxbreFRZotaIqamxyYXnIGOmPCn89gUO9K5K63xcyvRmFXQd3Q&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240209_symposium_blast&n=3)

name: Nikki Haley
subject: When I was sworn in
body:
it was one of the greatest honors of my life.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Olm0842vNAP6eM9bsJZ3LA~~/AARclAA~~~)
---

Friend,

When I was sworn in as governor of South Carolina over 13 years ago, it was one of the greatest honors of my life.

I hit the ground running and delivered results for the people of our state. I worked hard to slash our state's double-digit unemployment rate from 11% down to 4%. I cut taxes. I signed one of the toughest illegal immigration laws in the country.

We passed voter ID, and tort reform, and ethics reform, and we moved 35,000 people from welfare to work.

People were referring to South Carolina as "the Beast of the Southeast," which I loved.

_But, winning this race didn 't come easy..._

---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Olm0842vNAP6eM9bsJZ3LA~~/AARclAA~~~)
---

From the day I launched my campaign for governor, the odds were stacked against me. I was the least known and least funded GOP candidate. Just months before the primary, I was polling in fourth place.

But like every race I've run, I fought and I won. Then I got to work and proved why I deserved to be there.

This race is no different.

_No matter the attacks that come our way ...

No matter how much the establishment tries to silence your voice...

No matter how much the political elite so desperately wants to lie to you and tell you this race is over... _

None of that matters.

Because I'm not going anywhere. Americans don't want a coronation - they want an election. And we're going to give them one!

I will never stop fighting for our country's future, and I know I have an incredible team of grassroots supporters like you who are fighting right alongside me.

**We have a country to save, and I know we can get it done!** But it's going to take all hands on deck, which is why I need your help today.

**[Will you please pitch in a generous contribution of $25 or more to help me fund my campaign and win this race?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Olm0842vNAP6eM9bsJZ3LA~~/AARclAA~~~ "Will you please pitch in a generous contribution of $25 or more to help me fund my campaign and win this race?")**

---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Olm0842vNAP6eM9bsJZ3LA~~/AARclAA~~~)
---

Our campaign is the last best hope of stopping another Trump-Biden nightmare. I am committed to the fight, but I cannot do it alone.

It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation to help continue the momentum, reach more voters, host more events, and take one step closer to victory.

Your donation will not only help continue the momentum, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign ahead of the South Carolina primary in less than 3 weeks.

**[We can get this done. But, it's up to us to make it happen. That's why I need your help today.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Olm0842vNAP6eM9bsJZ3LA~~/AARclAA~~~ "We can get this done. But, it’s up to us to make it happen. That’s why I need your help today.")**

Thank you!
---

My very best,
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Olm0842vNAP6eM9bsJZ3LA~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
Nikki Haley

---
| | [DONATE](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Olm0842vNAP6eM9bsJZ3LA~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/tcvB_dvpldJHj6VzKvVgKA~~/AARclAA~ "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/tcvB_dvpldJHj6VzKvVgKA~~/AARclAA~ "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2M2MFJqz25QYZmfrYLBe3w~~/AARclAA~/RgRnp5eGP4RjAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS93aHktaW0tcnVubmluZy1mb290ZXItdHY_~ "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2M2MFJqz25QYZmfrYLBe3w~~/AARclAA~/RgRnp5eGP4RjAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS93aHktaW0tcnVubmluZy1mb290ZXItdHY_~ "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2M2MFJqz25QYZmfrYLBe3w~~/AARclAA~/RgRnp5eGP4RjAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS93aHktaW0tcnVubmluZy1mb290ZXItdHY_~ "DONATE")

At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. ~ "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | ~ "DONATE" | | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. ~~ **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. # **The Fed Has Just Declared War ****On Americans ... Again!**
---
|
---
And now the Fed wants to make us a cashless society! When every dollar is gone, that means no greenbacks for swap meets or garage sales. No tooth fairy or piggy banks. No rainy day savings. No extra quarters for the meter. No giving change to the homeless. No giving dollars to street performers or musicians. No more selling extra items for cash. No buying anything with privacy.
---
| | **A Digital Dollar means your life is dependent on the internet, electricity, and people you don’t know, like, or trust.**
---
| | Every penny you spend — every penny you earn — could all be tracked. **The Fed has just declared WAR on Americans, and millions will ignore the warning signs, or say it’s not a big deal...** But those people may end up on the wrong side of history. So what can you do, or what COULD you do? For many Americans, they’re turning back to the only money that’s survived civilizations: Gold and Silver. **And Robert Kiyosaki said it best:**
---
| | **“ _Gold and silver transcends national_** _**borders, politics, religions, and race.**_ _**A person may not like someone else’s**_ **_religion, but he’ll accept his gold._ ”**
---
**“ _Gold and silver transcends national_** _**borders, politics, religions, and race.**__**A person may not like someone
else’s **_**_religion, but he’ll
accept his gold._”**

| February 8, 2024
Friend,
One question I get asked a lot is "Geoff, I don't live in your district. Who is the Conservative running for State Committee in my district?"
Fortunately, a website now exists for you to simply enter your town, and you will be shown who your conservative candidates are. The website is [mafreedomslate.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gHYZD4HBCtNnh0M9Z7VUnM3ZHzs2KxCKzIC_aKP8nfpowD2xCsfXQ6BFeaUN1QHc_CvQ02opimMy305DH46tnOk0JnoXALqTrskar_teVqtJsE0TvHsN0-Wnm_UPIhG5Dbn1PFcDcJ0LVnRJ7zHIiA==&c=d2kRqohtKKLS79tGYhiBYGv3aWXchcUWUHW5wGtR1QXaTfgro0URLA==&ch=lqKZbED0b_W0z3xSOOzAkw1yNxpYfDoWwonWsur7IjXg9N_h35u--A==)

subject: The nation is watching NY-03
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee

Climate change, immigration reform, gun safety, reproductive rights–all of it is at stake on February 13.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78642525/454007950/-349024561?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-02-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5YmRhNDM0LWE0YzYtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UDaTmu6Y28HJO6LwLr2PTZniPjcZe_SR7E4ddKra0yw=)
---
Hi Peter, it’s Tom Suozzi. Fight for Progress asked me to reach out with an important message. I’m writing to ask for your support so we can win the NY-03 special election in just 5 days.

[_**I really need everyone reading this to split a donation between my campaign and Fight for Progress right away. Let me explain why.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78642528/454007953/-349024561?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-02-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5YmRhNDM0LWE0YzYtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UDaTmu6Y28HJO6LwLr2PTZniPjcZe_SR7E4ddKra0yw=)

With under 1 week left until this critical special election, polling is in the _**margin of error**_ , and far-right outside groups are spending **nearly $5 million** against me in these final days. Early voting is already underway, and we’re running out of time to make our final push to voters.

Peter, we can’t afford to fall short here. The whole nation will be watching NY-03. Climate change, immigration reform, gun safety, reproductive rights–all of it is at stake on February 13. As the nation looks to Long Island to see which way we will go, we’ve got to make it clear–**we need a government that can solve our problems and get things done!**

[_**So Peter, I’m humbly asking–with so much on the line and the whole nation watching, will you rush a split donation right away to help me win this special election and elect Democrats around the country?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78642531/454007956/-349024561?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-02-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5YmRhNDM0LWE0YzYtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UDaTmu6Y28HJO6LwLr2PTZniPjcZe_SR7E4ddKra0yw=)

name: David Hogg
subject: Young people are FED UP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Hey friend, it’s David Hogg.
It’s pretty simple. Young people are FED UP with the cowards in our government who sit back and let our planet burn and kids are slaughtered in school all as Republicans say that the government can’t do anything only to go on and prove it by making it not work—so we’re stepping up to do something about it.
We’re just a few weeks into 2024, but Gen Z candidates are already rising up to run for office , grow our ranks in the halls of power, and fight with urgency to change the trajectory of our future.
But at the same time, special interest groups, far-right extremists, and those hoarding power are so determined to maintain the status quo that they will spend millions of dollars to keep Gen Z candidates from winning.
Leaders We Deserve is fighting back . We’re recruiting, training, organizing, and financially investing in young progressives running for office. But the scale of our efforts (including exactly how many candidates we’re able to support) depends on how much we’re able to raise.
Can you help us fulfill our mission of electing the leaders we deserve this November? Make a split contribution to Leaders We Deserve and Serve America now! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd]
Thank you!!!
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd]

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: Abortion will flip Florida blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
help us flip Florida blue [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Friend, I'm furious. Just last month, Florida activists secured hundreds of thousands of signatures to put codifying reproductive rights on the ballot this November [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
But now, far-right extremists are SUING to remove this question from the ballot — and following Tuesday’s hearing, the Florida Supreme Court case could issue a ruling as soon as TODAY!
Unfortunately, this is just the latest example of out-of-touch extremists trying to silence Florida voters. From abortion rights to voting rights, whether in the state house in Tallahassee or on the Senate floor in Washington, our leaders are forcing their extreme agenda on Florida families.
Ya no màs — enough is enough. I refuse to stand for it. That’s why I'm running for Senate to defeat Rick Scott, restore abortion rights nationwide, and give Florida the leadership that we deserve. And now, with all eyes on our state, I'm counting on you to stand with me: Please, will you split $10 between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand’s midnight tonight to help me flip Florida blue and fight for families? [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_dmp?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=10]
f you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Debbie Mucarsel-Powell and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately:
