Dave and I couldn’t be prouder of Sarah. I know that’s a line every parent says about their child, but it doesn’t make it any less true. Sarah is a hard worker, compassionate, and brave, but our entire family also knows that it’s only in our state of neighbors that her story is even possible. It’s Sarah’s qualities and Delaware’s values that allowed her to pass a landmark nondiscrimination law, win a seat in the Delaware State Senate, and helped her usher in paid family and medical leave, gun safety, and protections for workers across our state. Throughout Sarah’s life, we’ve seen the big hearts that fill our small state. It’s why Sarah loves this state so deeply (she even calls herself a “Statriot”). And it’s why she’s so committed to delivering for all of us. **I said this before, but it bears repeating — I don’t know anyone who will work harder for our state than Sarah.** [November is right around the corner. There’s no time to waste, Sarah needs your help to run a barrier-breaking, history-making campaign for Congress. Rush a donation of $10 or whatever you can today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78644088/454011329/-735822927?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20240208_fr_Sal_surr_oc_act_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGIxYmUzZi1hNmM2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UOb81jHLYflcjkk95rApoSVc65uMLp9THuhynuoRikg=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

It’s Sarah’s qualities and Delaware’s values that allowed her to pass a landmark nondiscrimination law, win a seat in the Delaware State Senate, and helped her usher in paid family and medical leave, gun safety, and protections for workers across our state. Throughout Sarah’s life, we’ve seen the big hearts that fill our small state. It’s why Sarah loves this state so deeply (she even calls herself a “Statriot”). And it’s why she’s so committed to delivering for all of us. I said this before, but it bears repeating — I don’t know anyone who will work harder for our state than Sarah. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = In thanks, Sal McBride aka Sarah’s Mom = = | Sarah McBride serves her home state in the Delaware State Senate, where she has passed historic paid leave, gun safety, and nondiscrimination laws. If elected, Sarah will be the first openly trans member of Congress, which means extremists are lining up to attack her. She needs our help to stand up to their hatred. = | = | Paid for by McBride for Delaware McBride for Delaware P.O. Box 1904 Wilmington, DE 19899 United States Emails like this are important to stay in touch with supporters and raise crucial funds. If you no longer want to receive these emails from us, please . Want to stay involved with Sarah's campaign? , update your information, and we'll send you fewer fundraising emails.

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Mayorkas is on the ropes!
body:
We can still impeach Mayorkas
| | Fellow American, The House of Representatives voted on my articles of impeachment against Alejandro Mayorkas for his gross dereliction of duty as Secretary of Homeland Security. The vote was headed towards a tie but one heroic Republican switched his vote from "Yes" to "No" at the final moments. This procedural move allows us to bring another vote to the floor next week.

And with Majority Leader Steve Scalise returning before next week we will have the votes to ensure Alejandro Mayorkas is IMPEACHED! But I'm worried some House Republicans may get cold feet. _**So we must do everything possible to hold the line at this moment.**_ [**We cannot afford to have a single Republican flip their vote and I am running out of resources to fend off the Left's attacks while leading this fight so I am calling for a MASSIVE show of support from grassroots conservatives.**](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=98afbe5386584027a25e7e8ab1cf4e08&_e=lJiAeWGGUrIPdeZFqUxMx1DLnsQc8Mox2ByPolX5zQKJEC-fHwUK14S0fR45WckJ-hUieclI3KD4GpqUDC7GH_wjvyuB8wROHRm6zkvYUIa2nNamvkoLauqdSyWE7Eo9z2Wg7bZ5-ApmElSp4MQ9CHTt0i2mKHVjTIJM02jf4Zizev3yj8aoGycQ662PWBBctG6zrmGIELEzOKEz3YJsFCjx1yWUIkgXOICSGCUCo7g3XMnqd1gnXWxZ9JPI8VjFumMkSIx2W0uSFQjJwGXea9t5K6r2P5YUGiXnc2e3EbSDvzFVXgSRL_spYgX7z32-HNqbttCI_egS3yPsQSlXWw%3D%3D)

| [ **EMERGENCY SUPPORT** ](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=98afbe5386584027a25e7e8ab1cf4e08&_e=lJiAeWGGUrIPdeZFqUxMx1DLnsQc8Mox2ByPolX5zQKJEC-fHwUK14S0fR45WckJ-hUieclI3KD4GpqUDC7GH_wjvyuB8wROHRm6zkvYUIa2nNamvkoLauqdSyWE7Eo9z2Wg7bZ5-ApmElSp4MQ9CHTt0i2mKHVjTIJM02jf4ZhPq22cK04U3pm3POLh8ha-kseej2VMw3rHFvPbqBvdgjRrrZbwFPZi17LTQ4GWA-AFlGZN7fYh4a5U_qt40ffJtZmcm8koxQJgDrB5bQ663IjSp1GPJej8NVMQrRLujLgIEOt1R8kgBoNGl-S-4c1md5TAJ302V5PFGDUmNm2sGw%3D%3D)

This is a do-or-die moment for our country. **If we fail, illegal immigrants from the world 's worst prisons, insane asylums, and terrorist groups will continue to flood into our country with little to no resistance from the Biden Administration.** We have no choice but to use the constitutional power entrusted to us to IMPEACH Mayorkas for his enabling of the invasion at our Southern Border, and as it stands now, we're ready to do that next week. [**Please, I 'm urgently asking you to help me hold the line and deliver this impeachment vote for the future of our country.**](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=98afbe5386584027a25e7e8ab1cf4e08&_e=lJiAeWGGUrIPdeZFqUxMx1DLnsQc8Mox2ByPolX5zQKJEC-fHwUK14S0fR45WckJ-hUieclI3KD4GpqUDC7GH_wjvyuB8wROHRm6zkvYUIa2nNamvkoLauqdSyWE7Eo9z2Wg7bZ5-ApmElSp4MQ9CHTt0i2mKHVjTIJM02jf4ZhNpNOkStDkEvtgvtFB8fiDDGQ0E27abCkExwVhM5Xo03xg6Pl-BYqruo5JsKuZwuMsUHrbmL9kMDhdpFOyI-QdKOeTGl7u7EGuMJfcOlGthLUbgWW3-JIlRPSWgGjYCVOQDH4dRykyh60yuxZXMqD2AiTLTgLxedugTlDIxQQl0g%3D%3D) We cannot lose this fight, there is too much on the line. I need grassroots patriots to stand up right now and reclaim what the Open Border Extremists in the Democrat party have stolen from us: our sovereignty. The time to stand and fight is now, Fellow American. _Talk soon,_ Marjorie Taylor Greene
| [ ](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=98afbe5386584027a25e7e8ab1cf4e08&_e=lJiAeWGGUrIPdeZFqUxMx1DLnsQc8Mox2ByPolX5zQKJEC-fHwUK14S0fR45WckJ-hUieclI3KD4GpqUDC7GH_wjvyuB8wROHRm6zkvYUIa2nNamvkoLauqdSyWE7Eo9z2Wg7bZ5-ApmElSp4MQ9CHTt0i2mKHVjTIJM02jf4ZhL5JEa89xvMFgmq70g4qs829YsG3CYLI3olZ-5Yvr6IpOQvkpSFimmPtkKUOsshhpP7-su0kARfWyZBzVPJFjpRmCMWyZZJQ4jXU1fs1WRlq_SqcbRaRrTBB_YY1KdFGIik5mNeVPObN4zz3OLo4FusItmZjpmcScXq7alIqmmcQ%3D%3D)

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

|
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=df7047b856924410a8c32db645e30068&_t=yg13LLgxWJ6rn9vdu564eApkDG-jV1U1ZuiH9o1VHO1dE-UgSdinUR7zMM2n1bxicSGI9SAnilD3O1YAIPczKbF_PfaktUkrs5iqCiE3cqI%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=df7047b856924410a8c32db645e30068&_t=yg13LLgxWJ6rn9vdu564eApkDG-jV1U1ZuiH9o1VHO1dE-UgSdinUR7zMM2n1bxicSGI9SAnilD3O1YAIPczKbF_PfaktUkrs5iqCiE3cqI%3D)

|
I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=df7047b856924410a8c32db645e30068&_e=oZC4rL5PUc70QqdMgspAK5yGUtFlYwdSGeK4t4CMB3A0PKioLVhwM_Q_5krEakltcRuLeNZdoXb7s-aDRDmxI8Fu233H5oDUP7Q6gwBtLyK35NZvQW-48tXB_5FfYxM1f4UO-X5dGkFcw-DaoWFw1k0lkMfLLnPHTKfvQji9YVEsLVoqir7R4QrkYSRpztx_uZyjcuaU15Srfuaa76wTTCnCHKXgPxHEnZ_pCDuZ5Y_KNWopEdRUwLL4RZYpTr4nWTSxSjFR_2us1mDBMPCXNmsjGq_zl-giUFNtaiPb-xOWQlza_-rn7osXDh5RV5DfVLOz2E_ecbKszK7kghFOKnojyrR18N6TshdzkY-uEWF5FPVZhMXOoZZl8pczQn3X "STAND WITH RYAN")
---

So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now,](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=df7047b856924410a8c32db645e30068&_e=oZC4rL5PUc70QqdMgspAK5yGUtFlYwdSGeK4t4CMB3A0PKioLVhwM_Q_5krEakltcRuLeNZdoXb7s-aDRDmxI8Fu233H5oDUP7Q6gwBtLyK35NZvQW-48tXB_5FfYxM1f4UO-X5dGkFcw-DaoWFw1k0lkMfLLnPHTKfvQji9YVEsLVoqir7R4QrkYSRpztx_uZyjcuaU15Srfuaa76wTTCnCHKXgPxHEnZ_pCDuZ5Y-ioQTbONS3a1CbGY-g6Dub_E6uOVTcaNsKCtqi6ryV6iCIA_JEYFet3BXjkW4H-MrU9Ar9urJiBvfr5kDTTzjAX_FhNVuirQFCi3juhZwzEeEQ8fJtDO8xqFl1ZgvpYsjSi2RrjT305nrYczKsWT1- "If you chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?
---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=df7047b856924410a8c32db645e30068&_e=oZC4rL5PUc70QqdMgspAK5yGUtFlYwdSGeK4t4CMB3A0PKioLVhwM_Q_5krEakltcRuLeNZdoXb7s-aDRDmxI8Fu233H5oDUP7Q6gwBtLyK35NZvQW-48tXB_5FfYxM1f4UO-X5dGkFcw-DaoWFw1k0lkMfLLnPHTKfvQji9YVEsLVoqir7R4QrkYSRpztx_uZyjcuaU15Srfuaa76wTTCnCHKXgPxHEnZ_pCDuZ5Y-2aP_PjYIbtxAIXl6IZfa2n3nXk7lXTqeyMPV-I2yc_V8Cus0zi8Fd4wtXEWd7W0ZU9zaNICfGDHkURmhMhHI7Za59_VnSQQq-pWT33JR1gFvCawsxq6VTyP7UbfXaPrfoehNAtmG7wR-C-WUI83Os "DONATE TODAY")
---
You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: My Letter To James Lankford On Behalf Of Oklahoma Published By The Oklahoma City Sentinel
body:
Letter To Lankford I have written a letter to Oklahoma Senator James Lankford that I think you should take 3 minutes to read and to share. This has
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6475826.2316.1.52bf261203dbbee4f2c2397b74d0f6e2) |
---
## Letter To Lankford
---
I have written a [letter](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6475826.2317.1.d7eaef6615f19c4bfceae930040f33d1) to **Oklahoma Senator James Lankford** that I think you should take 3 minutes to read and to share. This has been published by the [Oklahoma City Sentinel](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6475826.2318.1.71cb766aab99c9f6613c7abc3d97cb68) Read it here: [https://www.citynewsokc.com/government/letter-to-senator-james-lankford-of-oklahoma-youve-got-it-oh-so-wrong/article_8fdc4abb-d3aa-580b-abcd-68e0b45c0e74.html](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6475826.2319.1.e958241af163edd85bb4f13b812898c0)
---
| | [ Read: Letter To Lankford ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6475826.2320.1.b17f6d9df98e48dbd4c5950df1d4d32c)
---
---
## Lankford MUST RESIGN
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6475826.2321.1.d9ea479421fcd54ce9a1c778916fe781)
---
Last night, _Pseudo-Republican_ [James Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6475826.2322.1.24b90c315f374149c20d213dbb02634d) released the contents of the highly anticipated "**Border Bill**." **It is worse than what many thought it would be.** Currently, [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6475826.2323.1.f30bb15ae43388b3b00a90cf87e9ceff) is trending on X (aka Twitter) for all the wrong reasons... being dismantled by **Speaker Mike Johnson** , **Matt Gaetz** , **Donald Trump Jr** and so many others. This "Bill" is nothing more than an **open borders bill** which **increases green cards by 50,000/year** , **gives immediate work permits to every illegal released from custody** and also **sends another $60,000,000,000.00 to Ukraine**... It does not surprise me that [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6475826.2324.1.2f85cbfbbd97f9147aadb3790fecdd8d) is carrying the water for the Democratic Party. In 2022, I tried to sound the alarm in Oklahoma about the [www.realJamesLankford.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6475826.2325.1.fbee7b567ead26f4d6827cb64b681fde) with the help of **General Michael Flynn** , **Roger Stone** , **Mayor Rudy Giuliani** and **nearly 100,000 Oklahoma Republicans**. Our effort was _unsuccessful_ at the time. However, people are seeing the [www.realJamesLakford.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6475826.2326.1.7f1a1ba3d412e9f0b759fb0fdd6ba9a6) right now. Today, President Trump BLASTED the Border Bill and Lankford.
---
|
---
It is clear that [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6475826.2327.1.c01a333fbb76e3a3ee2a89d0a4bf4c17) is doing his very best to try and keep **Donald Trump** from winning in 2024.
[Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6475826.2328.1.e52f79a67dcf9f0080fe48347022dbf0) has been and is a NEVER-TRUMPER.
What is sad is the fact that before the bill was released, [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6475826.2329.1.197db94db9d7d0d4a34f5282df2238c5) did a national and local blitz on news stations lying about the contents of the bill...
|
---
|
---

The story covered by the AP about [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6475826.2339.1.509ed21f10b7b1dbddbffd36df3a0811) believing a 13 year old can consent to sex to coverup crimes under his watch at Falls Creek is just the tip of the iceberg.

Hogwash
My opponent, Rep. Jack Bergman made wildly exaggerated claims about the dangers of 'gotaways' at the Southern Border. We need border security and immigration reform , but his reckless statements are embarrassing America.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bobvsbergman24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bobvsbergman24]
Your contributions are helping Democrat Dr. Bob Lorinser bring dignity and integrity back to the seat for Michigan's First District. If you've saved your payment information with Act Blue Express, your donation will process immediately:

Friend,
Hogwash. BS. Baloney. Malarkey. My team and I tried to find the best politically correct synonym for the word we all know I'm trying to say.
Jack Bergman is lying on the House floor. Big blatant lies.
Based on the Homeland Security Republican's own website, out of 2.4 million encounters at the Southwest border in FY 2023, only 169 individuals appear on terrorist watchlists.
This is just 0.007%, likely a ratio similar to the 'gotaways'. The crime rate for undocumented immigrants is less than 1%, just as it is for citizens.
Bergman's claims of a potential 100% of one million people are absolutely baseless.
Border Security and immigration reform are essential to our nation, but Bergman is purposefully denying solutions because border chaos is better for GOP elections.
Facts matter, and my opponent's statement yesterday was intellectually dishonest and morally wrong.
Help me replace him.
-Dr. Bob
Bob Lorinser

Democrat, MI01

clean_body: With just 117 days until primary day in Montana, I'm becoming concerned that I’m not doing a good enough job explaining how important this race is. | | Fellow Conservative, It’s Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy with a quick question for you today: Are my messages getting through? If my inbox is any indication, your email account has been flooded with requests for help since late last summer. Unfortunately, winning elected office is a long process that gets more expensive every election cycle. And when wealthy Democrat donors can cut blank checks to Chuck Schumer’s super PACs supporting my liberal opponent, cutting through the noise becomes even more difficult. I must be honest with you: This is not only bad for my campaign, it’s bad for Republican’s prospects of flipping the Senate. With just 117 days to go until the primary, I need your help. Like all Navy SEALs, I’m competitive and goal-oriented. This race is simply too important to lose. Fellow Conservative, if you donate $10 to my campaign today, If you donate $50 to my campaign, If you donate $100 to my campaign, Please be generous because $570: The amount my campaign raised online when I announced that we’d been outraised by Jon Tester last quarter. $1,166: The amount my campaign raised online when I emailed supporters that Washington D.C. Democrats reserved more than $27 MILLION in attack ads to be aired in Montana. I’m worried we won’t have the resources to come out on top. What is it going to take to get you involved in my race? I may not be a household name, but that doesn’t mean the campaign I’m running isn’t one of the most important of the cycle. I need to make sure that every conservative in the country understands the chaos that will ensue if we don’t flip this seat in November. Derek, Just a couple of weeks ago, I wrote to you to share how our Democrat-led Virginia Senate defeated Republican bills that tried to weaken voting rights in the Commonwealth. Unfortunately, other states don’t have this Democratic stronghold like we do here in Virginia. In Arkansas, Texas, Louisiana, and Georgia, Republican state officials are attempting to erode the Voting Rights Act, specifically a key portion that is critical in fighting discriminatory maps and voting laws. __[**If we want to stop Republican-controlled states from doing away with the Voting Rights Act, we need to expand our Democratic Senate majority. Will you pitch in $5 to help me get it done?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78647928/454023615/1445489826?refcode=mw_em_240208_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGVlMTliMi1hY2M2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ujY-0fgdpS1NfsOf9gZQ33SUCpe2Z7ABSjkc1y0ROJQ=)__ Our Democratic allies in GOP-controlled states can only thwart these attacks for so long. They need our help in Washington to protect federal voting protections and make sure that voters all across the nation have fair and equal access to the ballot box. The Voting Rights Act is under attack this year, Derek. We need more Democrats in Congress who will fight to preserve it. **__[**So I’m asking: Can you contribute $5 to fuel my work to elect more Democrats to Congress this year so we can protect the right to vote for all Americans?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78647929/454023616/1445489826?refcode=mw_em_240208_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGVlMTliMi1hY2M2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ujY-0fgdpS1NfsOf9gZQ33SUCpe2Z7ABSjkc1y0ROJQ=)__** Thank you, Mark Warner ********[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78647930/454023617/1445489826?refcode=mw_em_240208_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGVlMTliMi1hY2M2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ujY-0fgdpS1NfsOf9gZQ33SUCpe2Z7ABSjkc1y0ROJQ=)********

subject: 🚨 STOP SB 5770 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Senate Democrats are attempting to triple your property taxes.

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .

Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570

clean_body: Senate Democrats are attempting to triple your property taxes. Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd! With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms. We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! () State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. () Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press: “We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions. “Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative." Read the full statement. () Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here () . Contact: Steve Johnson Communications Director Washington State Republican Party (425) 460-0570 steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org) ============================================================

That means less time to fundraise for state Democrats AND less time to hit our February goal of 10,000 members. In just five days, state Democrats are up against an all-important special election to break the tie in the Pennsylvania House. Losing this race means handing control to extreme Republicans, so our Democratic partners on the ground need every resource possible to mount the strongest campaign in this notorious battleground county. That’s where you come in. Our membership team is growing each year, and we’re striving to make 2024 our biggest year yet – but we need you by our side. Becoming an Official 2024 DLCC Member is the best step you can take to help elect state Democrats and build a better future in the states. There are only five days left to get voters to the polls, spread the word about our Republican opponent’s extreme agenda, and defend our Democratic majority in the Pennsylvania House. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Let's do this, DLCC Membership Team The information provided above is associated with the following email address: dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you have donated in the past with a different email, by check, or to another organization or party committee, that will not be reflected here. We appreciate your continued support! | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by DLCC PAC. Dlcc.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates. We're fighting to elect Democrats and advance a progressive vision in the states. name: Joe Biden
subject: I am not trying to scare you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Peter, tonight, Republicans will caucus again. This time in Nevada. | | |
---
Peter, tonight, Republicans will caucus again. This time in Nevada. And -- just like after the GOP primaries in Iowa and New Hampshire -- Donald Trump will come out on top. (It helps that he’s the only person on the ballot, but that’s beside the point.) Listen, I am not trying to scare you. But Donald Trump will be the Republican nominee. I do need to underscore again: The stakes of this election could not be higher. _Our democracy._ _Our personal freedoms, from the right to choose to the right to vote._ _Our economy, which has seen the strongest recovery in the world since COVID._ _**It’s all at stake.**_ So as Republicans head to vote in Nevada, I am asking: [**Can I count on you to make a $25 contribution to ensure Donald Trump does not win four more years in the White House? Your support is critical to powering my campaign to victory, so I’m hoping you will consider chipping in for the first time today.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZCmRjvHgikzZ_Ok_dYKuJpUIh2BEiW1VirfP4vpAhfiKioCqrPlAglYw1iUv7AokWUXNw0c34yTKJNfIzCS9g4g5KAkLy398G4UnTnXHy0ZIAg4p3UTzly430VSIEogmIkmZ37-ypy-rWyx81eoSUsttVAf-hjXF-5MUHSk8q8i30TAomMXbOx88uteDdB_ik3Mg3b4UBJQifZ1WbkdtQtMTUiCDdzmZ-9qx1Ps92-4xblCHlLjqnkV-FxZwlf9nR8r0_OJaTs7iT8jFwDPnqRiv71sbF6_fs_hdzjFDqyuBVtoczgDPWPbn9oBUMbta6PpgPAlmeE7wuyxHZz9B5L_Dx0tg-HbbfTCqvVsjTb0w/43o/Fhy0LuPRRU62XHg4CrBXYQ/h0/CC1xYOWJe5v1k6C2RPUaJT-sC9ZKptT4JnwR5oo3WBE) | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2052568&post_id=141479649&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQxNDc5NjQ5LCJpYXQiOjE3MDc0MTc1NjAsImV4cCI6MTcxMDAwOTU2MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIwNTI1NjgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Kkj2sSjARCUIciIflQWGJeoanipC7dP0HQnynysTyTM&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2052568&post_id=141479649&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQxNDc5NjQ5LCJpYXQiOjE3MDc0MTc1NjAsImV4cCI6MTcxMDAwOTU2MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIwNTI1NjgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Kkj2sSjARCUIciIflQWGJeoanipC7dP0HQnynysTyTM)

| | [](https://substack..25epg3VfcagKUQqGNoN2CRcs7b0no5q2y4q6TJsfJ3w?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/katieporteroc/p/housing-for-all?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)
---
I just released my **Housing for All plan** --to urgently build more homes, bring down and stabilize rental costs, and increase homeownership opportunities for Californians.
Housing is the top issue for Californians, but career politicians in Washington have been too slow to provide solutions. I saw this firsthand as a consumer protection attorney on the front lines of the foreclosure crisis, and now as a parent who doesn't want my kids to leave California just because they can't afford to live here. **My Housing for All plan is below, or you can watch me break it down on my whiteboard:**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b6160944-b29b-482d-b957-6e465fd388d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Here are the ten points of the Housing for All plan:
1. **Create a Select Committee on Housing:** Despite a decades-long housing crisis, Congress has no committee solely focused on increasing housing and reducing costs. I'll create and lead a committee that delivers the housing solutions that California's communities and families need, not just what boosts Wall Street's profits.

2. **Urgently increase the supply of homes for purchase:** California needs more homes to drive down prices, and Washington needs to step up to the plate. It's virtually impossible to develop starter homes profitably and at scale. Incredibly, there are no federal subsidies for the construction or renovation of homes, such as triplexes, townhomes, or even single-family homes, that are ideal for first-time home buyers. I'll push for improved tax credits and government loan guarantees, which will spur Wall Street to provide financing for increasing homeownership opportunities for our workforce.

3. **Washington must close the housing gap for low-income families:** Millions of Californians do not earn enough to pay for housing and other necessities. This affordability bind pushes people into homelessness or housing instability. I will fully fund housing rental vouchers for the most severely housing-burdened families. To address the wealth inequalities that limit first-time homeowners, particularly people of color, we should make a federal investment in tools like down payment assistance and interest rate buy-downs. With these tools, low-income families contribute to their housing cost, and taxpayers avoid the staggering costs of homelessness and housing insecurity.

4. **Unleash private capital for home construction:** In the 1930s, Congress established government-sponsored enterprises (today known as Fannie Mae, Freddie Mac, and Ginnie Mae) to connect Wall Street capital to everyday Americans, who previously could not get mortgages. The result was a rocketing homeownership rate. We must expand these structures to guarantee and securitize the construction of one-to-four unit starter homes. With strong oversight, these agencies can tap into global capital markets to scale up the construction of modest-density homes that working families can afford to buy. These agencies already backstop large multi-family rental housing for corporate landlords. Everyday Californians deserve the benefit of the same tools to ratchet up homeownership opportunities.
5. **Break down local barriers:** Solving the housing crisis requires all levels of government to engage. We should give incentives to communities that make it cheaper to build all the kinds of housing Californians need. Costs go up when cities require certain home styles or building materials, or impose oppressive rules like mandatory parking requirements. Lack of access to infrastructure, like sewage and utilities, prevents the construction of new housing at the necessary scale or cost. I will reward cities that enact reforms, dramatically increasing housing development at all price levels, which will, in turn, open up modestly priced homes to new homebuyers.
6. **Unlock government land:** We need to stop the hostage race on increasing land values. I will press federal, state, and local agencies to release large swaths of buildable land that they own. I'll make these agencies explain why they aren't making these lands available for housing and provide incentives for state and local governments to release these lands for development.

7. **Encourage innovative homebuyer programs:** Innovative mortgage lending programs can stop house prices from spiraling out of control for Californians. We should make it easier to form "land trusts," in which communities and homebuyers share in the value of home appreciation. The land trust's share of the appreciation is then used to lower entry costs for future homeowners in the development, creating a virtuous cycle of affordable homeownership for the future. Federal funds could help expand the California Dream for All shared appreciation loan, a successful and creative program to lower barriers to homeownership.

8. **Develop leases for Californians with fixed incomes:** I will support new kinds of leases that help Californians who aren't served well by traditional rental agreements. Seniors should be able to put down a small portion of their retirement savings in exchange for locking in long-term rental rates that don't outpace Social Security's cost of living adjustments. We will develop a government-backed program for four-year leases that allow college students to lock in rental costs during their studies.

9. **Invest in modern home manufacturing technologies** : We have been manufacturing traditional "stick and brick" homes the same way for decades. I'll make it easier for builders to develop and use the latest manufacturing techniques, like 3-D printed homes, which can reduce the cost of producing homes by 30% or more - and create high-paying, union jobs. These modern techniques are energy-efficient and use climate-resilient materials.

10. **Protect homebuyers from Wall Street greed:** Increasingly, Wall Street firms are buying up houses, putting homeownership out of reach for families. These companies use their wealth to get more loan favorable terms than families can find, force prospective homeowners into renting because of a shortage of homes for sale, and relentlessly drive up rental prices to satisfy their investors. We should tax firms that buy up large numbers of homes, stopping this calamitous trend and incentivizing Wall Street to put these houses back on the market for everyday Californians.

I've made housing the top issue of my campaign since day one because Californians can't wait any longer. Washington must act, and I'll lead the fight to get this done.
Thanks for following along,
Katie Porter

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78649598/454030062/1033648996?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODJjYzYxYWYtYjFjNi1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pfpb4vqn5bRZpMUfJEjQtPlCQQH9SQLuz0aOHByY4uE=)
Peter,

**One year ago today, I officially launched my campaign to keep CA-47 blue!**

We’ve come a long way, and I am so proud of the grassroots, people-powered campaign we have built in the past year. Thousands of supporters have joined our team as volunteers and donors, and have plugged into this race because they believe in my vision for Orange County.

I am incredibly humbled by the support we have received. In these next critical weeks before our March 5th primary election, I will be counting on you more than ever.

**[Will you celebrate the one-year mark of our campaign with a donation of $3.65 or any amount today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78649599/454030063/1033648996?refcode=em-2.8.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODJjYzYxYWYtYjFjNi1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pfpb4vqn5bRZpMUfJEjQtPlCQQH9SQLuz0aOHByY4uE=)**
| ****[Donate $3.65](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78649600/454030064/1033648996?refcode=em-2.8.24-all-a&amount=3.65&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODJjYzYxYWYtYjFjNi1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pfpb4vqn5bRZpMUfJEjQtPlCQQH9SQLuz0aOHByY4uE=)****
---

Registered voters in CA-47 are already receiving their ballots for our primary election.

**It is no secret that the national GOP sees CA-47 as a top seat they need to flip red to maintain power of the House majority.**

Not on my watch, Peter. CA-47 deserves a leader in Congress who is focused on the big challenges facing our community – _from women’s reproductive rights, to protecting our coastlines, to safeguarding health care access, and much more._

**[With less than a month until Election Day, will you chip in $3 or any amount to help boost our voter outreach efforts? I’m the only candidate in this race who hasn’t accepted a dime of corporate PAC money, so it’s donations like yours that powers us forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78649601/454030065/1033648996?refcode=em-2.8.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODJjYzYxYWYtYjFjNi1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pfpb4vqn5bRZpMUfJEjQtPlCQQH9SQLuz0aOHByY4uE=)**

clean_body: | = Peter, One year ago today, I officially launched my campaign to keep CA-47 blue! We’ve come a long way, and I am so proud of the grassroots, people-powered campaign we have built in the past year. Thousands of supporters have joined our team as volunteers and donors, and have plugged into this race because they believe in my vision for Orange County. I am incredibly humbled by the support we have received. In these next critical weeks before our March 5th primary election, I will be counting on you more than ever. = | **= Registered voters in CA-47 are already receiving their ballots for our primary election. It is no secret that the national GOP sees CA-47 as a top seat they need to flip red to maintain power of the House majority. Not on my watch, Peter. CA-47 deserves a leader in Congress who is focused on the big challenges facing our community – from women’s reproductive rights, to protecting our coastlines, to safeguarding health care access, and much more. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** In unity, Joanna | Joanna's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. name: Eric, Katie, Pourobee (Katie Porter Finance Team)
subject: Our job is a little different than most
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Working in “campaign finance” usually means long days of “call time” with a candidate, where a politician spends hours dialing for dollars.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=37410%2E3422442%2El5EcFK)
Hey Derek,
This is Eric, Katie K., and Pourobee, and we make up Katie Porter’s small but mighty fundraising team.
Working in “campaign finance” usually means long days of “call time” with a candidate, where a politician spends _hours_ dialing for dollars. **Usually, candidates are asking for checks of $5,000 or more per person, and oftentimes lobbyists and corporate PACs are first on the call list.**
Because Katie doesn’t take corporate PAC or federal lobbyist money, we do things differently. 85% of our fundraising comes from our online fundraising program—which includes emails like these, texts, and ads that ask people to contribute, and **99% of all our contributions are of $100 or less.**
That’s something we’re proud of (and Katie is leading the way for other candidates to do the same). But there’s a real downside to running a grassroots-funded campaign: it can be volatile.
Just take a look at our ActBlue this week:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240208-1?refcode=em20240208-37410&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37410_3422442_l5EcFK&akid=37410%2E3422442%2El5EcFK)Our fundraising really fluctuates based on the news cycle and how supporters respond to our messaging. **But with just 26 days until our primary, we really can’t afford these slow days**. They have a real and immediate effect at this point in the race—bad days mean we have to scale back our ads.
[**That’s why we’re asking if you can donate $5 today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240208-1?refcode=em20240208-37410&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37410_3422442_l5EcFK&akid=37410%2E3422442%2El5EcFK) Your support will allow us to reach the more than **four million voters** who we believe are still undecided about who they’ll support in this race.
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240208-1?refcode=em20240208-37410&refcode2=37410_3422442_l5EcFK&akid=37410%2E3422442%2El5EcFK)
Thanks so much for being the reason we’re going to send Katie Porter to the U.S. Senate!
Eric, Katie K., Pourobee
Finance Team
Katie Porter for Senate

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20240208-37410&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=37410_3422442_l5EcFK&akid=37410%2E3422442%2El5EcFK)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=37410%2E3422442%2El5EcFK)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=37410%2E3422442%2El5EcFK)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
subject: 2 Done, 48 More to Go. Can I count on you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
I’m facing the biggest challenge to my campaign, and I need your immediate help.

|
---
| | | **I’m facing the biggest challenge to my campaign, and I need your immediate help.
**
---
|
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=challenge_2_08_24_email_1_1_nd&n=1)
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=challenge_2_08_24_email_1_1_nd&n=2)
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=challenge_2_08_24_email_1_1_nd&n=3)
---
|
---
Dear Peter,
When I declared my independence from the two-party Washington establishment and announced my campaign for President, I knew it would be an all-out fight.
I knew the Democrat and Republican establishments would stop at nothing to try and block my campaign every step of the way.
And I knew I couldn’t do any of this without friends like you. _Thank you for giving our campaign a chance to earn your vote._
Right now, I’m facing the biggest challenge to my campaign, [and I’m writing because I need your immediate help](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=challenge_2_08_24_email_1_1_nd&n=4).
I must get my name on the ballot in all 50 states and the District of Columbia.
The whole process will cost my campaign nearly [$20 million](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=challenge_2_08_24_email_1_1_nd&n=5) as we fight state by state to get on the ballot.
That’s why I’m asking you to help support my campaign today.
Will you rush a special and urgently needed donation to [Team Kennedy](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=challenge_2_08_24_email_1_1_nd&n=6) today? [Your best gift today](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=challenge_2_08_24_email_1_1_nd&n=7) will be a huge boost in our fight to get my name on every ballot – including yours.
[CONTRIBUTE $5 >>](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=challenge_2_08_24_email_1_1_nd&n=8)
[CONTRIBUTE $10 >>](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=10&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=challenge_2_08_24_email_1_1_nd&n=9)
[CONTRIBUTE $24 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=24&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=challenge_2_08_24_email_1_1_nd&n=10)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=100&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=challenge_2_08_24_email_1_1_nd&n=11)
[CONTRIBUTE $240 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=240&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=challenge_2_08_24_email_1_1_nd&n=12)
[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=challenge_2_08_24_email_1_1_nd&n=13)
The good news is I just qualified to be on the ballot in Utah, and my campaign acquired the signatures needed for me to qualify in New Hampshire – _in one day!_
The bad news is – we’ve only just begun. And we have a lot to do – _in a very short amount of time._
Getting on the ballot as an independent presidential candidate is a huge uphill fight.
Democrat and Republican candidates barely break a sweat. They cruise to ballot access, maybe paying a small filing fee or having to turn in a handful of signatures.
My campaign, however, must get more than 1,000,000 petition signatures.
With all the deadlines coming up so fast, we may have to hire petitioners to help out as well – which will be very expensive.
And there’s no doubt that my campaign will rack up millions of dollars in legal fees because of the roadblocks before us.
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=challenge_2_08_24_email_1_1_nd&n=14)
|
---
Democracy is much more than voting.
There’s so much at stake in this election.
[Please help out all you can.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=challenge_2_08_24_email_1_1_nd&n=15) Thank you!
| |
---
---
Sincerely,
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
|
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=challenge_2_08_24_email_1_1_nd&n=16)
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y2F3NBqF5BJJJ4dLoTp9j7umB4CtvDL9QcHxwZkP_0TO&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=challenge_2_08_24_email_1_1_nd&n=17) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=h1LOxbVy26ImgEbXJVo-ZdMp9-e17RgxqtIk69rUIjeOqT1-oa6z7jeUAIaHEF2m&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=challenge_2_08_24_email_1_1_nd&n=18) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nQ2OSzJvbzn8H14UVJyZeU&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=challenge_2_08_24_email_1_1_nd&n=19) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvJMDEmDChn4crVEdym-uYEvPdkFBV9SaYXx39MwIdLI&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=challenge_2_08_24_email_1_1_nd&n=20) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzI54ka0wzIYPxyZaEWdcWSHecUzjTC_26r6_PMq84pDYNHmKWp713umpU1ZYCPsJg&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=challenge_2_08_24_email_1_1_nd&n=21)
---
| |

Would you like help donating?
Call: [805-728-9443](tel:8057289443) and you can get help from a campaign staffer.

| Fellow Conservative,

It looks like your name is still missing from my petition. Would you please take a moment to complete the very brief questionnaire now?

[**COMPLETE QUESTION 3 ->
**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c98a5bf6a157481db1b7a2be89823e3d&_e=-Ol4DLQxpISPJUXQ3I4LXLWcEB1igbVDAXD9qdyvEkx1H67f5tE0joHbrMT4el5ULZTcyxYLs09L1gyVYf9cCIp0Y6VJXqx8eK5wSrMjsJfyKPwHcrBdOPHnvq-RX-MKSecBbBDyzGDCriLCUPOIsz19dr_VVEKIL5_3B_Fwce-1_vfxBQNTCXYcdyGd4nOhND2mxbH2FLDBhQOoUpd3Dx1BpdOWSVNVvqSEAKZEhPlEeLNZuahb1Gzv5xFnT86LKirFJUcKqd3CRgGxbQ3S7LxZj-WV-CU0vmFmqD2F7bTvIgjct6Q1G4Nqj-GlQbCx6kS34_AlnUNciIMfYf86n-hT9zzVNq5fQXkdglTr8T6FhgHu_X_3pmDcQ6vFcizlffi9VQAyXdSAQBi9ejmuXcPJoYN9zbVcYt_pneXuDJE5ZgPze4XCuJIwg6QVSETxyI89IvlJmDsk7_HSPCR0y6Q2YLZ1Qo04ecSEiV9SJcs5gRl44CFdUfbHEJOkXI9UJS8tXWAlS0Z5Xu-k84x0ng%3D%3D)

**Democrats are doing everything they can to keep President Trump out of the 2024 Presidential election** ...from begging the courts to kick him off the ballot to pushing “gag orders” to try to silence him.

They are pulling out ALL the stops.

But clearly, it’s not working. **New polls show President Trump is ahead in 5 out of 6 swing states.**

In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

Today, the Supreme Court is hearing arguments to decide whether Trump’s incitement of insurrection on January 6th, 2021 is enough to keep him off of the ballot in 2024.
That attack was directed at our seat of government. Our Constitution. The peaceful transfer of power.
We swore an oath to defend that Constitution with our lives.
This is an important case, no doubt about it. But whatever the Supreme Court decides, we know our job:

name: Team Kaptur
subject: Proud to celebrate Black History Month with you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAPTUR FOR CONGRESS
body:
This month, we're recognizing Ohio trailblazers, heroes, and leaders who have made our communities, our state, and our nation better.

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78650011/454031742/1037629634?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=240208_team_BHM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2ZhNTQzMC1iM2M2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hO28UQejk7WL1WSyuKVGsCmVMvAO-nYj3iijO8wABdY=)
---
Happy Black History Month, friend! Ohioans have a lot to celebrate this month. Our state is the birthplace of Olympic gold medalist Jesse Owens, Nobel Prize-winner Toni Morrison, internationally renowned poet Paul Laurence Dunbar, and too many influential musicians to count. It was home to critical stops on the Underground Railroad, and numerous abolitionists and activists throughout our nation's history. To this day, Black Ohioans continue to break new ground in every field, in communities from Lake Erie to the Ohio River. We're so proud to celebrate and support them, this month and year-round. With you,
Team Kaptur

| Marcy Kaptur is the longest-serving woman in Congress. But right now Republicans are trying everything to steal this seat from her. Winning seats like this will be key for Democrats to hold onto our slim majority in Congress.

body:
Buckle up for some electrifying news! |
---
| | [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=3b390ea7ea&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| Peter,

I'm thrilled to share some exhilarating news from the heart of our campaign – Congressman Paul Gosar, a leading figure in the America First movement and a steadfast ally of President Trump,**has officially endorsed our campaign! **

_[But have you endorsed me yet?](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=9fc1d51b5c&e=273c9a71fb)_
[****](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=490e27ee71&e=273c9a71fb)
Congressman Gosar's endorsement is a pivotal moment for us, joining a growing list of distinguished patriots and leaders who are rallying behind our cause. His deep commitment to conservative ideals and his unwavering defense of American values make this endorsement a significant triumph for our campaign.

[**Join the Fight for America's Future:**](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=9dcb827e1c&e=273c9a71fb)
This endorsement is a clarion call for every patriot who dreams of a better America. We need you now more than ever. Whether you’ve previously endorsed our campaign or are looking for more ways to contribute, your support is crucial. Every effort counts in our journey to reclaim the values that define us as a nation.

Together, with the backing of allies like you, we can effect real change. Let's capitalize on this momentum to stand up for an America that cherishes liberty, justice, and the pursuit of happiness for all.

Thank you for standing with us. [With your support, bolstered by the endorsement of true American patriots like Congressman Gosar, we are on a path to victory.](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=82b439e358&e=273c9a71fb)

clean_body: Buckle up for some electrifying news! | | | | Peter, I'm thrilled to share some exhilarating news from the heart of our campaign – Congressman Paul Gosar, a leading figure in the America First movement and a steadfast ally of President Trump,has officially endorsed our campaign! Congressman Gosar's endorsement is a pivotal moment for us, joining a growing list of distinguished patriots and leaders who are rallying behind our cause. His deep commitment to conservative ideals and his unwavering defense of American values make this endorsement a significant triumph for our campaign. This endorsement is a clarion call for every patriot who dreams of a better America. We need you now more than ever. Whether you’ve previously endorsed our campaign or are looking for more ways to contribute, your support is crucial. Every effort counts in our journey to reclaim the values that define us as a nation. Together, with the backing of allies like you, we can effect real change. Let's capitalize on this momentum to stand up for an America that cherishes liberty, justice, and the pursuit of happiness for all. Thank you for standing with us. | | For Strong Leadership and Small Government, | | David Flippo, Lt. Col. (USAF Ret.) Rand Paul Says Dem Gov Could Win Mitch McConnell’s Senate Seat

Republican Sen. Rand Paul of Kentucky predicted Wednesday that
Democratic Gov. Andy Beshear could win the Senate seat held by Mitch
McConnell. Beshear defeated Republican Attorney General Daniel Cameron
in November to secure a second term as governor.

enough to drive — every weekday after football or track practice I
would take a San Francisco municipal transit bus from my high school
in the Sunset District to the corner of Haight and Stanyan streets.

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Update: Congress voting on Israel military funding
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Palestinians are not going anywhere. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTv18MHgyCx3scaiXAqjVsjbgavkaI5UrjrHxt1T352yyZLcy7Km-wFuoPANFfXeLfoMKzWmJeCiuhWwKZCYGrxuCI_mzKkIOTOnw3Uqw9c9UzSBR602TGS_kfsNtY8p5VAVr8ONFNSY49AlsIF2j49tvoQzRAYGojsYw-bsO2JZe80lk2fXyL9m8A4CxIq8xLVH1wy7eCSZaFkFvkSLgpKPQ/43o/686nv-b-SQ2wT3s9fFaSBQ/h0/R96Zn0fDGUqpRadT1d32UDcnFiN_hJciqMeED0vfX4Y)
---
Friend, This week, most members of the House of Representatives voted to send $17.6 billion U.S. taxpayer dollars to Israel’s military. The bill failed, because it needed a special two-thirds majority to pass. Yesterday, **most Senate Democrats voted for a bill that would send $14.1 billion to Israel’s military to drop more U.S. bombs on Palestinian children.** The bill would also have blocked U.S. funding for the UN agency supporting millions of Palestinian refugees with life-saving aid—all while the Israeli government intentionally starves people and attacks supply trucks heading into Gaza. The bill, which Biden supported, included far-right U.S. border policies that would end asylum protections, lock up more refugees, and speed up mass deportations. These cruel anti-immigrant policies were included as an attempt to get Republican support on the bill, which ultimately failed. Sadly, most of our government’s leaders don’t seem to see immigrants or people of Muslim faith or Arab heritage as human beings. **Although this week’s legislation didn’t pass, Democrats and Republicans in Congress are going to keep trying to hand over billions of American taxpayer dollars to Netanyahu’s genocidal regime.** **As the only Palestinian American in Congress, I will continue to speak up** , no matter how many times my colleagues try to censure me or police my words.**** I can’t stand by while the U.S. arms and enables genocide. [**Please donate today to help me show that Palestinians exist and we’re not going anywhere—no matter how many times they try to erase us.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSE7j4zav4AQ-1Zfft1ijDeGrcYI6yFV8ydt1wn6Fxv39tD6kTua2SEkUEWeZr0JiQ3UUOJsYdHQr_Sumb0b-8rJp_E5uLb3EN60vQp0L1AQh58KUUdtYTCP5TAQoXzSCRGVRdKO5WAk5Bk9x8v4ZyjEPWKg6YYk7H4f00BIG7Os0hZEPSQoRsknlQYUD3ltf9UPElX5BXrT7u-VY_syz4FWX8uQzm8ZcNgwew2tphYJrnBNL01cUa0FtqDpJs7SrdbUqeVGKGVa6Ci4UDwkd5grVCIrzjRFo5Ew26KVEUXvQY1JLPQDAGYmMovQoOnqT_15aODqIWfZpYhha31yqTlkbaN_OE4EZObODz0aVa2c1qxNRLV1OVTwROIrofzo4/43o/686nv-b-SQ2wT3s9fFaSBQ/h1/1-j24eDjyQoFiwIgwEKqfY82lm6QGf4SkcYrkri7i9k) | [DONATE TODAY](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSE7j4zav4AQ-1Zfft1ijDeGrcYI6yFV8ydt1wn6Fxv84FDvDJWZZIdjTPDwoCdnctDOQSzkWsOSaojF3QBAXA0W_3sg5TdcdduXQX6DDxRpXhWGAQq7_tQc0BGV6K1P-uLNSOSM11Rm2VL4AmAmz6Bjviou7gunXGGFLcU6xWctyOw0kO263y3pYrDSYIHbV792N4CI4aMukC29ee8C4Mzc37qI4aYD-KLq-tJHr9XW-uFx6OyS16P60kDFKIQTk9_iYp7BLvyVj_0snXQ1I8yGs0SqVcOrmYhv3chw8wBhYjUtLVkugl0i9L0iUmTQ7DiNF7AQ9_iR96iCjTkD4EglSevipPirLOjcoF-Ic9L_BsAVBZst2uyZ4PsE0isCw/43o/686nv-b-SQ2wT3s9fFaSBQ/h2/uIIt5ZMljWOGeZqTQKmiYSknoT9kjD7-EG1rTjkMJs4)
---
My district’s residents sent me to Congress to invest in life, not death and destruction.
Their demands echo the demands of the American people. Every day, more cities and labor unions representing millions of Americans are joining the call for a ceasefire.
More U.S. leaders need to listen and to recognize our shared humanity.
Congress recently passed**$886 billion** for this year's Pentagon budget, and yesterday the Senate considered a **$118 billion** package for war and xenophobia.
Instead of funding our communities’ needs, many of my colleagues continue to funnel billions of American tax dollars to the very same defense contractors that many of them are invested in and taking campaign donations from.
That's why **I just introduced legislation to stop members of Congress from profiting financially when they vote to support wars and weapons manufacturing.**
We deserve better.
Taking the lead from grassroots movements, I'm working towards a federal government that ends poverty, that values diplomacy and peace over the military industrial complex, and that finally creates a real path to citizenship for our immigrant neighbors.
We're building a future where instead of funding war, our government funds housing, healthcare, utilities and clean water, childcare, climate solutions, reparations for Black Americans, education, and more for our communities.
Members of Congress should be accountable to _the people_. That's who I'm here to serve.
[**Please donate to my campaign today to build a better future together—and to show that Palestinians aren't going anywhere.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSE7j4zav4AQ-1Zfft1ijDeGrcYI6yFV8ydt1wn6Fxv9t65FLPS_fW6O151KI0sZDO4QkmWP-DKJ7ismJeBuMS_qyzHuSliXCsslsS-tFZHOQ56KzWdpTGbxOkva-dbAazIWBhxIZ0zRLMcziW6lroJ6zDx5Ss14AFvZMREDO-Rb4sL9PE7W7iYuCPEaUD4gKgzQnDCNTU2HZE_xB3bkSzQmliqjFaiQ2uvHWy1pzN5Ia_ysQ6x6G0inmaVcf9T0p4NEiPTb0CAmzv54-TRM3yA0Sd-LQhZFTaAha-ZC_2FoP8NSDyYyvbfFvYzvkw1qLH4Q9AGyidYly1yBjtDPJxxxxf9POsHu7YUXERR9b1IgfsqSyUG1YIip4Hz4ypeHk/43o/686nv-b-SQ2wT3s9fFaSBQ/h3/a7EfqdRiRE7O3TPYDWnnAEU3R4rFm4VE06A6skvKpiU)

clean_body: Palestinians are not going anywhere. | | | Friend, This week, most members of the House of Representatives voted to send $17.6 billion U.S. taxpayer dollars to Israel’s military. The bill failed, because it needed a special two-thirds majority to pass. Yesterday, most Senate Democrats voted for a bill that would send $14.1 billion to Israel’s military to drop more U.S. bombs on Palestinian children. The bill would also have blocked U.S. funding for the UN agency supporting millions of Palestinian refugees with life-saving aid—all while the Israeli government intentionally starves people and attacks supply trucks heading into Gaza. The bill, which Biden supported, included far-right U.S. border policies that would end asylum protections, lock up more refugees, and speed up mass deportations. These cruel anti-immigrant policies were included as an attempt to get Republican support on the bill, which ultimately failed. Sadly, most of our government’s leaders don’t seem to see immigrants or people of Muslim faith or Arab heritage as human beings. Although this week’s legislation didn’t pass, Democrats and Republicans in Congress are going to keep trying to hand over billions of American taxpayer dollars to Netanyahu’s genocidal regime. As the only Palestinian American in Congress, I will continue to speak up , no matter how many times my colleagues try to censure me or police my words.** I can’t stand by while the U.S. arms and enables genocide. | My district’s residents sent me to Congress to invest in life, not death and destruction. Their demands echo the demands of the American people. Every day, more cities and labor unions representing millions of Americans are joining the call for a ceasefire. More U.S. leaders need to listen and to recognize our shared humanity. Congress recently passed$886 billion for this year's Pentagon budget, and yesterday the Senate considered a $118 billion package for war and xenophobia. Instead of funding our communities’ needs, many of my colleagues continue to funnel billions of American tax dollars to the very same defense contractors that many of them are invested in and taking campaign donations from. That's why I just introduced legislation to stop members of Congress from profiting financially when they vote to support wars and weapons manufacturing. We deserve better. Taking the lead from grassroots movements, I'm working towards a federal government that ends poverty, that values diplomacy and peace over the military industrial complex, and that finally creates a real path to citizenship for our immigrant neighbors. We're building a future where instead of funding war, our government funds housing, healthcare, utilities and clean water, childcare, climate solutions, reparations for Black Americans, education, and more for our communities. Members of Congress should be accountable to the people. That's who I'm here to serve. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you. We deserve better, and together we can build a future with dignity and safety for all people. In solidarity, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

| [S.B. 594](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001slCdBlROCwpgUZHRQWj-zx1kzl7Z0TexPaYu3PS0Ldi4p-mSgfYB7KMIAIgCa89f2N-4qjXVdcFWu1OGPYWNfnLCJaNR1WmOcsHryKLfNLsiU1tO3IjyDqrCiT_p7bYwi8QU_n2oo6SGVUCJJ0CKcgbC92-4CUTV6B_j8ZCs_ArmDr4kbpli36FTsqYOFA3ZWn3euIG08C8=&c=GJa4ZXLyPiamr_uxGAPAGyWyocKfW7YABYry0j8AS21s_nVYWcl6iQ==&ch=LNVXhRq4aMPSEIh_fuRnxAaJHIzU0F9DIQTMEkRJ-XKMd6Uf9Yveug==) Patron: McPike Department of Health; Office of Emergency Medical Services; work group; emergency medical personnel; career fatigue and wellness program. Directs the Department of Health's Office of Emergency Medical Services to convene a work group related to the eligibility requirements for emergency medical personnel to join a professional program addressing career fatigue and wellness. The bill requires the work group to report its findings and recommendations to the Chairmen of the House Committee on Health, Welfare and Institutions and the Senate Committee on Education and Health by October 1, 2024. A BILL to direct the Department of Health's Office of Emergency Medical Services to convene a work group to examine requirements for emergency medical personnel joining a professional program addressing career fatigue and wellness.24103127D [S.B. 603](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001slCdBlROCwpgUZHRQWj-zx1kzl7Z0TexPaYu3PS0Ldi4p-mSgfYB7KMIAIgCa89fnTTfxn388R9TtjufT4-jk4Xm61d-xmUD8GqHlN4H8Vrn54zZePJHWB2-t9HD13E57wRI788EV9oV2WIe94EOz91WtfQu4Pzw9a217uWWwJtK3Q36ldkPPcgziTeRtGIIV1_bmeyfLYw=&c=GJa4ZXLyPiamr_uxGAPAGyWyocKfW7YABYry0j8AS21s_nVYWcl6iQ==&ch=LNVXhRq4aMPSEIh_fuRnxAaJHIzU0F9DIQTMEkRJ-XKMd6Uf9Yveug==) Patron: McGuire Department of Criminal Justice Services; priority treatment for incarcerated women who are pregnant and in need of substance abuse treatment; work group; report. Directs the Department of Criminal Justice Services, in collaboration with the Department of Behavioral Health and Developmental Services and the Department of Health, to convene a work group of relevant stakeholders to study and make recommendations related to prioritizing treatment for incarcerated women who are pregnant and in need of substance abuse treatment. The bill requires the work group to report its findings and recommendations to the Chairmen of the House Committee on Health, Welfare and Institutions and the Senate Committee on Education and Health by November 1, 2024. A BILL to direct the Department of Criminal Justice Services to establish a work group to study and make recommendations related to prioritizing treatment for incarcerated women who are pregnant and in need of substance abuse treatment; report.24103657D [S.B. 682](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001slCdBlROCwpgUZHRQWj-zx1kzl7Z0TexPaYu3PS0Ldi4p-mSgfYB7KMIAIgCa89fX4GWBngjdiYmBbNL8Jbx5lg_rlbW8YPJJfvJECTuCVcOFP-MDLDpv9mGCkCKrL7FO-NeyNCA2Ow0JyVSpsommSDSPm8g0jS6Yq963KEvzUdO74SCtJu4C67j1YaVTkjvnkIuaNZ6UL8=&c=GJa4ZXLyPiamr_uxGAPAGyWyocKfW7YABYry0j8AS21s_nVYWcl6iQ==&ch=LNVXhRq4aMPSEIh_fuRnxAaJHIzU0F9DIQTMEkRJ-XKMd6Uf9Yveug==) Patron: Suetterlein Health professions; universal licensure; requirements. Requires health regulatory boards within the Department of Health Professions to recognize licenses or certifications issued by other United States jurisdictions, as defined in the bill, as fulfillment for licensure or certification in the Commonwealth if certain conditions are met. The bill also requires such health regulatory boards to recognize work experience as fulfillment for licensure or certification in the Commonwealth if certain conditions are met. The bill does not apply to licensure for physicians or dentists. A BILL to amend the Code of Virginia by adding a section numbered [54.1-2408.5](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001slCdBlROCwpgUZHRQWj-zx1kzl7Z0TexPaYu3PS0Ldi4p-mSgfYB7KMIAIgCa89fE53Lmv9Qj295JPYI63kHNkp45eAQnZ9Fm9yct4lDyx-T0JBwvfosMLPzZlpmlljMoRGgqS2LhnLCupaTHB4rLz4HZ6TjXHVTAmQZ0_7DsuB1hA6ohl_8Xw==&c=GJa4ZXLyPiamr_uxGAPAGyWyocKfW7YABYry0j8AS21s_nVYWcl6iQ==&ch=LNVXhRq4aMPSEIh_fuRnxAaJHIzU0F9DIQTMEkRJ-XKMd6Uf9Yveug==), relating to health professions; universal licensure; requirements.24104198D [S.J.R. 20](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001slCdBlROCwpgUZHRQWj-zx1kzl7Z0TexPaYu3PS0Ldi4p-mSgfYB7KMIAIgCa89fb63gLjuzJU8--WzJpQ3N4Pcy1oOsTe04Bjs7nDHX4Ot7CgBfRlNhRg0nMsZdulK0GbpNYtEX52U7nBkTrq2ilH7krz2OLL1nNcPsbNyCHzKWQiSl1x2ypASZT3vFuuALu6NPy1dxppU=&c=GJa4ZXLyPiamr_uxGAPAGyWyocKfW7YABYry0j8AS21s_nVYWcl6iQ==&ch=LNVXhRq4aMPSEIh_fuRnxAaJHIzU0F9DIQTMEkRJ-XKMd6Uf9Yveug==) Patron: Aird Study; Board of Workforce Development; adequacy of the funding model for noncredit workforce credential programs; work group; report. Requests the Virginia Board of Workforce Development to study the current funding model for noncredit workforce credential programs offered at comprehensive community colleges in order to identify areas of inadequacy and make recommendations on options for reforming the funding model to address those inadequacies and improve the sustainability of offering and providing noncredit workforce credential programs to ensure that the Virginia Community College System as a whole is capable of continuing to meet the increasing demand for highly skilled credentialed workers in the Commonwealth. Requesting the Virginia Board of Workforce Development to study funding models for noncredit workforce credential programs at comprehensive community colleges. Report.24102634D [S.J.R. 22](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001slCdBlROCwpgUZHRQWj-zx1kzl7Z0TexPaYu3PS0Ldi4p-mSgfYB7KMIAIgCa89fdCzKx_pan8hH2ry8xcsNQEN2ZIqBDVSy3l-tk_5iXUUfGDExSxA6UiHCU3USIRnjH7V1dvWu6FzpMNfNDVf63URulepm1YV_rKFI4yPzEzxMtrLvVEO25JLMN6E4g7Y1S8uRs8kRgKA=&c=GJa4ZXLyPiamr_uxGAPAGyWyocKfW7YABYry0j8AS21s_nVYWcl6iQ==&ch=LNVXhRq4aMPSEIh_fuRnxAaJHIzU0F9DIQTMEkRJ-XKMd6Uf9Yveug==) Patron: Carroll Foy Study; Department of Taxation; reducing economic stress on retired Virginia State Police; report. Directs the Department of Taxation to study tax policy solutions for reducing economic stress on retired Virginia State Police. Requesting the Department of Taxation to study tax policy solutions for reducing economic stress on retired Virginia State Police. Report.24103419D [S.J.R. 25](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001slCdBlROCwpgUZHRQWj-zx1kzl7Z0TexPaYu3PS0Ldi4p-mSgfYB7KMIAIgCa89fvPBmVHA9KiJd9p27GyicIrzB7VoGccvGfjj0MLBmFQQ9bFa9GiXBQscU6Y4Fk9yL2lPaLewDSyreNAwknhWxtk7z2Ot8umyOt784QmdtVILHHKvXLBawCabz9Seb31Wprz91im_CQzk=&c=GJa4ZXLyPiamr_uxGAPAGyWyocKfW7YABYry0j8AS21s_nVYWcl6iQ==&ch=LNVXhRq4aMPSEIh_fuRnxAaJHIzU0F9DIQTMEkRJ-XKMd6Uf9Yveug==) Patron: Stuart Study; Department of Environmental Quality; groundwater supply in the Commonwealth; report. Requests that the Department of Environmental Quality complete a one-year study of the groundwater supply in the Commonwealth with technical assistance provided by the State Water Control Board. The Department shall complete its meetings by November 30, 2024, and submit to the Governor and the General Assembly an executive summary and a report of its findings and recommendations no later than the first day of the 2025 Regular Session of the General Assembly.

Friends, YOU can participate remotely with your legislators from the comfort of your home.
YOU can watch Senate Committees in action and at the right time, comment to the committee in real time.

Find a bill that interests you and want to comment remotely?
