clean_body: Participate online or in person here | | | | TUNE IN FRIDAY MORNING AT 7:05AM 1140 WRVA JOHN REID SHOW | | | == | Senate Bills Up FRIDAY CALL IN REMOTELY OR SHOW UP | | SESSION BEGINS AT NOON FRIDAY | Senate Committee Public Hearings for FRIDAY Friday's Dockets BILLS TO WATCH | | == | FINISHED WORK: NO DOCKET | | == | FINISHED WORK: NO DOCKET | | == | FINISHED WORK: NO DOCKET | | == | == Patron: McPike Department of Health; Office of Emergency Medical Services; work group; emergency medical personnel; career fatigue and wellness program. Directs the Department of Health's Office of Emergency Medical Services to convene a work group related to the eligibility requirements for emergency medical personnel to join a professional program addressing career fatigue and wellness. The bill requires the work group to report its findings and recommendations to the Chairmen of the House Committee on Health, Welfare and Institutions and the Senate Committee on Education and Health by October 1, 2024. A BILL to direct the Department of Health's Office of Emergency Medical Services to convene a work group to examine requirements for emergency medical personnel joining a professional program addressing career fatigue and wellness.24103127D == Patron: McGuire Department of Criminal Justice Services; priority treatment for incarcerated women who are pregnant and in need of substance abuse treatment; work group; report. Directs the Department of Criminal Justice Services, in collaboration with the Department of Behavioral Health and Developmental Services and the Department of Health, to convene a work group of relevant stakeholders to study and make recommendations related to prioritizing treatment for incarcerated women who are pregnant and in need of substance abuse treatment. The bill requires the work group to report its findings and recommendations to the Chairmen of the House Committee on Health, Welfare and Institutions and the Senate Committee on Education and Health by November 1, 2024. A BILL to direct the Department of Criminal Justice Services to establish a work group to study and make recommendations related to prioritizing treatment for incarcerated women who are pregnant and in need of substance abuse treatment; report.24103657D == Patron: Suetterlein Health professions; universal licensure; requirements. Requires health regulatory boards within the Department of Health Professions to recognize licenses or certifications issued by other United States jurisdictions, as defined in the bill, as fulfillment for licensure or certification in the Commonwealth if certain conditions are met. The bill also requires such health regulatory boards to recognize work experience as fulfillment for licensure or certification in the Commonwealth if certain conditions are met. The bill does not apply to licensure for physicians or dentists. A BILL to amend the Code of Virginia by adding a section numbered ==, relating to health professions; universal licensure; requirements.24104198D == Patron: Aird Study; Board of Workforce Development; adequacy of the funding model for noncredit workforce credential programs; work group; report. Requests the Virginia Board of Workforce Development to study the current funding model for noncredit workforce credential programs offered at comprehensive community colleges in order to identify areas of inadequacy and make recommendations on options for reforming the funding model to address those inadequacies and improve the sustainability of offering and providing noncredit workforce credential programs to ensure that the Virginia Community College System as a whole is capable of continuing to meet the increasing demand for highly skilled credentialed workers in the Commonwealth. Requesting the Virginia Board of Workforce Development to study funding models for noncredit workforce credential programs at comprehensive community colleges. Report.24102634D == Patron: Carroll Foy Study; Department of Taxation; reducing economic stress on retired Virginia State Police; report. Directs the Department of Taxation to study tax policy solutions for reducing economic stress on retired Virginia State Police. Requesting the Department of Taxation to study tax policy solutions for reducing economic stress on retired Virginia State Police. Report.24103419D == Patron: Stuart Study; Department of Environmental Quality; groundwater supply in the Commonwealth; report. Requests that the Department of Environmental Quality complete a one-year study of the groundwater supply in the Commonwealth with technical assistance provided by the State Water Control Board. The Department shall complete its meetings by November 30, 2024, and submit to the Governor and the General Assembly an executive summary and a report of its findings and recommendations no later than the first day of the 2025 Regular Session of the General Assembly. | | == | Senate Bills on Third Reading - Regular Calendar ... == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == | WATCH OR COMMENT IN A SENATE COMMITTEE | | == | ACTION, ACTION, ACTION | Friends, YOU can participate remotely with your legislators from the comfort of your home. YOU can watch Senate Committees in action and at the right time, comment to the committee in real time. This is YOUR opportunity to DO SOMETHING. Above I have listed the dockets for THIS FRIDAY'S Senate Committee hearings. By clicking each link you can quickly look over which bills are coming up this Friday that are of interest to you. Find a bill that interests you and want to comment remotely? Then click on the link below to the streaming of the committee meeting and follow the directions to either view the committee in real time or comment remotely to the Senate committee members in real time to state your support or opposition to a particular bill. It's that easy to express your support or opposition to a bill coming up on this Friday's docket. | | GET REGULAR UPDATES | Thank you to those who have pitched in to help cover my costs to communicate with you each week while the General Assembly is in session. Thank you. Many of you have advised me that you appreciate my instructive and informative emails, regarding important bills coming before the Virginia General Assembly. I'm delighted to continue to send you these emails and ask for your continued support so that I may continue to communicate with you. If you haven't done so already, will you please help me offset the cost by pitching in a few dollars? It costs about $400 per month to send out emails to keep you informed about bills coming before the General Assembly. Would you please make a donation today to help offset the cost, so that I can continue to bring you the latest on what's going on in the General Assembly? subject: The biggest political figures in this country got their start in local office

body:
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78652071/454038916/855222454?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2IxZGUzNi1iNmM2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMYEnLzLCl-6ewUNXf-PsHgh347GiLvweBgncu7u1ew=&emci=9cba8097-a8c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=dcb1de36-b6c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=5534179)

| | We've all seen the pattern: **the most significant political figures in this country got their start in local office.** Take Nikki Haley for example. She started out in her county chamber of commerce, and from there, her career in Republican politics took off. She went on to become a state rep, a two-time governor, Ambassador to the U.N., and candidate for president of the United States. **This is where our future national leaders — on both sides — get their start.** That's why at Movement Labs, we're working to do our part in recruiting a future Democratic bench of superstar candidates. Now more than ever, it's critical that we work to support candidates down the ballot, and every new voice that joins this fight can help turn the tide and re-elect Joe Biden and a Democratic Senate that will get big things done. [**Small changes can have a huge impact. Can you join our movement to support local candidates by chipping in $17 today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78652072/454038917/-327605227?refcode=2024-02-08-start&recurring=&amount=17&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=dcb1de36-b6c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2IxZGUzNi1iNmM2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMYEnLzLCl-6ewUNXf-PsHgh347GiLvweBgncu7u1ew=) **The big wins at the top of the ticket start at the local level.** The elected officials on the ground fighting for affordable housing, tenants' rights, and better transportation are doing the work that impacts our daily lives and builds momentum and turnout for this election, and the importance of that can't be ignored. The battle may start small, but it gets big _fast_. And we can't fight these battles without your help. [**Every dollar makes a difference. It goes towards recruitment, candidate support, outreach, and rebuilding Democratic infrastructure. Make a quick donation of $17 or whatever you can during this election year!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78652073/454038918/-327605227?refcode=2024-02-08-start&recurring=&amount=17&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=dcb1de36-b6c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2IxZGUzNi1iNmM2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMYEnLzLCl-6ewUNXf-PsHgh347GiLvweBgncu7u1ew=) Thank you, _Movement Labs_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: The Hill:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| “Senate GOP looks to Wisconsin to set 2024 candidate map in stone”
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1981%2E35263%2Eqcn7fK)
I wanted to make sure that you didn’t miss this alarming headline, Peter: **Senate GOP looks to Wisconsin to set 2024 candidate map in stone**
_— The Hill_ Senate Republicans have their sights set on flipping my seat red, which is why Mitch McConnell handpicked a right-wing megamillionaire, Eric Hovde, to run against me — and he’s expected to enter the race any day now. Hovde is willing to self-fund his own campaign to the tune of $20 million, a sum that could be decisive in the race experts agree could determine control of the Senate majority. **I need your help to fight back.** When Eric Hovde enters the race, we’ll be at an instant cash disadvantage. But your early grassroots donations will ensure we stay prepared for whatever he or his national Republican backers have in store for our campaign. **[Will you make a donation of any amount to help me keep Wisconsin blue?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-feb24.S4bXxm&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240208_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1981%2E35263%2Eqcn7fK)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-feb24.LnIHXA&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240208_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1981%2E35263%2Eqcn7fK)

name: Team Engel
subject: water security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Hi Peter,
Although the weather this week might suggest otherwise, Arizona is one of the sunniest states in the country.
Our incredible weather is one of the reasons so many people are moving to our state every year. It’s also why we must take protecting our water supply seriously — even when it’s pouring rain.
No one is more prepared to fight for Arizona’s water security than Kirsten Engel.
Kirsten is an environmental lawyer who has spent years working on this issue. In the Arizona State Legislature, she worked across the aisle on the Colorado Drought Contingency Plan. She’ll ensure that every state in the West is doing its part of managing our water supply — and that Arizona gets its fair share.
The same can’t be said for Kirsten’s opponent, Juan Ciscomani.
Ciscomani was a senior advisor to Doug Ducey when his administration cut a deal to give a Saudi Arabian agricultural firm nearly unrestricted access to pump groundwater. These farms used our precious groundwater to grow alfalfa that they sent back to Saudi Arabia. It was widely criticized by environmental and water organizations in Arizona.
While Arizonans were doing everything possible to reduce water usage, foreign-backed farms were allowed to pump enough water to supply 54,000 homes.
Ciscomani’s campaign has gotten thousands of dollars from the lobbyist who created the Saudi deal.
We can’t trust Ciscomani to fight for issues impacting Arizonans. Will you help Kirsten get him out of office and flip this seat blue by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_020824_Water_act]

body:
Tell us before 11:59 pm...
| | | Hi team, it’s Diana from the DSCC.

I’m reaching out because President Biden and Vice President Harris are preparing for a tough General Election match against Donald Trump. Current polls show a tight race, so we _need_ to hear from Democrats in Pennsylvania.

Voter enthusiasm is one of the best ways that Democrats like you can help us predict voter turnout this fall and make key strategic decisions as Election Day gets closer.

**However, without your response, we will NOT be able to confirm our results -- so please, tell us before the poll closes at midnight:**

**Do you approve of President Biden?**
| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/17320?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240208-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240208-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalRF-Pros-sl1&akid=13433%2E9716520%2EHsxYLn)

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78652945/454041642/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODg5OGUwNS1iOGM2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3MwpBOJJIfcEyf8TJp0r-ZWNJbTHsK2Qxqhmnb4Amrs=&emci=871b33ed-dcc5-ee11-b660-002248223848&emdi=98898e05-b8c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=43566853)

| | **_Black History is American History!_**

February is Black History Month, and we’re taking this time to recognize some of our history-making Black Georgians. Black Georgians made history back in 2020 by flipping Georgia blue for Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, electing our nation’s first Black female Vice President. Let’s not stop there. This Black History Month, we’re fueled by the opportunity to make that happen again!

**While our opponents seek to erase our history in American culture and in public schools, we’re busy empowering Black Georgians to create more historic moments.**

But we can’t do it alone.

We need grassroots supporters like you to support our voter outreach efforts and empower candidates just like Kamala Harris, Nikema Williams, Hank Johnson, Lucy McBath, David Scott, Sanford Bishop, and Rev. Raphael Warnock.

[**_Can we count on you as we work to make history again by electing Black Georgia leaders who will fight for our rights?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78652946/454041643/710125701?refcode=20240208.1_GADems_2J&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODg5OGUwNS1iOGM2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3MwpBOJJIfcEyf8TJp0r-ZWNJbTHsK2Qxqhmnb4Amrs=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Elect Black Democratic leaders | | | Black History is American History! February is Black History Month, and we’re taking this time to recognize some of our history-making Black Georgians. Black Georgians made history back in 2020 by flipping Georgia blue for Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, electing our nation’s first Black female Vice President. Let’s not stop there. This Black History Month, we’re fueled by the opportunity to make that happen again! While our opponents seek to erase our history in American culture and in public schools, we’re busy empowering Black Georgians to create more historic moments. But we can’t do it alone. We need grassroots supporters like you to support our voter outreach efforts and empower candidates just like Kamala Harris, Nikema Williams, Hank Johnson, Lucy McBath, David Scott, Sanford Bishop, and Rev. Raphael Warnock. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Our pathway to victory in November depends on supporters like you funding our program and ensuring we can reach every voter we need to keep Georgia blue. = Thank you, – GA Dems | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.georgiademocrat.org | Democratic Party of Georgia P.O. BOX 89202 Atlanta, GA 30312 United States

| Hello, We are thrilled to share some incredibly exciting news with you today: **Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson, has officially endorsed Gabe Evans for Colorado's 8th Congressional District!** **
** Speaker Johnson shared his endorsement with these powerful words: "_Today, I'm honored to endorse Gabe Evans for Colorado's 8th Congressional District. He is a combat veteran, former police lieutenant, conservative state representative, and family man. Yet even more important than Gabe's biography is his grit and determination to make a real difference in Washington, DC on behalf of Colorado and the conservative cause. Gabe Evans is uniquely qualified to go toe-to-toe with and defeat far-left Congresswoman Yadira Caraveo in 2024. Colorado, help us grow the majority and elect Gabe Evans for Congress_!" This endorsement speaks volumes about Gabe's character, leadership, and commitment to serving our community. Speaker Johnson recognizes Gabe's unique qualifications and dedication to advancing the conservative cause. With this powerful endorsement, we are one step closer to victory in 2024. _[Will you join Speaker Mike Johnson in supporting Gabe today? clean_body: | = We’re in the final, critical weeks before our primary, Peter. Ballots are out across CA-27. This is the final stretch before our March 5th election – a must-win as we work toward our ultimate goal of unseating Mike Garcia. But our hard work is far from over. We need to keep our voter outreach programs fully funded if we’re going to reach the thousands of undecided voters who can make-or-break our chances. Our community deserves far better than MAGA Mike Garcia. His approval rating has plummeted in CA-27 by nearly 10% after his vote for a national abortion ban, among other extreme actions. Our job is to make sure voters know what is at stake. = | **= = = = While Garcia is playing politics, I’m dedicated to being the leader our community needs. = Thank you, George =** | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

name: Cartwright HQ
subject: Matt is standing up for working families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cartwright for Congress
body:
Just last week, the House passed a crucial expansion of the bipartisan Child Tax Credit, and Matt played a key role in making it happen.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78653396/454043276/-235138156?refcode=em24_240208_ctc_fnd_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240208_ctc_fnd_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=18326&refcode2=30491248-b9c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDQ5MTI0OC1iOWM2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1wTXY1SkCQtTzcM0-bjXtOw_YeqXmy-V38N4OjnZKKs=) **"House passes bipartisan tax bill that expands child tax credit"**

\- _CNN_
---

Peter,

Matt has been hard at work putting people over politics and achieving real results for working families.

Just last week, the House passed a crucial expansion of the Child Tax Credit, and Matt played a key role in making it happen. **This bill is yet another testament to Matt’s commitment to delivering tangible benefits for the hardworking folks in northeastern Pennsylvania and around the country.**

The expansion will bring relief to the working families who need it most. With over **16 million** children across America set to benefit, this legislation will provide vital support, easing the financial burdens of raising children and ensuring that parents no longer have to choose between essentials like putting food on the table and paying their bills.

**Matt is dedicated to listening to the needs of working families, and this is yet another example of how he is making sure they are prioritized in Congress. That’s why we need to keep Matt in Congress: He doesn’t just talk about working for the people, he actually puts it into practice.**

But here’s the thing: we need your help to keep the momentum going. We must ensure Matt has the resources to continue fighting for our community after this November’s elections.

clean_body: Just last week, the House passed a crucial expansion of the bipartisan Child Tax Credit, and Matt played a key role in making it happen. | | = "House passes bipartisan tax bill that expands child tax credit" \- CNN Peter, Matt has been hard at work putting people over politics and achieving real results for working families. Just last week, the House passed a crucial expansion of the Child Tax Credit, and Matt played a key role in making it happen. This bill is yet another testament to Matt’s commitment to delivering tangible benefits for the hardworking folks in northeastern Pennsylvania and around the country. The expansion will bring relief to the working families who need it most. With over 16 million children across America set to benefit, this legislation will provide vital support, easing the financial burdens of raising children and ensuring that parents no longer have to choose between essentials like putting food on the table and paying their bills. Matt is dedicated to listening to the needs of working families, and this is yet another example of how he is making sure they are prioritized in Congress. That’s why we need to keep Matt in Congress: He doesn’t just talk about working for the people, he actually puts it into practice. But here’s the thing: we need your help to keep the momentum going. We must ensure Matt has the resources to continue fighting for our community after this November’s elections. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Cartwright HQ In 2022, Matt Cartwright was one of only 5 Democrats to win a House race in a district that Donald Trump carried in 2020. **About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

body:
Gabe Vasquez’s stance on our border is clear – he fully endorses millions of illegal aliens from all over the world invading our nation. [Unsubscribe](http://links.yvetteherrell.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=60a077210c21435397f83f8f2527f964&_s=a21bcfe1d20a4551ab3788b109998267&_t=lguvk6YGGh8-slNslPjZy1kJsrjTFI0VgJYJrE1oe2AoLSIEhBC3f2uKiQgRQ179I_5AeLvDAPhjdG48Cu_p1reL5ItPrv9a5yanGaSJmHs%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.yvetteherrell.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=60a077210c21435397f83f8f2527f964&_s=a21bcfe1d20a4551ab3788b109998267&_t=lguvk6YGGh8-slNslPjZy1kJsrjTFI0VgJYJrE1oe2AoLSIEhBC3f2uKiQgRQ179I_5AeLvDAPhjdG48Cu_p1reL5ItPrv9a5yanGaSJmHs%3D)

| [](http://links.yvetteherrell.com/u/click?_t=60a077210c21435397f83f8f2527f964&_m=a21bcfe1d20a4551ab3788b109998267&_e=SyTPRzhjQ8rgQ0Vw0IYeumuZkksmXnTwgRalFuiaTIhmjuN26hKImluLd1AB43YHSC4-i4Mf4zMtbmnfGYKxhbd_ZZ_H3yXyZg-d50XdfA9MXVJzcjo5mXMJE1KzKEXbcHufsYJDJ9BQAiqeXJX5uIlJzzDm471wUSqJJ8YV04UV_7xEyQZgWwKYAy2JLDIVpM87Lzc0opyBj19ZPRjFGj4c8JI-wxi6rgDlkuEqDApg-Q5RFMMJlwnCED-DNYFvPxnfYE3iAKI7YqANcgn_VCx7HAa3wQkBXgqANG60Cc-A9c3_fk_JOKtSvbgwGGvXqhNf0ilWpOPrfvLQzuqOY2gv7INgzm-i9eU02LtrmfWb2xEGsPRHFiuq8Aac3wicXFXYr6KfEQRmVfwb98I8eA%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

Gabe Vasquez _pretends_ to care about the crisis on our southern border and wants us to _believe_ he’s trying to fix it...

But his efforts are about as pathetic as they come.

His so-called “immigration reform” proposals have NOTHING to do with securing our border and stopping the invasion, which is getting worse every day. They’re _actually_ about rewarding **amnesty** to those who have broken our laws.

_(Credit: Steven Hirsch, New York Post)_
Last month, Gabe Vasquez **voted AGAINST** a House resolution condemning Biden’s open-border policies and calling on him to secure the border.

And just yesterday, he **voted AGAINST** impeaching Sec. of Homeland Security Alejandro Mayorkas for allowing this border invasion to continue. His blatant dereliction of duty has put every American family at risk.

**Gabe Vasquez’s stance on our border is clear – he fully endorses millions of illegal aliens from all over the world invading our nation.**

There’s no talking his way out of this one, and we need to do everything we can to defeat Gabe Vasquez and hold him, Biden, and Mayorkas accountable for betraying our nation. It is far past time to protect our nation’s sovereignty and PUT THE AMERICAN PEOPLE FIRST!

For America,

Yvette Herrell

name: FWD:
subject: I need you to see this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc
body:
Radical Democrats are spreading lies and smears in their fundraising emails about MAGA conservatives like myself and President Trump, as well as MAGA supporters like you.

| [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=6d62589fab2b41cba36118a9d7c0abb2&_e=Fib1jWvQfNwmy5RP-2JfSZqpkXs1CbV1q1SXE5BinbIiiMeIIsuqBe1Lg1piYFyCbg-YtRkmkdk2pa7rtyHsJBh5ohfbPQ4ExeW_tv_kr9siSobCKaba2r6M_9dEjA7sdIoZwe6MhTGj2Eo_EifEd6Ct4px_qr1qKqT5Yffhwx0fbO6xm5MbXAz7CAZ07wCbqJgaQ5SC70yQp7kiVAU32KmSriEx-XRTdkmCxPkRZbtLLbrNwbpUdDuMI6_g7lJBmt_KIdmIsNVfUGy0ubJGQnKFr-nM0KoR2U3FGGhcq-suor-bBhKxsv2KJs6Dz7NP)
---
Peter,

A friend of mine (Will) flagged this email for me. **I need you to see this.**

name: Ron Wyden
subject: I'm not giving up
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
I know almost everything these days gets wrapped up in political divides, but here's something I'd think we all should be able to agree on: children should not live in poverty.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78654688/454047532/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTgzMTBhMi1iY2M2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PBzKDrQLIAApadYZ92stDiXbYeeuc6144JHA_bsmwWM=&emci=57cdf653-b1c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=c18310a2-bcc6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=9818364)
---

| | I know almost everything these days gets wrapped up in political divides, but here's something I'd think we all should be able to agree on: _children should not live in poverty_. Just a few years ago, Democrats took unprecedented action to lift millions of kids out of poverty with the child tax credit. As a result, we made _record_ strides in eliminating child poverty – nearly four million children saw their circumstances radically change for the better. **Put simply: Democrats proved that direct cash payments can make a real difference to families in need.** One of my biggest disappointments of the last few years was that this child tax credit expansion was only temporary. I resolved to not let this issue be forgotten. **Just a few weeks ago, I was able to secure a bipartisan proposal to expand the child tax credit, and lift half a million kids out of poverty.** My proposal has already passed the House, which gets us one step closer to reinstating this lifeline for millions of families. In the coming days and weeks, I'm going to be working as hard as I can to get this plan across the finish line in the Senate and sent to the President's desk to be signed into law. More soon, _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

Here’s the reality:

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78655081/454048946/-849459103?refcode=ea.5c167752-bdc6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.5c167752-bdc6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzE2Nzc1Mi1iZGM2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2bh4N3poAY4rnzQpVzoP5XBOYG1oIIL4mDMI5kfyz0k=&emci=96ed75bb-a0c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=5c167752-bdc6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=46764483)

Peter – Here’s a blunt reality check for your Thursday: → Right now Democrats hold the slimmest majority in the Senate. → With Joe Manchin’s retirement in West Virginia – and competitive races for incumbent Democrats in states like Wisconsin, Montana, Ohio, and Pennsylvania – we’re dangerously close to losing Senate control. → And if Mitch McConnell wins the Senate majority, all progress on important issues like women’s reproductive freedom, gun violence prevention, and access to the ballot box go out the window. The pundits want to count out a historically red state like Tennessee, but Gloria Johnson’s building a movement that can defy the odds and win. **And if Gloria defeats Marsha Blackburn in November, Democrats are all but guaranteed to maintain control of the Senate. clean_body: Here’s the reality: | Peter – Here’s a blunt reality check for your Thursday: → Right now Democrats hold the slimmest majority in the Senate. → With Joe Manchin’s retirement in West Virginia – and competitive races for incumbent Democrats in states like Wisconsin, Montana, Ohio, and Pennsylvania – we’re dangerously close to losing Senate control. → And if Mitch McConnell wins the Senate majority, all progress on important issues like women’s reproductive freedom, gun violence prevention, and access to the ballot box go out the window. The pundits want to count out a historically red state like Tennessee, but Gloria Johnson’s building a movement that can defy the odds and win. And if Gloria defeats Marsha Blackburn in November, Democrats are all but guaranteed to maintain control of the Senate. That’s only possible with the support of grassroots Democrats like yourself. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Team Gloria | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. name: Tina Smith
subject: We can’t wait
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Folks, I’m doing whatever it takes to restore reproductive rights because they are under assault like we’ve never seen before. As Donald Trump clears the path to the Republican presidential ticket, he is doubling down on his radical stances on reproductive rights. His team is _already_ preparing executive orders to unilaterally rip away abortion access from millions of American women. It makes me sick that politicians like Trump think they should make decisions about a woman’s own health care. **As the only Senator to have worked at Planned Parenthood, I know the importance of fighting for reproductive justice, especially as we see these rights stripped away day by day.** We need to make some big changes — and I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to pass crucial legislation like the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ and the _Protecting Access to Medication Abortion Act_. We can’t wait any longer to enshrine abortion rights into federal law. I’m willing to do whatever it takes to get it done. **[If you agree, please add your name in support of these pro-choice laws. We simply can’t afford to wait.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78655187/454049367/285505299?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20240208_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjc4OTI5Ni1iZGM2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ad_EDig7H_hqW74HEOozv_nScMeGBTbQb0rbgVVKpYo=&emci=24789296-bdc6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=26789296-bdc6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=6227932)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78655189/454049369/285505299?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20240208_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjc4OTI5Ni1iZGM2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ad_EDig7H_hqW74HEOozv_nScMeGBTbQb0rbgVVKpYo=&emci=24789296-bdc6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=26789296-bdc6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=6227932)

But AZ-08 definitely takes the cake for the wildest group of candidates. Can you chip in $8 today to help us mobilize voters in AZ-08 and across Arizona to defeat the craziest candidates and flip this state blue? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-feb24?amount=8]

Cook Political Report has listed AZ-01 and AZ-06 among the most competitive of all 435 House races this year. But AZ-08 definitely takes the cake for the wildest group of candidates. Can you chip in $8 today to help us mobilize voters in AZ-08 and across Arizona to defeat the craziest candidates and flip this state blue? [] DONATE $8 [] DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT [] Here’s just 8 of the absurd candidates we’re working hard to defeat: 1. Jacob Chansley , AKA “The Q Anon Shaman,” who served 27 months of his 41 month sentence in federal prison for participating in the January 6th, 2021 attack on the U.S. Capitol. 2. Abraham Hamadeh , who is endorsed by Kari Lake and none other than Donald Trump himself. Abe lost to Secretary of State Adrian Fontes last year, election denialism isn’t a winning campaign strategy. 3. Blake Masters , a venture capitalist, member of Trump’s presidential transition team, NFT shiller, and perpetual (unsuccessful) candidate for various offices. He’s endorsed by his pal, Ohio Senator J.D. Vance, with a history of racist and classist views who’s reportedly on Trump’s VP shortlist. 4. Anthony Kern , an AZ state senator and election denier who has made it his full-time job to fight to overturn the results of the 2020 presidential election and restore Trump to power. He’s also been named to the Maricopa County District attorney’s office “Brady List,” reserved for law enforcement officers with a history of dishonesty. 5. Ben Toma , an aggressively conservative real estate broker who has lost the race for mayor of Peoria, Arizona twice. He referred to immigrants at the Southern border as “staging an invasion,” despite himself being an immigrant from Romania. 6. Rollie Stevens , a country songwriter, creator of such musical masterpieces as “Beer Drinking Woman,” “Daddy’s Little Girl’s Little Girl,” and “My Woman, My Woman, My Wife.” 7. Trent Franks , a proud oil rig driller and founder of the Arizona Family Research Institute, a socially conservative Christian group that aims to “generate empirical research on issues that threaten the traditional family, particularly homosexuality, AIDS, sexual social policy, and drug abuse.” He previously served as representative but had to resign after it was revealed that he asked two separate women on his staff to bear a child for him. 8. Brandon Urness , the former campaign manager for AZ Attorney General Mark Brnovich’s unsuccessful run for Senate. Brnovich is infamous for his radical actions in office, such as calling for the resumption of death penalty executions in Arizona and trying to prevent gay couples from adopting children. These are the people we’re up against in AZ-08, and this list of candidates is a perfect example of just how crazy these races can get, across Arizona and nationwide. You couldn’t make this stuff up if you tried. Can you chip in $8 today to help us defeat extremist candidates like the ones running in AZ-08? In 2022, our campaign really beat the odds and pulled out a major victory for Democrats in a race that many were betting against us. We were running in a toss-up district against a self-funding millionaire opponent, and national Republicans spent big in their efforts to unseat me.

**However, thanks to supporters like you, I defended my seat by a margin of just 2%, and I know we can do it again in 2024.**

If 2022 taught me anything, it’s that early money is the best way to win a campaign. Our people-powered campaign last cycle was proof of that – it was because of early investments from grassroots donors like you that we were able to start voter outreach early and continue our momentum all the way through Election Day.

This year, we have so much on the line. We’ve seen the dangers of Republican leadership (or lack thereof) in the House, and we must do everything we can to win back the House for Democrats this year.

There are only a handful of seats that stand between us and the House majority, so we must protect vulnerable districts like mine from Republican attacks.

**I know I can defend my seat again in 2024 and continue advocating for Pennsylvanians on the issues that matter most, but we’re going to need an even stronger foundation this time.[_That’s why I’m asking you today to contribute anything you can spare to help us lay the foundation for November:_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78655798/454051492/-1109429436?refcode=BLU_EM_SWC_2024-02-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGNiNTE5MS1iZmM2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BOmzGdNH5WGA7HQdasJcbHnZzV96Tnw3S8sJ-48hNZk=)**

name: Adam Schiff
subject: First debate since voting began
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=5399%2E5257348%2EmtRar-)
Derek, in four days I’ll take the debate stage for the first televised U.S. Senate primary debate since Californians began receiving their primary ballots in the mail.
**Nearly one-third of voters are still undecided** , and many will be making up their minds based not only on our debate but also on our ability to share our campaign’s message with them _right now_.
**[Derek, I don’t take a dime of corporate PAC money. Your donations are the fuel for our people-powered campaign. name: Rashida Tlaib via Justice Democrats
subject: New International Court of Justice ruling puts Biden on notice:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

In response to the case brought by South Africa against Israel, the
International Court of Justice just ruled that Israel’s government is
plausibly committing genocide.

The Court ordered Israel’s government to act immediately to prevent
further harm to the Palestinian people—and to stop “acts of genocide” such
as killing Palestinians and “causing serious bodily or mental harm” to
Palestinians.

This ruling also puts the U.S. government on notice for enabling
violations of the Genocide Convention. As a signer of the Genocide
Convention, the U.S. government is legally obligated to prevent genocide.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140347?t=1001&akid=33234%2E1203867%2EiJ446E ]Sign to tell President Biden: To comply with the International Court of
Justice’s ruling to prevent genocide, you must suspend all weapons
transfers and military funding to Israel’s government. Stop enabling the
genocide of Palestinians, and instead push for a ceasefire.

SIGN NOW

With U.S. support, the Israeli government has killed more than 27,000
Palestinians in Gaza, forcibly displacing 2 million people within the
already-densely-packed Gaza strip.

President Biden has sent thousands of bombs to Israel’s military, while
blocking international efforts to stop the violence and watering down
attempts to secure sufficient humanitarian aid.

Meanwhile, Israel’s government is still starving Palestinians in Gaza and
depriving the trapped population of other basic needs for survival such as
water, shelter, and medical assistance.

As the biggest funder of Israel’s military, U.S. government leaders have
the power and the obligation to stop this unfolding genocide.

In addition to the order to prevent genocide, the International Court of
Justice (ICJ) also ordered Israel to prevent and punish incitement to
genocide, to immediately ensure “urgently needed basic services and
humanitarian assistance” to Gaza, and to report back within a month to the
court.

The only way to implement the Court’s orders is by facilitating a lasting
ceasefire.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140347?t=1002&akid=33234%2E1203867%2EiJ446E ]Please sign if you agree: The Biden administration must not only affirm
the legitimacy of the ICJ’s ruling and facilitate an immediate
ceasefire—it must comply with federal and international law by suspending
military assistance to the Israeli government.

ADD YOUR NAME

Let’s keep up the momentum and the pressure to end not only this genocide,
but also the apartheid system that’s rooted in the racist dehumanization
of Palestinians. Together, we’re demanding a world with equality and
dignity for all people.

In solidarity,

Congresswoman Rashida Tlaib

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240208-33234-footer&t=1003&refcode2=33234_1203867_iJ446E&akid=33234%2E1203867%2EiJ446E

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1004&akid=33234%2E1203867%2EiJ446E

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Replace Sinema
subject: Can she do that?!
body:
Sinema can’t get away with this any longer | | | Peter – Trips to Paris, Barcelona, London, Miami, New York, Paris (again), Switzerland. Concerts at Red Rocks in Colorado. Wine tastings in Napa. It seems like Kyrsten Sinema has been everywhere BUT Arizona, meeting with the constituents she turned her back on. **[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xBtWECMGeqGvLJSo_OizOCqiGhIkwN8l5JRvbK484X3KSt6qf18UIhZmZfhWOGcN__t6dgFt9jLZsuVCt8FqqZvAOjEoxnFjoIQAWmRsCyJD7SgZxKdiITMel_aDktdBXJK4GRkgfwunP4j9zM7CmLGITb2BknMvEVGkQNXowCQpY8xVJaPrQuHYim1Xwx-8AQOj0Azl2N5tjE3Pkxi-B80IeGB5bsL6_cNztgqoedGF3Wf4AsNJ2hBPKHyJfFmypccJmTKyvsH6-muioag2UWXogJac2b0SE_tgw1yoFxeg/43o/FZji6SKSTC6b4ArHrATHew/h0/IlmljOxDZY1uesNppdF13ZPJdahB9D2rxgWUhvTTFIQ)** **Where does she get the money to go on all these fancy trips, staying at the Ritz Carlton and eating at Michelin star restaurants? Where does she get the money to go on all these fancy trips, staying at the Ritz Carlton and eating at Michelin star restaurants? Oh right, her Wall Street pals! Who lavished her with money after she did all their legislative bidding, including protecting special tax loopholes for private equity and hedge funds. Meanwhile, Sinema has dodged open town halls in Phoenix and Tucson because she’s afraid her constituents will ask the tough questions. name: Tamie Wilson
subject: Why won’t Jordan investigate abuse at OSU???
body:
| |
---
Only someone with something to hide would avoid standing up for survivors of abuse. | [View in browser](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTI2NDMzOTA0OTI5MDMyNjEsXCJyXCI6MTEyNjQzNDI1MDMxOTQ4Mjc4fSIsInMiOiI2ZmFkODdkOGRiZjllMjdmIn0)
| |
---
| [ ](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTI2NDMzOTA0OTcwOTc1NjYsXCJyXCI6MTEyNjQzNDI1MDMxOTQ4Mjc4fSIsInMiOiJlNzIyYzYxMGMyZGYxZmQyIn0)
---
|
---
Friend,

Do you find it odd that Jim Jordan, who pretends to be a principled fighter, has never uttered a single word about the sexual abuse scandal at OSU? Many of the victims were his wrestlers while he was a coach there. You’d think that he would at least be upset, or angry about what happened to them!
**
Instead, all we get from Jordan is crickets.
**
Also, what did Jordan have to hide from the January 6 Committee such that he would defy a lawfully-issued subpoena from his own colleagues in Congress? _Again, crickets._

Jordan acts like he is interested in conducting investigations—but beyond frivolous witch hunts of people named ‘Biden,’ he has done nothing.

Why hasn’t he launched an investigation, or even just a committee hearing, to find out what happened at OSU and other Big Ten universities that had similar sexual abuse scandals? He hasn't even taken the time to call any of his wrestlers, guys that he _personally_ recruited and pledged to take under his wing, to simply ask if they're doing okay!

**The answer is he doesn’t care, and very likely has something awful to hide.**
[](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTI2NDMzOTA1MDEyOTE4NzEsXCJyXCI6MTEyNjQzNDI1MDMxOTQ4Mjc4fSIsInMiOiIxMDM0OTc0YTJmODFmZTM3In0)
|
---
| [ ](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTI2NDMzOTA1MDU0ODYxNzcsXCJyXCI6MTEyNjQzNDI1MDMxOTQ4Mjc4fSIsInMiOiIyYTBlYjRhNjg0Mjc0NGU3In0)
---
| _Former OSU wrestler Adam DiSabato testified in 2020 that "Jordan called me...begging me to go against my brother...That's the kind of coverup going on here._

---
| Jordan is known for being a loudmouth, but in reality he's all talk and no action.

**_What kind of person turns his back on victims of sexual abuse???
_**
I am a mom and community leader who actually cares about people, even those who disagree with me. Every person, every constituent, matters. I have worked to make positive change in my community and this district for years—and now I need your help getting to D.C. to make positive change **_for all of us_**.
[**
I need you to join this fight to save the soul of America from callous, selfish people like Jim Jordan by chipping in $25, $100, $1,000 or more to help me defeat him once and for all:**](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTI2NDMzOTA1MDk2ODA0ODIsXCJyXCI6MTEyNjQzNDI1MDMxOTQ4Mjc4fSIsInMiOiIxOTJjZThhOTIwZjgxY2ViIn0)

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: Housing crisis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
Investors buy up affordable housing
The American dream of owning a home is becoming increasingly unattainable for many Americans.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Your contributions are helping Democrat Bob Lorinser get to Congress to fight for affordable housing. If you've saved your payment information with Act Blue Express, your donation will process immediately.
CONTRIBUTE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
Friend,
Investors accounted for 27% of all single-family home purchases in the US. While there are many reasons for the need for more affordable houses to buy or rent, it is hard to compete against investors looking to make a profit.
This is just one of the many reasons affordable housing isn't affordable, in addition to:
*
Housing
costs
rose
2.5
to
8
times
faster
than
inflation
and
wages
over
the
last
50
years.
*
America
needs
4-7
million
more
houses
due
to
lack
of
supply.
*
Construction
costs
are
currently
over
$350
per
sq.
ft.
for
building
only,
not
including
land/lot.
*
Attitudes
such
as
NIMBYism
and
land-use
regulations/zoning
are
hindering
progress.
*
Inadequate
financial
support
from
local,
state,
and
federal
levels.
The American dream of owning a home should be achievable for all Americans, not just the wealthy.
Friend, with your help [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob] , I intend to get to Congress to start working on the local, state and federal levels to improve this situation for the hardworking Americans.
Thank you for your support in that effort.
-Dr. Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
Or, send a check to
FRIENDS OF DR. BOB
PO BOX 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States
PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER

| | Peter,

Last month, I asked to hear from you about the issues that are on the top of your mind.

Many of you echoed some of my top concerns, from protecting democracy and voting rights to defending Social Security and Medicare to expanding on meaningful gun violence prevention.

From your responses, one thing about our community became more clear than ever: we want to see substantial action taken on the issues affecting us most.

_**[I’m dedicated to fighting for this action and am ready to continue building on the progress we’ve made together. If you’re able, please invest $10 or whatever you can today in our movement for progress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78657097/454055917/2047091494?refcode=EM_NBI_MT_20240207__PrioritiesResponse_0_3MO_MikeThompson_NA_NA_Priorities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWIzOTMxMi1jNGM2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ctJoVqJ22WMI0o089B1uZ0g3PlXYy1dI2V-krt1uKhk=)**_

I can’t do it without you. Your input is crucial to me as I fight for bipartisan legislative solutions for our community. I am so grateful to have you on our team and your support has been invaluable.

Thank you,

Mike Thompson

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: Ensuring your vote matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina
body:
https://www.wileynickel.com/ [https://www.wileynickel.com/]
Friends –
I’m writing to you today because our democracy continues to stand on shaky ground.
In the most recent redistricting process in North Carolina, Republicans redrew our Congressional maps solely in their favor. This means that no matter how the voters vote, they have the highest likelihood of staying in power. In the process, they also made it near to impossible for Democratic leaders to have a fair shot at winning re-election in districts across the states.
While I’ve been impacted by this process, being kicked out of my seat is the least of my worries. I care about voting rights, and ensuring that our democracy functions as it should, with every eligible voter having their vote counted and their voice heard.
The voters should choose who represents them in Congress. Elected officials do not get to draw lines around the folks they’d like to represent and the folks who will keep them in power the longest. That is just not how our country is supposed to work.
So this year, I’m focused on protecting voting rights, fighting against partisan gerrymandering, and stabilizing the pillars of our democracy. Follow me on Twitter and consider sharing the video below if you are, too. [http://x.com/wileynickel/status/1755355891656720426?s=46&t=Vhoa7ikaY95Hvamw1rwXfg]
https://x.com/wileynickel/status/1755355891656720426?s=46&t=Vhoa7ikaY95Hvamw1rwXfg [https://x.com/wileynickel/status/1755355891656720426?s=46&t=Vhoa7ikaY95Hvamw1rwXfg]
SHARE [https://x.com/wileynickel/status/1755355891656720426?s=46&t=Vhoa7ikaY95Hvamw1rwXfg]
I’ll be working on educating our communities about how the GOP has taken over our elections and taken the power out of the voters’ hands.
I’ll be supporting pro-democracy candidates up and down the ballot and encouraging others to do the same.
And I’ll be working every day to ensure that North Carolinians representing our state in Washington fight for the values we care about here, and not for their personal fame.
JOIN ME [https://www.wileynickel.com/]There is a lot at stake here, Peter. But together we can make a difference in the future of our state. So thank you for being here and standing with me in this important fight.
I appreciate you and your commitment to our democracy.
Wiley
Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina
Wiley Nickel for North Carolina
PO Box 563
Raleigh, NC 27602
United States

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

Just wanted to take a second & introduce myself.

My name is Monica De La Cruz- I'm a free-thinking Hispanic woman & Christian conservative running to defend the most competitive congressional seat in America.

In the 2022 midterms we made history when we successfully flipped this seat red in a region that has voted blue for over a hundred years.

It is now the one seat Democrats need to win back to completely control the federal government- scary, I know.

I too am afraid of what happens to America under the rule of Democrats- but what I'm not afraid of is taking them head on.

Joe Biden, the liberal media, and the radical left despise me for who I am and what I believe.

_**They 're the very same people who will tell you my skin color determines who I am & nothing else.

The people who will tell you I can't be pro-life or pro-family because I'm a woman.

The people who will tell you that I can't be pro-law enforcement & pro-border security because I'm Hispanic. **_

My being & my values destroy the entire platform of the Democratic party & the liberal narrative.

And don't they know it!

**That's exactly why Joe Biden & the Democrats are raising millions of dollars right now- to defeat me at all costs.**

They're going to spend, say, and do whatever it takes to flip this seat back to blue, and ensure it stays that way for another hundred years.

I’m a high school dropout who started out working at Waffle House to pay the bills and put food on the table.

**Through grit and the American dream, I was the first woman to graduate from The Citadel’s Corps of Cadets.**

I’ve proven I’m a tough conservative who isn’t afraid to fight back against the woke liberal agenda.

**I’ve proven to Democrats I’m a threat to their constant lies and shady actions.**

[**Now, they’re attacking me in an attempt to silence me and regain power._But I’ll never stop. # About Nancy

Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! subject: why I’m supporting Abigail for Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
Your support allows us to organize events, send Virginians out to knock on doors, and introduce Abigail’s work to new voters.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78659259/454063608/1993432125?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-02-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDdjM2FmMjgtY2FjNi1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wsC8TqhvDQJZ0xD_nJf8sZTFF9T9DQAneqaU09r2h9E=)

| Peter,

My name is Joy, and I’m helping Team Spanberger as the volunteer coordinator. I’m proud to call Virginia home, and I can’t wait to elect Abigail Spanberger as our next Governor in 2025.

Like our many other volunteers, I’m excited to talk about Abigail’s work in Congress over the years, the values and vision that drive her every day, and her plan for the Commonwealth in 2025!

Before I continue, let me tell you my story and why I’m supporting Abigail for Governor. When I heard of Abigail's run for Governor, I couldn't contain my enthusiasm! She will fight for the issues that matter to all of us. Abigail is an authentic, empathetic, passionate problem solver, and that is exactly who we need for our next Governor.

**Your support allows us to organize events, send Virginians out to knock on doors and introduce Abigail’s work to new voters.**

I’m so appreciative of your support and sincerely look forward to working alongside you to elect Abigail as our next Governor of Virginia. subject: Hold Trump Accountable!
body:
You know by now exactly how dangerous Donald Trump and his actions are. He is indicted on 91 different charges and inspired and encouraged the January 6th attack against the Capitol. | | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78659422/454064194/444630146?refcode=2-8-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI2MDExMzJhLWNiYzYtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=__mO46b0A4KJ0oF4w-_RJU2g9Fh2g1IDTGhbGBXcNCw=)
---
| | Friend,You know by now exactly how dangerous Donald Trump and his actions are. He is indicted on 91 different charges and inspired and encouraged the January 6th attack against the Capitol. But on February 6th, the judicial system took the first step in ensuring that Donald Trump can be held accountable for his actions. A federal appeals court unanimously ruled that Trump _can_ be put on trial for his actions on January 6th. This is an important statement that no one is above the law, not even the President of the United States. **[Donald Trump being held accountable for his actions on January 6th is just one step in the right direction. We’re working hard to pass judicial reforms for all levels, including for the Supreme Court, and we need your help. Please contribute $10 now and we can work together to fight for an unbiased, independent judiciary.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78659423/454064195/444630146?refcode=2-8-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI2MDExMzJhLWNiYzYtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=__mO46b0A4KJ0oF4w-_RJU2g9Fh2g1IDTGhbGBXcNCw=)** Trump’s January 6th case is now more than likely headed to the Supreme Court, and we know just how corrupt the Supreme Court is. Justices are rubbing shoulders with and taking cash from conservative megadonors like Harlan Crow, and they’ve already overturned _Roe v. Wade._ [**If we want corrupt conservatives like Trump accountable, we need Congress to pass the**** _SCERT Act_****, but we can’t do it alone. The**** _SCERT Act_****is necessary to stop the corruption that is running rampant in our government. Can you please chip in $10 so we can keep working to end corruption and strengthen trust in our government?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78659424/454064196/444630146?refcode=2-8-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI2MDExMzJhLWNiYzYtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=__mO46b0A4KJ0oF4w-_RJU2g9Fh2g1IDTGhbGBXcNCw=) Thank you,— Team ECU/LAV Action

Janelle's primary election is in April, so we need to take advantage of this momentum and really work to make sure she can keep effectively campaigning and meeting voters like you. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = —James | | | ---|---|--- = Janelle Stelson has been speaking directly to the people of Central Pennsylvania for more than three decades as an Emmy-award-winning journalist. Now, Janelle is taking on Scott Perry and fighting for what we deserve — good-paying jobs to support our families, abortion rights, the highest quality healthcare and education, and someone we know we can trust. Janelle needs your support to unseat MAGA extremist Scott Perry and flip Pennsylvania's 10th District blue.** | = = Paid for by Friends of Janelle Stelson Friends of Janelle Stelson P.O. Box 41 Lemoyne, PA 17043 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Janelle Stelson for Congress, . You can also =.

I began my career as an Assistant Attorney General taking on big drug companies. Then, I served in the Kentucky State Senate for a decade, where I passed the first insurance mandate in Kentucky's history to ensure premature babies receive the nutrients they need.
In 2022, I was elected as the only Democrat serving Kentucky in Congress, and despite constant pushback from the state GOP, I’ve gone to bat for working families, and I’ve fought to protect abortion access, affordable healthcare, and so much more.
**I’ll never stop fighting for working Kentuckians and their families, but if we want to see real progress, we need to flip the House blue in November.**
**[So please, would you consider chipping in $25 (or whatever fits your budget) to help us keep KY-03 blue and retake the House this fall?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78659756/454065478/2127011039?refcode=EM_BS_MCG_240208_FR_ReIntro_A0_na_U2_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2FlNDViNC1jY2M2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-E-NfxaIpttV9qU9QGeAY0wCO8yLAb5M2D-K9Kl62nk=)**

body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a4c52996e066/rob-for-pa-weekly-update?e=131e83a3c2)
---
Dear friend,
Our past week was phenomenal! From Milford to Stroudsburg, Team Rob was out in full force collecting signatures. Rob traveled the district for petition parties, door knocking, and connecting with voters face to face. Although we had a great week, we still need YOUR HELP. To get on the ballot, we need to get signatures on our nomination petitions. Please reach out to [Frank](mailto:frank@robforpa.com?subject=Petitions&body=) to sign and circulate to get Rob on the ballot!
[](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=9ae2568e06&e=131e83a3c2)
Please join us this Saturday afternoon as we will host [Pizza & Petitions at Sabatini’s in Exeter](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=35ce20d488&e=131e83a3c2). It is our FINAL petition party!
|
---

We will need YOUR help to get Rob on the ballot throughout the rest of the petition period. Please feel free to reach out to our Political Director Frank Wojtash at (570)793-1487 or at frank@robforpa.com to start circulating and officially join Team Rob! Thank you for all your support!
Best Regards,Team Rob

subject: A Texas-sized campaign update

body:
| | Peter, we have a Texas-sized campaign update: **Representative Rhetta Bowers (D TX-113) JUST endorsed Brian ahead of our March 5 primary!**

Rhetta made history in 2018 when she was elected the first African American to represent TX-113 in the Texas State Legislature. Since then, she’s been a champion for children, healthcare, racial justice, and marginalized communities.

Now, she’s joining Team Williams to make history once again and send the first trauma surgeon to Congress. Rhetta knows that Brian is the best candidate in the race for TX-32. Peter,
Not to brag, but our campaign has earned some pretty big-name endorsements. Who, you might ask?
U.S. Senator Mark Kelly, Former Congresswoman Ann Kirkpatrick, League of Conservation Voters, Nevada Secretary of State Cisco Aguilar, the Congressional Progressive Caucus PAC, the Latino Victory Fund, Reproductive Freedom for All, nearly two dozen Arizona state and local elected officials ... and that’s just to name a few
This much is clear: Raquel Terán is building the broad and diverse coalition we’ll need to win this competitive primary and lift up Democrats in November.
However, there’s one thing we still need: As grateful as we are to earn the support of so many amazing leaders and organizations – it’s your endorsement that would make all the difference. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/EvMCfpA1IU2OKK0RzyEa_Q2]
Our grassroots campaign is powered by folks like you. That’s why we’d love if you became a Community Endorser for Raquel Terán! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/EvMCfpA1IU2OKK0RzyEa_Q2]

Muchas gracias,
Team Terán

name: John Fetterman
subject: A year after East Palestine, we still need to take action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Hi Derek,
Just over a year after the rail disaster in East Palestine, Ohio the Senate still has yet to take action.
**That’s why I’m still calling for my colleagues to sign on to my Railway Safety Act.** It’s a bipartisan bill that would require more notice to state emergency officials when trains are carrying hazardous materials, mandate better crewing of freight trains, increase monitoring of potential safety issues, and increase penalties in order to hold rail carriers accountable. We need to get this done.
**[If you agree, will you chip in any amount today so I can keep up this important work in the U.S. Senate?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240208-1?refcode=em20240208-1-8786&refcode2=8786_434096_AWkZa_&akid=8786%2E434096%2EAWkZa_)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240208-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240208-8786&refcode2=8786_434096_AWkZa_&akid=8786%2E434096%2EAWkZa_)**
Right now, years of deregulation have given a few huge rail carriers way too much power, all while they cut corners and risk public safety to save a few bucks.
Fighting back in favor of everyday PA residents is what I’m in the Senate to do. That’s why we’ve got to make progress for the safety of people everywhere.
**[If you’re with me in the fight to make progress for working people, make a contribution to continue powering my work.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240208-1?refcode=em20240208-1-8786&refcode2=8786_434096_AWkZa_&akid=8786%2E434096%2EAWkZa_)**
Thank you!
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20240208-8786-footer&t=1&refcode2=8786_434096_AWkZa_&akid=8786%2E434096%2EAWkZa_)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8786%2E434096%2EAWkZa_)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8786%2E434096%2EAWkZa_)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.
clean_body: Hi Derek, Just over a year after the rail disaster in East Palestine, Ohio the Senate still has yet to take action. That’s why I’m still calling for my colleagues to sign on to my Railway Safety Act. It’s a bipartisan bill that would require more notice to state emergency officials when trains are carrying hazardous materials, mandate better crewing of freight trains, increase monitoring of potential safety issues, and increase penalties in order to hold rail carriers accountable. We need to get this done. Right now, years of deregulation have given a few huge rail carriers way too much power, all while they cut corners and risk public safety to save a few bucks. Fighting back in favor of everyday PA residents is what I’m in the Senate to do. That’s why we’ve got to make progress for the safety of people everywhere. Thank you! ❤️ John John Fetterman U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mackenzie=20For=20Congress?=
subject: When Democrats Attack…You Must Be Doing Something Right!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mackenzie For Congress]()
body:
| | | | | [](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=9d905f3510&e=5ccada9200)
---
|
---
__ Dear Friend,
Maybe you saw it. Maybe you didn’t. Earlier today an e-mail filled with lies was sent out attacking me. It came from the so-called “Lehigh Valley Republican Congressional Leadership Fund.”
Who is this group? They are a dark money Super PAC that official records prove is Democrat-aligned and tied to Never-Trumpers.
**The bigger question is, why are Democrat-supporters masquerading as “Republicans” and attacking me? The answer is simple: they know I am the best candidate to defeat Susan Wild in November, so they are trying to get rid of me NOW!**
Let me tell you the truth...
**I am pro-life and have ALWAYS voted that way:**
* I’ve voted to reduce the amount of time in which someone can have an abortion under Pennsylvania’s law (which is one of the most liberal in the nation).

* I helped pass the law to end travesties like the Gosnell “House of Horrors.”

* During my campaigns for the state House, I have been consistently endorsed by the PA Pro-Life Federation which, in itself, should tell you the truth.

* And still, to this day, EVERY TIME I have been faced with legislation that actually reduces the number of abortions, I have voted YES to reducing the number of abortions.

My record is clear and consistent. I’ve never shied away from standing up for what is right, or explaining my position when I took votes on the record.
**It’s time for all of us to take a stand against these Democrat-aligned SuperPACs.**
**It’s time for us to get behind the candidate who can win this November (and that the Democrats clearly don’t want.)**
That’s why I’m asking you to please join #TeamMackenzie today so we can begin the fight to turn PA-7 RED again!
Thanks!
\- Ryan Mackenzie
|
---

The MAGA GOP knows that DC Statehood would almost certainly mean TWO more Democratic Senators, so they’re doing everything in their power to DESTROY it!

If we’re going to have any chance of fighting back, we need to demonstrate MASSIVE grassroots support for DC Statehood! **Please, respond now:**
