name: Rep. Jim Banks
subject: Special Announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Banks for Senate
body:
Join me >>

| [ ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=519078cf5c75456798301a6b64721d5d&_e=PFdhA8FkgKL03PZOiOhGrZ1FKXNFxOB850Pxj5_1WVJsf8Ehm1X4vE2VLelT_RiD1jKhiEhDCrusERvbdsGSkXGw46FfXXkXCNKQQbROWluYgHFL-fu7xwve9KgJTPkF2S_VeDc4RisBhybvXxpoS8djWHlyV-tCgfsiffkVuoewtqS9rHOPIaIeGtEXkFz1Px8OTx1OpOLYKElq2LIycfkwhhmcyfdSxGWuaNG_2KD4sOCPaddWugrMOkiBbs5ORcmhx-9QqnJTM6eaPQdGRbGTrM_uMuNOeuYgue5cMltCm_vLVXjOd9HpsL5k_n-BQe31WO-vE9oY9X-7XukWz6IDyesO6OOStdno5Q3nscXOd6UO24V_P0Pk8xohtqywFsYCFgmznbeDW7o5K3k6GQ%3D%3D)
---
Dear friend,

**_It’s officially Election Year - my campaign to represent the great State of Indiana in the U.S. Senate in 2024 is in full swing._** In the Senate, I intend to protect your freedom, defend our conservative values, and put America first. As we begin this journey together, I want to share my story:

I grew up in a working-class household in Columbia City, Indiana. My father was a factory worker and my mother worked in a nursing home. We often lived paycheck to paycheck, and I was raised in a trailer park for many years.

[](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=519078cf5c75456798301a6b64721d5d&_e=PFdhA8FkgKL03PZOiOhGrZ1FKXNFxOB850Pxj5_1WVJsf8Ehm1X4vE2VLelT_RiD1jKhiEhDCrusERvbdsGSkXGw46FfXXkXCNKQQbROWluYgHFL-fu7xwve9KgJTPkF2S_VeDc4RisBhybvXxpoS8djWHlyV-tCgfsiffkVuoewtqS9rHOPIaIeGtEXkFz1Px8OTx1OpOLYKElq2LIycfkwhhmcyfdSxGWuaNG_2KD4sOCPaddWugrMOkiBbs5OqSlMrS7U1-Osjcz-H5e_62p0GkBEw6UjkeefFcssTFmmy-N2N6LN2Rbkm0H10xDzK2x3asXIrhiV_FxtCNG7BplOsZn383Y495-60t8iaMsXn__y3KoZKqO7MKDEIDQnPEKog5TaFUKDJNlXtQmw4A%3D%3D)
Growing up, my parents taught me the values of hard-work, personal responsibility, and service to our community. My father voted for Democrats much of his life, but now, like many Americans, recognizes that the Republican Party is the true party of the working class.

I was the first in my family to attend college. At Indiana University, I met my wonderful wife, Amanda, who has been the biggest blessing in my life. She keeps me grounded and ensures our family stays true to our conservative values every day.

Coming from a humble background, I felt a calling to give back to my community. As such, after serving on a county council, I became a member of the Indiana State Senate in 2010. During my time in office, I took a leave of absence while I was deployed to Afghanistan as a Navy Reserve Supply Corps Officer.

[](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=519078cf5c75456798301a6b64721d5d&_e=PFdhA8FkgKL03PZOiOhGrZ1FKXNFxOB850Pxj5_1WVJsf8Ehm1X4vE2VLelT_RiD1jKhiEhDCrusERvbdsGSkXGw46FfXXkXCNKQQbROWluYgHFL-fu7xwve9KgJTPkF2S_VeDc4RisBhybvXxpoS8djWHlyV-tCgfsiffkVuoewtqS9rHOPIaIeGtEXkFz1Px8OTx1OpOLYKElq2LIycfkwhhmcyfdSxGWuaNG_2KD4sOCPaddWugrMOkiBbs5OFHq3z8SfFmPCMUtAmdBuyRbxHUt9p3n3RyDTA1cV8I103TYOwTQqTZj7D1XB6GU6z_t4gMoSBvHSMIruSDgqicbhBcL8Lv5_0Crsc5JlDQVGC26boA7DpXuf9_L4BtHtCvfjEpIHDiaVX7_ajOhG2g%3D%3D)
Serving my country abroad reinforced my resolve to defend the freedoms and values that make America great. As an Afghanistan War veteran, I know what it means to fight for our country and our values.

[](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=519078cf5c75456798301a6b64721d5d&_e=PFdhA8FkgKL03PZOiOhGrZ1FKXNFxOB850Pxj5_1WVJsf8Ehm1X4vE2VLelT_RiD1jKhiEhDCrusERvbdsGSkXGw46FfXXkXCNKQQbROWluYgHFL-fu7xwve9KgJTPkF2S_VeDc4RisBhybvXxpoS8djWHlyV-tCgfsiffkVuoewtqS9rHOPIaIeGtEXkFz1Px8OTx1OpOLYKElq2LIycfkwhhmcyfdSxGWuaNG_2KD4sOCPaddWugrMOkiBbs5OURrFav6-W-gPbSPUeuySDCCkyMYwoi4nvYZhCHj4ivROXp5InMIWjiVLX7uvVufOu4IdcH9ISPcwW6x_C5GxBQWBvL4DgbvpNz9OjxFI0zgbsDxrMjI5CS3JlKB5jT9wzZwJ_3qbfrxAGemqmYft8w%3D%3D)
During my time in Afghanistan, my wife stepped up to fill in for me in the State Senate. I am blessed to have a family dedicated to serving the American people.

Amanda and I started a family back in 2009. We’ve been blessed with three beautiful daughters, Lillian, Elizabeth, and Joann, who inspire me each day. I am fighting for our country because I am fighting for their future. I want my daughters to grow up in a country where they are safe and can thrive.

[](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=519078cf5c75456798301a6b64721d5d&_e=PFdhA8FkgKL03PZOiOhGrZ1FKXNFxOB850Pxj5_1WVJsf8Ehm1X4vE2VLelT_RiD1jKhiEhDCrusERvbdsGSkXGw46FfXXkXCNKQQbROWluYgHFL-fu7xwve9KgJTPkF2S_VeDc4RisBhybvXxpoS8djWHlyV-tCgfsiffkVuoewtqS9rHOPIaIeGtEXkFz1Px8OTx1OpOLYKElq2LIycfkwhhmcyfdSxGWuaNG_2KD4sOCPaddWugrMOkiBbs5OXTT-x-a-vBq_Wi2mvMsIruRRJGXgsz2y06JvDMzAx8SJupC6pOkOJy82nMnWFZdK5CEqsajZ0HtmyMRZPnG6qQ_dRuTmopUMe84pUGCtoeuDs88Cwql6hIxFnYOJM2KEQaL0R2K_nSybzvTLXNFX-w%3D%3D)
Since 2016, I have chosen to continue my service career by representing Indiana’s 3rd district in the U.S. Congress. During my time in the House, I have been a consistent conservative voice dedicated to upholding and protecting the conservative American values that make our nation great. I was elected chair of the Republican Study Committee, the largest caucus of conservatives in the House of Representatives, and have collaborated with strong leaders, like President Trump, to put America first - and he’s already endorsed my campaign!

[](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=519078cf5c75456798301a6b64721d5d&_e=PFdhA8FkgKL03PZOiOhGrZ1FKXNFxOB850Pxj5_1WVJsf8Ehm1X4vE2VLelT_RiD1jKhiEhDCrusERvbdsGSkXGw46FfXXkXCNKQQbROWluYgHFL-fu7xwve9KgJTPkF2S_VeDc4RisBhybvXxpoS8djWHlyV-tCgfsiffkVuoewtqS9rHOPIaIeGtEXkFz1Px8OTx1OpOLYKElq2LIycfkwhhmcyfdSxGWuaNG_2KD4sOCPaddWugrMOkiBbs5O3HLrTVykYxFOQd_lGAHnDO7Y5Knas5kqudHCE_1kWMQpQe_U984JzbZ3Ip0QcsTk5yPUea-HfcGdgnItN4RfhtI4mG6eRJjONQLU9TtZuGhNT3PZSbSswb_iTA6WEhlOZ6AOhXbVUuB-PvmUugWywQ%3D%3D)
As the next Senator of Indiana, I intend to continue defending hard-working Americans and refuse to let the radical Left crush our values and destroy our country. My congressional record of fighting for strong families, limited government, and tighter spending speaks for itself. We have a great country worth defending, and I intend to do just that.

As your next Senator, I will fight to balance the federal budget, protect our Southern border, stand up to China, and defend our children against the Left’s woke ideology. **But, I need support from strong, grassroots conservatives like YOU to ensure our movement makes it all the way to Washington.** [**_Will you join us in preserving the American Dream?_**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=519078cf5c75456798301a6b64721d5d&_e=PFdhA8FkgKL03PZOiOhGrZ1FKXNFxOB850Pxj5_1WVJsf8Ehm1X4vE2VLelT_RiD1jKhiEhDCrusERvbdsGSkXGw46FfXXkXCNKQQbROWluYgHFL-fu7xwve9KgJTPkF2S_VeDc4RisBhybvXxpoS8djWHlyV-tCgfsiffkVuoewtqS9rHOPIaIeGtEXkFz1Px8OTx1OpOLYKElq2LIycfkwhhmcyfdSxGWuaNG_2KD4sOCPaddWugrMOkiBbs5Oy6kq68PjuQp3n3Rs5tya04qABJxpREqiclUCsZPlTcsi_8NOBVPbu93ltbmT8Z4eZ0ErfK-aOow_0--FctWzQxOLjeu_HJgmr8eOs2kHe62ttTLjEvx7VB8krX3tGIUJC7BlG62mLWjMyxztZunpMg%3D%3D)
| [ **DONATE NOW** ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=519078cf5c75456798301a6b64721d5d&_e=PFdhA8FkgKL03PZOiOhGrZ1FKXNFxOB850Pxj5_1WVJsf8Ehm1X4vE2VLelT_RiD1jKhiEhDCrusERvbdsGSkXGw46FfXXkXCNKQQbROWluYgHFL-fu7xwve9KgJTPkF2S_VeDc4RisBhybvXxpoS8djWHlyV-tCgfsiffkVuoewtqS9rHOPIaIeGtEXkFz1Px8OTx1OpOLYKElq2LIycfJXb9R9qaKbbNEZ4c9RSmt8K0U1qsHG3wM99ajFrw8mHuZF7kO_EmLjLmqVDM87VpxwHcteMqYEO6JUFUzYoIqBHaTgYte9E_4kVxklez61Ox1I-fKQ0x3VExLRg71PIZ407R7pwEmSm72IBHicirnM3xpfWHyhSKTWbAvsWdBQRouwdDnaNFTQYx2prtGUmA%3D%3D)

clean_body: Join me >> | Dear friend, It’s officially Election Year - my campaign to represent the great State of Indiana in the U.S. Senate in 2024 is in full swing. In the Senate, I intend to protect your freedom, defend our conservative values, and put America first. As we begin this journey together, I want to share my story: I grew up in a working-class household in Columbia City, Indiana. My father was a factory worker and my mother worked in a nursing home. We often lived paycheck to paycheck, and I was raised in a trailer park for many years. Growing up, my parents taught me the values of hard-work, personal responsibility, and service to our community. My father voted for Democrats much of his life, but now, like many Americans, recognizes that the Republican Party is the true party of the working class. I was the first in my family to attend college. At Indiana University, I met my wonderful wife, Amanda, who has been the biggest blessing in my life. She keeps me grounded and ensures our family stays true to our conservative values every day. Coming from a humble background, I felt a calling to give back to my community. As such, after serving on a county council, I became a member of the Indiana State Senate in 2010. During my time in office, I took a leave of absence while I was deployed to Afghanistan as a Navy Reserve Supply Corps Officer. Serving my country abroad reinforced my resolve to defend the freedoms and values that make America great. As an Afghanistan War veteran, I know what it means to fight for our country and our values. During my time in Afghanistan, my wife stepped up to fill in for me in the State Senate. I am blessed to have a family dedicated to serving the American people. Amanda and I started a family back in 2009. We’ve been blessed with three beautiful daughters, Lillian, Elizabeth, and Joann, who inspire me each day. I am fighting for our country because I am fighting for their future. I want my daughters to grow up in a country where they are safe and can thrive. Since 2016, I have chosen to continue my service career by representing Indiana’s 3rd district in the U.S. Congress. During my time in the House, I have been a consistent conservative voice dedicated to upholding and protecting the conservative American values that make our nation great. I was elected chair of the Republican Study Committee, the largest caucus of conservatives in the House of Representatives, and have collaborated with strong leaders, like President Trump, to put America first - and he’s already endorsed my campaign! As the next Senator of Indiana, I intend to continue defending hard-working Americans and refuse to let the radical Left crush our values and destroy our country. My congressional record of fighting for strong families, limited government, and tighter spending speaks for itself. We have a great country worth defending, and I intend to do just that. As your next Senator, I will fight to balance the federal budget, protect our Southern border, stand up to China, and defend our children against the Left’s woke ideology. But, I need support from strong, grassroots conservatives like YOU to ensure our movement makes it all the way to Washington. | Sincerely, | ---|--- - Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2024 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78660917/454069392/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmRlYTNhMC1jZmM2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qQ8DHGI-0Q36CzeiGuqxgbYwRZMkQk4Bh5eloi8iwUI=)
Friends,
Earlier this week, I voted NO on the GOP’s sham impeachment of Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas.
Instead of focusing their energy on building just and respectful immigration policies, Republicans continue to play political games on the House floor.
Why? Because Donald Trump demands it.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78660918/454069393/764803318?refcode2=dfdea3a0-cfc6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&noskip=true&refcode=em240208-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmRlYTNhMC1jZmM2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qQ8DHGI-0Q36CzeiGuqxgbYwRZMkQk4Bh5eloi8iwUI=)
Donald Trump has been completely controlling the Republican party, and the House is clear evidence of his sway. He has been directing his MAGA extremist puppets to file these sham impeachment papers — whether it be against President Biden or Secretary Mayorkas — all in an effort to sow chaos and benefit his own campaign.
All of these games are an attempt to weaken Democrats so he can usurp power in November.
But as long as I am in Congress, I will continue to bring light to these schemes by the Republican party and fight to hold extremist lawmakers accountable for serving an insurrectionist instead of their constituents.
**[If you are with me, please support my reelection campaign today so I can continue fighting against MAGA extremism in Washington.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78660919/454069394/764803318?refcode2=dfdea3a0-cfc6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&refcode=em240208-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmRlYTNhMC1jZmM2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qQ8DHGI-0Q36CzeiGuqxgbYwRZMkQk4Bh5eloi8iwUI=)**

clean_body: All eyes are on this race to see if Democrats can break the gridlock in Congress and deliver on the most important issues facing our country. | = | Peter, I’m sure you heard about the must-win special election in NY-03 to replace George Santos on February 13. My good friend and Democratic nominee, Tom Suozzi, is running to replace expelled George Santos, and there’s so much at stake for Nassau, Queens, and the whole country. The special election in NY-03 is the bellwether that will determine if we can retake the Democratic House majority in 2024, and will reflect on the momentum of our campaign here in NY-04. All eyes are on this race to see if Democrats can break the gridlock in Congress and deliver on the most important issues facing our country. That’s why our grassroots support is crucial for Tom Suozzi’s campaign. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Laura Gillen * | | = Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY. name: Sam Waterston
subject: My first time in handcuffs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
How Jane Fonda got me arrested.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78661121/454070060/1328794144?refcode=ea.46fe374e-d0c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.46fe374e-d0c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ2ZmUzNzRlLWQwYzYtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KxK3VT03teqIbCPM7nA7_pnFQ-Ybaw0WGE_964miYt4=&emci=40fe374e-d0c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=46fe374e-d0c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=4823105)
---
Hey there, It’s Sam Waterston, and as you may know, on February 13th I will be joining Jane, Lily Tomlin, Martin Sheen, and more for a virtual Grace and Frankie reunion and live table read. **[All the proceeds benefit the Jane Fonda Climate PAC, so if you don’t have your tickets yet buy them now!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78661122/454070061/-1609412982?amount=24&refcode=ea.46fe374e-d0c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.46fe374e-d0c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ2ZmUzNzRlLWQwYzYtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KxK3VT03teqIbCPM7nA7_pnFQ-Ybaw0WGE_964miYt4=)** I’ve always admired Jane’s activism, so when she invited me to DC a couple of years back to stir up some good trouble and fight the stranglehold the fossil fuel lobby has on Washington, of course I said yes. So there we stood, arm in arm with other activists, blocking the street in front of the Library of Congress until the police came and cuffed us. **It was my first time being arrested, but luckily my friend Jane was there to show me the ropes.** **The work Jane PAC does is very important to me. As Jane says, we need bold policy changes from our leaders, and we need them now.** And to win that change, we all need to take action. There is too much at stake not to act. But who says activism can’t be a good time? I know you’re going to enjoy the Grace and Frankie reunion, and I can’t wait to see you there on February 13th. | [**GET YOUR TICKETS NOW**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78661123/454070062/-1609412982?amount=24&refcode=ea.46fe374e-d0c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.46fe374e-d0c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ2ZmUzNzRlLWQwYzYtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KxK3VT03teqIbCPM7nA7_pnFQ-Ybaw0WGE_964miYt4=)
---
See you soon,
Sam
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78661124/454070063/-1609412982?amount=24&refcode=ea.46fe374e-d0c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.46fe374e-d0c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ2ZmUzNzRlLWQwYzYtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KxK3VT03teqIbCPM7nA7_pnFQ-Ybaw0WGE_964miYt4=) | [**GET TICKETS NOW**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78661125/454070064/-1609412982?amount=24&refcode=ea.46fe374e-d0c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.46fe374e-d0c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ2ZmUzNzRlLWQwYzYtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KxK3VT03teqIbCPM7nA7_pnFQ-Ybaw0WGE_964miYt4=)

body:
did you know that Ohio is the only state in the country that can flip its Supreme Court?
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78661130/454070098/91811750?refcode=odp_em_240208_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWExNDM5OS1kMGM2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KMiU6mdWsXbTGlUuWu3nbayFJHISTUjM4PNiql9dcKA=) Team, We know how important of a role Ohio plays in this year’s elections. With our state being one that could decide control of Congress, it’s crucial that we get strong Democratic voters out to the polls so we can hold on to our Senate majority and flip the House. The thing is, our Republican-controlled Supreme Court is doing everything they can to stop us: **Ahead of this critical election, the Republican Supreme Court majority dismissed lawsuits challenging the state’s legislative maps, leaving heavily gerrymandered districts.** **[That’s why we’re asking if you can donate to our judicial fund today to help us flip the Court, secure a Democratic majority, and end gerrymandering in Ohio.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78661131/454070099/91811750?refcode=odp_em_240208_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWExNDM5OS1kMGM2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KMiU6mdWsXbTGlUuWu3nbayFJHISTUjM4PNiql9dcKA=)** This year’s elections have already been rigged with partisan gerrymandering, so we’re going to have to work overtime to ensure every Ohioan who wants to make their voice heard has the chance. But if we want to stop Republican gerrymandering once and for all, we need a Court that will serve as our line of defense. And that means re-electing Justice Michael Donnelly and Justice Melody Stewart and electing Judge Lisa Forbes. **[Will you chip in $5 to help us Build the Bench and flip the Court?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78661132/454070100/91811750?refcode=odp_em_240208_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWExNDM5OS1kMGM2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KMiU6mdWsXbTGlUuWu3nbayFJHISTUjM4PNiql9dcKA=)** We’re the only state in the country that can flip its Supreme Court, team. Let’s get it done. \- Ohio Democrats | ****Ohio is the only state in the country that can flip its Supreme Court this year. Can Ohio Democrats count on you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to the Judicial Fund to help fuel our fight to Build the Bench and flip the Court? →**** | **********[********](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78661133/454070101/91811750?refcode=odp_em_240208_1&amount=5;email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWExNDM5OS1kMGM2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KMiU6mdWsXbTGlUuWu3nbayFJHISTUjM4PNiql9dcKA=)****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78661134/454070102/91811750?refcode=odp_em_240208_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWExNDM5OS1kMGM2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KMiU6mdWsXbTGlUuWu3nbayFJHISTUjM4PNiql9dcKA=) **************

clean_body: did you know that Ohio is the only state in the country that can flip its Supreme Court? | = Team, We know how important of a role Ohio plays in this year’s elections. With our state being one that could decide control of Congress, it’s crucial that we get strong Democratic voters out to the polls so we can hold on to our Senate majority and flip the House. The thing is, our Republican-controlled Supreme Court is doing everything they can to stop us: Ahead of this critical election, the Republican Supreme Court majority dismissed lawsuits challenging the state’s legislative maps, leaving heavily gerrymandered districts. = This year’s elections have already been rigged with partisan gerrymandering, so we’re going to have to work overtime to ensure every Ohioan who wants to make their voice heard has the chance. But if we want to stop Republican gerrymandering once and for all, we need a Court that will serve as our line of defense. And that means re-electing Justice Michael Donnelly and Justice Melody Stewart and electing Judge Lisa Forbes. = We’re the only state in the country that can flip its Supreme Court, team. Let’s get it done. \- Ohio Democrats | **Ohio is the only state in the country that can flip its Supreme Court this year. Peter Willis,

The Senate Democratic caucus just voted in support of $14 billion in
funding for Israel. But not Bernie. Bernie stood firmly against continued
U.S. support for Israel’s war in Gaza, which has killed more than 27,000
Palestinians.

AIPAC is a big reason why support for Netanyahu’s war is so strong on
Capitol Hill and in the White House. And AIPAC has promised to spend $100
million against pro-Peace progressives like Bernie, Barbara Lee, Rashida
Tlaib, Pramila Jayapal, AOC, and Summer Lee in 2024.

AIPAC donates to both corporate Democrats and insurrectionists, and
they’re funded by right-wing billionaires and Trump mega-donors. So all
that money AIPAC will spend to try to defeat the Squad in Democratic
primaries is actually Republican money. It’s absolutely critical that we
raise money now to make our advertising, advocacy, GOTV, and grassroots

in right-wing money.

The reality is this is a fight between pro-Peace progressives and the

name: =?utf-8?Q?Cathy=20McMorris=20Rodgers?=
subject: The Best is Yet to Come
body:
| | | |
---
| Dear Friends and Patriots,

After months of prayer and careful consideration, it is with a heart full of gratitude and humility that I announce today I will not seek re-election to the U.S. House of Representatives. Below is the statement that I shared with the media moments ago.

To you, the loyal fighters for freedom - Thank you for your steadfast support of me throughout the years and for your tireless efforts to preserve and defend the American dream for future generations. I could not have done it without each and every supporter, volunteer, sign captain, table captain, prayer warrior – the list goes on and on. I am so proud of what we have accomplished together - for Eastern Washington and for America.

But know, our work does not stop here. We are in the midst of a battle for the future of this country. I promise you that while I will no longer be serving in Congress -- I will continue that fight. What’s at stake is too important – we must continue to strive for that more perfect union; to be that shining city on the hill and to be a beacon of hope for people all over the world.

In the months ahead, I look forward to opportunities to celebrate our accomplishments and thank you in person. In the meantime, I wanted to extend an invitation to those of you in Spokane to join me this evening for an event at 5 pm. I would love to see you. If you’re available and interested in joining, please contact my team at 509.624.1199 for the details.

Again, thank you for all your support and friendship throughout the years. The best is yet to come.

Gratefully,

Cathy
---
|
---

name: Jason Blazakis
subject: Thank You
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blazakis for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78661237/454070922/-2108453181?refcode=LOC_EM_Header_Logo&amount=5&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc2NTEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDY4NjA2OTgtZDFjNi1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jxID4tip8Oy1sXqSzzw7vVoqKTm9GXCfhccF72kkXUw=)
---
Peter, it is with a heavy heart that I have decided to end my race for Congress in New Jersey's 7th district, in the community I grew up in and am proud to call home. I am beyond grateful to have had you on my team. I am moved by the trust every one of my supporters had in me in our effort to defeat Tom Kean Jr. I want to thank my amazing supporters, my staff, and my family for their dedication and passion during this race. I first began my campaign for Congress to embody the spirit of public service that my father raised me with. I’ve spent my career as a national security advisor and now as a professor to best serve my country using my skill set. Unfortunately, after careful consideration, it’s become clear that running for Congress is not the best way to serve my country at this time. While this campaign didn't end the way we wanted, I'm so proud of what we've built together and for your continued support. _I am so grateful for the contributions from over 2100 donors that helped our efforts to raise just under half a million dollars to defend our democracy._ I’ll always cherish the memories I made on the campaign trail and meeting so many amazing individuals in our community who are also committed to improving our country. My campaign is ending Peter, but I’m still going to do my part to make sure Democrats FLIP the House and safeguard our Democracy for future generations. In my experience fighting against bad actors like Vladimir Putin, there is a very good chance we'd see Trump as a dictator on day 1,000. Tom Kean Jr. has enabled this extremism and we have to DEFEAT him. Moving forward, I will do everything in my power to help Democrats win up and down the ticket. I urge us all to support Democrats in state and local races in Morris, Somerset, Hunterdon, Sussex, Warren, and Union counties. Thank you again, Peter! \- Jason
Jason Blazakis is a proud New Jerseyan who has dedicated his career to combating extremism and educating young people to lead our nation in the future. clean_body: = Peter, it is with a heavy heart that I have decided to end my race for Congress in New Jersey's 7th district, in the community I grew up in and am proud to call home. I am beyond grateful to have had you on my team. I am moved by the trust every one of my supporters had in me in our effort to defeat Tom Kean Jr. I want to thank my amazing supporters, my staff, and my family for their dedication and passion during this race. I first began my campaign for Congress to embody the spirit of public service that my father raised me with. I’ve spent my career as a national security advisor and now as a professor to best serve my country using my skill set. Unfortunately, after careful consideration, it’s become clear that running for Congress is not the best way to serve my country at this time. While this campaign didn't end the way we wanted, I'm so proud of what we've built together and for your continued support. I am so grateful for the contributions from over 2100 donors that helped our efforts to raise just under half a million dollars to defend our democracy. I’ll always cherish the memories I made on the campaign trail and meeting so many amazing individuals in our community who are also committed to improving our country. My campaign is ending Peter, but I’m still going to do my part to make sure Democrats FLIP the House and safeguard our Democracy for future generations. In my experience fighting against bad actors like Vladimir Putin, there is a very good chance we'd see Trump as a dictator on day 1,000. Tom Kean Jr. has enabled this extremism and we have to DEFEAT him. Moving forward, I will do everything in my power to help Democrats win up and down the ticket. I urge us all to support Democrats in state and local races in Morris, Somerset, Hunterdon, Sussex, Warren, and Union counties. Thank you again, Peter! \- Jason Jason Blazakis is a proud New Jerseyan who has dedicated his career to combating extremism and educating young people to lead our nation in the future. Your contribution will help Jason stand up for Americans in Congress. | | = | = Blazakis for Congress PO Box 309 Lambertville, NJ 08530 United States | mailto:info@jason4nj.com Paid for by Blazakis for Congress Jason Blazakis served in the U.S. Department of State. Reaching grassroots supporters directly is CRITICAL if we're going to Save America from Joe Biden and the Left. But, in order to do that we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts.

**TEXT TRUMP to 88022** to start receiving text messages from President Trump.

It's because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. If you'd like to change your subscription status [follow this link.](https://saveamerica.nucleusemail.com/amplify/subscriptions/unsubscribe?hids=%recipient.hids%)

clean_body: If you’re voting for me, OPEN THIS NOW! | | | BREAKING FROM DONALD J. TRUMP: | MY CASE BEGINS TODAY AT THE SUPREME COURT! Fellow American, this one will decide everything. Democrats have REMOVED me from the ballot, but I know with your support right now, WE WILL BE FULL STEAM AHEAD FOR NOVEMBER! This is theGREATEST LEGAL CHALLENGE we've ever faced. | They want to RIG the ballot against me, but with your support, WE WILL STOP THEM! But that all depends on what you do right here, right now. With you on my side, WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! Thank you, | | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. But one thing is clear... **Omega 3s found in sea life are an ESSENTIAL mineral for humans...** Especially for healing inflammation in the body. So... what fish _can_ we consume instead? Well, there is ONE specific type of sea life that feeds on the most superior source of Omega 3... That’s 8X MORE powerful than any other fish... and ‘Bible approved’. My clients who add this ONE sealife nutrient to their diet ease inflammation in as little as 24 hours!

Your leadership will inspire them to join our mission. [Every dollar you contribute strengthens our resolve and magnifies our influence.](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.) name: Maxwell Frost
subject: Gen Z vs. MAGA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/CnKTaaIYGQ1hUr39FIubIg~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnp91dP0TMaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDIwOF9lbV9mcl9iMV9nZW56X2JpZGVuX2VuJmFtb3VudD0yNyZjZG1jPTJjNlJsbENSZmh5YUVKT01lWDNOckhoMzBhaSZyZWZjb2RlMj0yYzZSbGxDUmZoeWFFSk9NZVgzTnJIaDMwYWkmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MmM2UmxsQ1JmaHlhRUpPTWVYM05ySGgzMGFpVwNzcGNCCmXDXVjFZZYDD0VSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABp) Peter – As the first member of Gen Z elected to Congress, I know the power my generation holds in securing a better future for our country.

But if Trump wins reelection, that future will be turned upside down. **That’s why I’m traveling to battleground states across the country to engage with Gen Z voters and turn them out to the polls this year for President Biden.**

We NEED to fire up young voters to prevent another Trump presidency. My generation deserves a say in our future, so I’m taking this youth-powered movement to new heights and making sure our voices are heard this November.

_But that makes me a top target for attacks from MAGA Republicans who want to shut out our generation at the polls._

So I’m counting on your support, Peter. Because when we all come together, we can create an unstoppable movement that MAGA Republicans won’t stand a chance against.

[**_I need 950 supporters to step up with a donation today to ensure we have the resources to grow our youth-powered movement and engage young voters across the country. Can you rush a few dollar now? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/CnKTaaIYGQ1hUr39FIubIg~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnp91dP0TMaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDIwOF9lbV9mcl9iMV9nZW56X2JpZGVuX2VuJmFtb3VudD0yNyZjZG1jPTJjNlJsbENSZmh5YUVKT01lWDNOckhoMzBhaSZyZWZjb2RlMj0yYzZSbGxDUmZoeWFFSk9NZVgzTnJIaDMwYWkmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MmM2UmxsQ1JmaHlhRUpPTWVYM05ySGgzMGFpVwNzcGNCCmXDXVjFZZYDD0VSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABp)

Peter, young people are the driving force for change. We’ve already seen what happens when my generation turns out to the polls: **Democrats win._Democracy wins._**

With so much on the line – like taking action on gun violence, protecting abortion access, and ensuring our democracy stays intact – young people are paying more attention than ever before. But these risks alone won’t guarantee that they’ll head to the ballot box.

We need to reach young people where they are and _genuinely engage_ with them to bring them into this movement. That’s how we beat Trump and re-elect President Biden. That’s how we save the future of our democracy.

**But now, MAGA Republicans are TERRIFIED and desperate to stop young people from rising up in the next election, so I need your help.**

[**_To keep our youth-powered movement strong in the face of MAGA attacks, I’ll need an unstoppable grassroots movement behind me. Can you rush any amount right now to power my work to turn out young voters against Trump this November? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/CnKTaaIYGQ1hUr39FIubIg~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnp91dP0TMaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDIwOF9lbV9mcl9iMV9nZW56X2JpZGVuX2VuJmFtb3VudD0yNyZjZG1jPTJjNlJsbENSZmh5YUVKT01lWDNOckhoMzBhaSZyZWZjb2RlMj0yYzZSbGxDUmZoeWFFSk9NZVgzTnJIaDMwYWkmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MmM2UmxsQ1JmaHlhRUpPTWVYM05ySGgzMGFpVwNzcGNCCmXDXVjFZZYDD0VSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABp) | | | [Donate $10](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/tggmczauTQp1sQMzUNFI4w~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnp91dP0TMaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDIwOF9lbV9mcl9iMV9nZW56X2JpZGVuX2VuJmFtb3VudD0xMCZjZG1jPTJjNlJsbENSZmh5YUVKT01lWDNOckhoMzBhaSZyZWZjb2RlMj0yYzZSbGxDUmZoeWFFSk9NZVgzTnJIaDMwYWkmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MmM2UmxsQ1JmaHlhRUpPTWVYM05ySGgzMGFpVwNzcGNCCmXDXVjFZZYDD0VSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABp)

clean_body: | Peter – As the first member of Gen Z elected to Congress, I know the power my generation holds in securing a better future for our country. But if Trump wins reelection, that future will be turned upside down. That’s why I’m traveling to battleground states across the country to engage with Gen Z voters and turn them out to the polls this year for President Biden. We NEED to fire up young voters to prevent another Trump presidency. My generation deserves a say in our future, so I’m taking this youth-powered movement to new heights and making sure our voices are heard this November. But that makes me a top target for attacks from MAGA Republicans who want to shut out our generation at the polls. So I’m counting on your support, Peter. Because when we all come together, we can create an unstoppable movement that MAGA Republicans won’t stand a chance against. Peter, young people are the driving force for change. We’ve already seen what happens when my generation turns out to the polls: Democrats win.Democracy wins. With so much on the line – like taking action on gun violence, protecting abortion access, and ensuring our democracy stays intact – young people are paying more attention than ever before. But these risks alone won’t guarantee that they’ll head to the ballot box. We need to reach young people where they are and genuinely engage with them to bring them into this movement. That’s how we beat Trump and re-elect President Biden. That’s how we save the future of our democracy. But now, MAGA Republicans are TERRIFIED and desperate to stop young people from rising up in the next election, so I need your help. | | | | ~~ | ~~ ~ In this together, Maxwell Frost ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Maxwell is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District in Congress. **About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

name: Keir Bradford-Grey
subject: Black history is American history
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEIR FOR AG
body:
As Attorney General, Keir will take on powerful special interests who treat vulnerable people unfairly, from corporate polluters, opioid manufacturers, to predatory lenders. Keir will always fight for fairness, opportunity and justice. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/f_OCAZQVq06HV0T6jD6mWA2?unsubscribedata=l8f0vWReup8T0fkGXyPzkMczhbNRu3D4nYg1f8JKt%2FQrG1DdrHacVmVA60CNYk8qd0h7yvYVICtu4sr97Jcv6R24nmUhjGU%2FF9%2FcPhb3FfH64QeFyoK1CED3BLNaAz9W3AbQZUEz8%2FTXfA9j%2BmwI8LBcLdOMV%2BGQ86pmFBHySaoVM65GFf74vMWNsSc%2FY0m2y4eaQGqnrJ2CAZp85j9a8eScwrhYtRYoitHDHpFLpzKnY9ewJywb7WLgEQkTJzp2HFcZH%2F%2FhSSNE0AwMfSKTo32xpIBnt7obVjTjODXN3ZFkQoTXDXZrairaOwWZVsX%2B0kREXsdJW3cS%2BhK1bnWxqk1I6MgFx2uCcC2XTXJb8VVzzpdJIXhQ%2BachHpbPZ32cPq6it4i560oDf5e39efwRHRkji%2BlgD20zI8qu875iBrhVsntUfWrCYVFD74eRoFa)
---
| |
---
Peter,

This Black History Month, we celebrate and honor the remarkable contributions, achievements, and resilience of Black Americans throughout history. It’s a moment for us to reflect on the struggles, triumphs, and our ongoing journey towards justice and equality.

In Pennsylvania, we are blessed with a rich tapestry of Black history and Black excellence that has shaped our communities, the Commonwealth, and our nation. For example, Pennsylvania is home to unsung hero C. Delores Tucker, who helped push Pennsylvania to pass the Equal Rights Amendment while she served as Secretary of State. We also boast a broad roster of trailblazing athletes, entertainers and artists — like Wilt Chamberlain, Billie Holiday, Marian Anderson to name a few. Or Guion S. Bluford — the first Black astronaut in space.

**_The legacy of Black Pennsylvanians is woven into the very fabric of our society._**

I am honored to be a candidate for Pennsylvania’s next “People’s Lawyer.” If elected, I would join the ranks of seven other Black Attorneys General across our country and be the first Black woman to hold a statewide office in PA. _But it’s never just about being first; it’s about making sure we’re never the last._

From predatory practices that prey on the poor to criminal justice reform to the right to make your own health care decisions — including abortion care — there are so many issues that disproportionately impact our Black communities. It’s important we have real representation in our elected offices because there can be no decision about us without us.

I'm deeply committed to building a more equitable and inclusive Pennsylvania for _all._ I believe that our diversity is our strength, and that every voice deserves to be heard, valued, and protected.

As we commemorate this important month, let us recommit ourselves to the unfinished work of those who came before us and strive for a more just, fair, and equitable Commonwealth.

Thank you for your support,

Keir Bradford-Grey

* * *

clean_body: As Attorney General, Keir will take on powerful special interests who treat vulnerable people unfairly, from corporate polluters, opioid manufacturers, to predatory lenders. Keir will always fight for fairness, opportunity and justice. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, This Black History Month, we celebrate and honor the remarkable contributions, achievements, and resilience of Black Americans throughout history. It’s a moment for us to reflect on the struggles, triumphs, and our ongoing journey towards justice and equality. In Pennsylvania, we are blessed with a rich tapestry of Black history and Black excellence that has shaped our communities, the Commonwealth, and our nation. For example, Pennsylvania is home to unsung hero C. Delores Tucker, who helped push Pennsylvania to pass the Equal Rights Amendment while she served as Secretary of State. We also boast a broad roster of trailblazing athletes, entertainers and artists — like Wilt Chamberlain, Billie Holiday, Marian Anderson to name a few. Or Guion S. Bluford — the first Black astronaut in space. The legacy of Black Pennsylvanians is woven into the very fabric of our society. I am honored to be a candidate for Pennsylvania’s next “People’s Lawyer.” If elected, I would join the ranks of seven other Black Attorneys General across our country and be the first Black woman to hold a statewide office in PA. It’s important we have real representation in our elected offices because there can be no decision about us without us. I'm deeply committed to building a more equitable and inclusive Pennsylvania for all. I believe that our diversity is our strength, and that every voice deserves to be heard, valued, and protected. name: Team DASS
subject: Today’s Supreme Court hearing.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78662499/454074907/-664527026?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjU4YWVjNy1kNWM2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ivwfMfWhhtbqJKmDRGxAHyxaHwH1G6Urp6KswPm8nfM=)
Today, the Supreme Court began hearing oral arguments to decide whether Trump’s incitement of insurrection can keep him off the ballot. As DASS Chair Jena Griswold said earlier today, **“we are a nation of laws, under which we should all be treated equally. Today’s oral argument before the Supreme Court was a historic moment in our country’s history.”** We don’t know what the final outcome of this trial will be, but we know this: whether Trump is on the ballot or not, our Democratic Secretaries of State will continue to protect our democracy - at all costs. That means defending access to the ballot box, registering voters regardless of their political affiliation, fighting back against misinformation, and so much more that ensures the foundation of our democratic principles remains steadfast. [Defending democracy is a constant (and expensive!) effort. But it’s worth fighting for. Folks,

The border bill is as dead as Woodrow Wilson.

_That 's pretty darn dead._

Here's the truth of the matter: If Biden wants a secure border and wants to prevent illegals from entering our country like he all of a sudden says he does, it's in his power to do it.

_How?_ _**He can change his policies and follow the law.**_

Our country is suffering at the hands of the complete and utter chaos at our Southern Border. Communities are in danger and are being crushed by the **avalanche of illegals who are walking into America like it's Home Depot on a Saturday morning.**

Mexico's cartels have been exploiting our open border to terrorize Americans for years, and their weapon of choice is fentanyl.

**_Louisiana lost more than 1,300 loved ones to fentanyl poisoning in 2022 alone._**
The floodgates have been open too long. Biden has pandered to the Woke Mob on this time and time again. We have to get serious about calling for his IMMEDIATE action to shut it down.

That 's pretty darn dead. Here's the truth of the matter: If Biden wants a secure border and wants to prevent illegals from entering our country like he all of a sudden says he does, it's in his power to do it. How? He can change his policies and follow the law. Our country is suffering at the hands of the complete and utter chaos at our Southern Border. Communities are in danger and are being crushed by the avalanche of illegals who are walking into America like it's Home Depot on a Saturday morning. Mexico's cartels have been exploiting our open border to terrorize Americans for years, and their weapon of choice is fentanyl. Louisiana lost more than 1,300 loved ones to fentanyl poisoning in 2022 alone. The floodgates have been open too long. Biden has pandered to the Woke Mob on this time and time again. name: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
subject: Deadlines Coming Up Fast:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
I’m facing the biggest challenge to my campaign, and I need your immediate help.

|
---
| | | **I’m facing the biggest challenge to my campaign, and I need your immediate help.
**
---
|
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=chalng_2_08_24_email_1rs1_1_nd&n=1)

[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=chalng_2_08_24_email_1rs1_1_nd&n=2)
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=chalng_2_08_24_email_1rs1_1_nd&n=3)
---
|
---
Dear Peter,
When I declared my independence from the two-party Washington establishment and announced my campaign for President, I knew it would be an all-out fight.
I knew the Democrat and Republican establishments would stop at nothing to try and block my campaign every step of the way.
And I knew I couldn’t do any of this without friends like you. _Thank you for giving our campaign a chance to earn your vote._
Right now, I’m facing the biggest challenge to my campaign, [and I’m writing because I need your immediate help](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=chalng_2_08_24_email_1rs1_1_nd&n=4).
I must get my name on the ballot in all 50 states and the District of Columbia.
The whole process will cost my campaign nearly [$20 million](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=chalng_2_08_24_email_1rs1_1_nd&n=5) as we fight state by state to get on the ballot.
That’s why I’m asking you to help support my campaign today.
Will you rush a special and urgently needed donation to [Team Kennedy](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=chalng_2_08_24_email_1rs1_1_nd&n=6) today? [Your best gift today](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=chalng_2_08_24_email_1rs1_1_nd&n=7) will be a huge boost in our fight to get my name on every ballot – including yours.
[CONTRIBUTE $5 >>](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=chalng_2_08_24_email_1rs1_1_nd&n=8)
[CONTRIBUTE $10 >>](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=10&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=chalng_2_08_24_email_1rs1_1_nd&n=9)
[CONTRIBUTE $24 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=24&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=chalng_2_08_24_email_1rs1_1_nd&n=10)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=100&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=chalng_2_08_24_email_1rs1_1_nd&n=11)
[CONTRIBUTE $240 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=240&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=chalng_2_08_24_email_1rs1_1_nd&n=12)
[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=chalng_2_08_24_email_1rs1_1_nd&n=13)
The good news is I just qualified to be on the ballot in Utah, and my campaign acquired the signatures needed for me to qualify in New Hampshire – _in one day!_
The bad news is – we’ve only just begun. And we have a lot to do – _in a very short amount of time._
Getting on the ballot as an independent presidential candidate is a huge uphill fight.
Democrat and Republican candidates barely break a sweat. They cruise to ballot access, maybe paying a small filing fee or having to turn in a handful of signatures.
My campaign, however, must get more than 1,000,000 petition signatures.
With all the deadlines coming up so fast, we may have to hire petitioners to help out as well – which will be very expensive.
And there’s no doubt that my campaign will rack up millions of dollars in legal fees because of the roadblocks before us.
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=chalng_2_08_24_email_1rs1_1_nd&n=14)
|
---
Democracy is much more than voting.
There’s so much at stake in this election.
[Please help out all you can.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=chalng_2_08_24_email_1rs1_1_nd&n=15) Thank you!
| |
---
---
Sincerely,
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
|
---

Peter, the choice in this election couldn’t be clearer.

Throughout her career, Emilia has fought for Northeast Ohio’s working families.

She’s called this community home her entire life. That’s why she knows that the right-wing attacks on reproductive freedoms, voting rights, workers’ rights, affordable health care, and so much more aren’t just part of DC’s political games — **_they’re real issues that affect real people here in OH-13._**

**Her opponents can’t say the same.**

Given the chance, they’ll side with extremist Republicans and their dangerous agenda at each and every turn — **even if that means throwing the people of Northeast Ohio under the bus in the process.**

But they have some of the most deep-pocketed special interest groups in the country backing their campaigns, _and they could buy their way into power if we don’t fight back._

[**That’s why we need your help to defend Emilia, spread her message to every corner of OH-13, and combat the Republican extremists trying to flip this seat red. Thanks,

_Team Sykes_

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

Hi there,

It’s no secret that OH-01 is one of the most competitive districts on the map this year.

That’s why so many organizations and leaders have joined Team Landsman as we work to keep this seat blue and defend it from Republican extremism.

In the fight for abortion rights, we’re honored to have the support of **Planned Parenthood Action Fund** and **Reproductive Freedom for All**.

Greg’s tireless advocacy for Southwest Ohio’s workers have earned him the endorsement of dozens of labor unions, including the **AFL-CIO Cincinnati chapter** , **Ironworkers Local 44** , **IBEW Local 212** , and so many more.

And environmental groups like the **League of Conservation Voters** have endorsed Greg because of his support for a more sustainable, climate-friendly future.

We’re so proud to have these and so many other incredible organizations on our team.

But we know we can’t win this race without support from the most important group of all: ******_Grassroots supporters like you._**

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB FOR PA
body:
Here's how I plan on getting it done:

| [ ](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d44f0ce01756422f8e69f5b2c9e253a9&_e=oMHzNQZxjIXDR3MtLShxPIi_zvRpMOrAVkd5-HCcOnkEB6Lx0-L668thQJajeNHfnBipionJQfTmQtKoER-_EocssMHu4gGZbYu-NEiCT08yT1paZdWrNdxyoO1xwFMQikaP4Et-VXCl5zw2Mn2-NBQPyJ92NBfjfKZwc2_Mi6bqF3ZgRlh-KqLIfFyXGQvyRT0oaUCIW41f8CzmC_iTj70gtEtlduQvyU1nbsXade2ayfNGj--4KJ3X2WeOD6iqt1SbTHtmGTRkMqQNZrJnWlOn5OCRBT-uu4sTAFL4o-foc2kMPoamGD1Ix2vYJAiDpY71P-dsF2xrYCeRr35s7qSHMU7S1IDVDb3Gp73EmYRDNBOkBtyn7T_iXziSEPqkRs3XyPiWLuz2HdGgWH-ohQ%3D%3D)
---
My Fellow American,

**[This email is a little longer than normal because I want to introduce you to one of the most important new Republican candidates for Congress in America... ](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d44f0ce01756422f8e69f5b2c9e253a9&_e=oMHzNQZxjIXDR3MtLShxPIi_zvRpMOrAVkd5-HCcOnkEB6Lx0-L668thQJajeNHfnBipionJQfTmQtKoER-_EocssMHu4gGZbYu-NEiCT08yT1paZdWrNdxyoO1xwFMQikaP4Et-VXCl5zw2Mn2-NBQPyJ92NBfjfKZwc2_Mi6bqF3ZgRlh-KqLIfFyXGQvyRT0oaUCIW41f8CzmC_iTj70gtEtlduQvyU1nbsXade2ayfNGj--4KJ3X2WeOD6iqUSUh0zuizjs49bFB4XH1TSdNlhDR-5GIVoZAWUQs1ozWLWGmdTWC9y-Zm4ktOcPfivqfnJXJJLaI3IuJdb-YMnethfMXqLnKjrw61k7_SKoiGngbyXOu3cEc0aQQHogYuk5jTkOM_4C8Thhh9-bbpw%3D%3D)**

As you know, I take my responsibility to serve seriously. I consider it a sacred duty to do everything I can to fight for freedom and conservative values.

**To carry out my duty and deliver victories for conservatives, I need your help to build a team of patriotic, conservative freedom fighters that 'll support the America First agenda.**

**[Would you consider chipping in any amount to help me put key candidates across the country in a position to win this November?](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d44f0ce01756422f8e69f5b2c9e253a9&_e=oMHzNQZxjIXDR3MtLShxPIi_zvRpMOrAVkd5-HCcOnkEB6Lx0-L668thQJajeNHfnBipionJQfTmQtKoER-_EocssMHu4gGZbYu-NEiCT08yT1paZdWrNdxyoO1xwFMQikaP4Et-VXCl5zw2Mn2-NBQPyJ92NBfjfKZwc2_Mi6bqF3ZgRlh-KqLIfFyXGQvyRT0oaUCIW41f8CzmC_iTj70gtEtlduQvyU1nbsXade2ayfNGj--4KJ3X2WeOD6iqP6UfmoIKiP33XiLlmpmUmEnJm8JrAytI3IKTrHlxB7BaVNPbGGGHMVBRmWKUXUxKBvXP9zfOyLYRoWmxTFuoPizST8xoF13iYK4N8er7ScyxljqoiLgtSFGPiSUelAeFDcshKuB-2khQWbVCjJpfIA%3D%3D)**

My team and I have been searching the country for the best opportunities to flip districts from Democrat to Republican.

**Fellow American, we 've identified one of the most important Republican Congressional candidates in the country.

His name is Rob Bresnahan. He's running in Pennsylvania's 8th district - and he has my wholehearted endorsement.** He's aiming to unseat the Radical Socialist Matt Cartwright.

**Fellow American, this is going to be a tough campaign and here 's why:** Top Democrats like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden have identified PA-08 as a district they could lose. _So now, they 're **DUMPING MILLIONS** of Leftist dollars into this race._

I know that I don't have to tell you this, but America is truly at a tipping point. Our freedoms and the survival of our Republic are on the ballot this November.

**[That's why I'm humbly asking you to join me in endorsing Rob Bresnahan by sending in a donation of any amount.](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d44f0ce01756422f8e69f5b2c9e253a9&_e=oMHzNQZxjIXDR3MtLShxPIi_zvRpMOrAVkd5-HCcOnkEB6Lx0-L668thQJajeNHfnBipionJQfTmQtKoER-_EocssMHu4gGZbYu-NEiCT08yT1paZdWrNdxyoO1xwFMQikaP4Et-VXCl5zw2Mn2-NBQPyJ92NBfjfKZwc2_Mi6bqF3ZgRlh-KqLIfFyXGQvyRT0oaUCIW41f8CzmC_iTj70gtEtlduQvyU1nbsXade2ayfNGj--4KJ3X2WeOD6iq-yVRb_0NZb4mFDnSoHMk9XXI9MO3AHnEAw6VpnY3ljK5ZmfdUfo2SIdROQ89pAq1Ul9MKCBVetG0wKEBaLYLPP1rMQ7yBm0fqVX5brRmMSfMggBXRRP3jLWWZQwpoEF41t-7h8Ni8ZTE7Mk_8x4zzQ%3D%3D)**

Thank you,
[](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d44f0ce01756422f8e69f5b2c9e253a9&_e=oMHzNQZxjIXDR3MtLShxPIi_zvRpMOrAVkd5-HCcOnkEB6Lx0-L668thQJajeNHfnBipionJQfTmQtKoER-_EocssMHu4gGZbYu-NEiCT08yT1paZdWrNdxyoO1xwFMQikaP4Et-VXCl5zw2Mn2-NBQPyJ92NBfjfKZwc2_Mi6bqF3ZgRlh-KqLIfFyXGQvyRT0oaUCIW41f8CzmC_iTj70gtEtlduQvyU1nbsXade2ayfNGj--4KJ3X2WeOD6iqOMP2vy2n9vCyD71mSjCbkdgqS-2kO3B4lXs_FzBel0FFk1dW64kUSi7H4hD1jnngrvOAc9H_p4B8p88vV46VETm3Yp4t1bF7reC6WH40At9YvH_2wXs9NoieuDJ6TsI1qwF-XmBg-FsIR-CjcNLq9w%3D%3D) | PAID FOR BY ROB FOR PA

name: Congressman Banks
subject: I’m falling behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Banks for Senate
body:
The Senate Majority is Up to You

|
---

We’re at a difficult spot in this primary fundraising push...

name: Wes Moore
subject: It's Black History Month
body:
Friend,this Black History Month, I encourage all of you to learn more about Maryland’s ties to historic Black leaders across the state who paved the way for each and every one of us.

This month, take some time to explore the stories of civil rights leaders like Thurgood Marshall, Juanita Jackson Mitchell, and Pauli Murray by visiting Maryland's Black history museums and landmarks. Learn more about abolitionist Harriet Tubman, who was born right here in Maryland. Maryland has a rich Black history from the Eastern Shore to our state’s capital Annapolis, and I encourage you to explore more.

Black History Month reminds us about the importance of continually educating ourselves, not just this month, but all year. We must take the time to acknowledge the diverse experiences of Black Americans across the country and strive to do better to reach an equitable country by increasing opportunity and access to all.

This year, we’ve declared 2024 as the year of Civil Rights in Maryland to recognize the Civil Rights Act and the 160 years since enslaved African Americans were freed in Maryland. We also recently announced 24 African American Heritage Preservation Program grants from the Maryland Commission on African American History and Culture and Maryland Historical Trust to nonprofit groups.

To build a stronger future, we must recognize our past. Acknowledging the shoulders we stand on also includes using those stories to empower our work. Black Americans have continued to move the needle on what is and can be expected when it comes to leadership, making history, and creating change.

Here's to celebrating another year of excellence and joy.

Happy Black History Month.

Elevate,
Wes Moore

clean_body: Friend,this Black History Month, I encourage all of you to learn more about Maryland’s ties to historic Black leaders across the state who paved the way for each and every one of us. This month, take some time to explore the stories of civil rights leaders like Thurgood Marshall, Juanita Jackson Mitchell, and Pauli Murray by visiting Maryland's Black history museums and landmarks. Learn more about abolitionist Harriet Tubman, who was born right here in Maryland. Maryland has a rich Black history from the Eastern Shore to our state’s capital Annapolis, and I encourage you to explore more. Black History Month reminds us about the importance of continually educating ourselves, not just this month, but all year. We must take the time to acknowledge the diverse experiences of Black Americans across the country and strive to do better to reach an equitable country by increasing opportunity and access to all. This year, we’ve declared 2024 as the year of Civil Rights in Maryland to recognize the Civil Rights Act and the 160 years since enslaved African Americans were freed in Maryland. We also recently announced 24 African American Heritage Preservation Program grants from the Maryland Commission on African American History and Culture and Maryland Historical Trust to nonprofit groups. To build a stronger future, we must recognize our past. Acknowledging the shoulders we stand on also includes using those stories to empower our work. Black Americans have continued to move the needle on what is and can be expected when it comes to leadership, making history, and creating change. Here's to celebrating another year of excellence and joy. Happy Black History Month. Elevate, Wes Moore

Peter — I’m not taking a dime from corporate PACs. I hope you’ll let me explain why, but [**if you’re already with me, you can chip in now →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78663128/454077122/-106617006?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240208_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGIzNzIzZTAtZDdjNi1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZdHHL0R0_n0WQxfDQUMQUz2wKNrbqEr0STmYJYM4U34=) Our democracy shouldn’t be for sale, but my Republican opponent, David Schweikert, doesn’t seem to agree. **He’s taken _over $1 million_ from corporate PACs during his career. And those companies seem to have gotten their money’s worth from him.** He took over $500,000 from financial industry PACs and then voted to gut Wall Street reform, strip consumers of their right to sue when banks deceived them, and dismantle the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau. I took on corporate fraudsters as Arizona Assistant Attorney General, took on Wall Street Big Banks by helping millions of Americans have access to fair bank accounts, and fought alongside Elizabeth Warren to create the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau. The people of Arizona’s 1st Congressional District deserve to be represented by someone who will take on powerful interests that prey on everyday people, not someone doing the bidding of corporate donors. I’m running for Congress to represent hard-working Arizonans, not corporations. That’s why I _refuse_ to accept donations from their corporate PACs and why I’ll always be transparent with you. But I can’t keep up our campaign’s momentum alone — I need your help. [**Peter, can I count on you to contribute $25, $50, or whatever you can afford today? As a U.S. Congressman, former businessman, and proud Marylander, David has fought for struggling families and communities by supporting policies that empower them. This makes me proud to work for David, but don’t just take it from me. Here's what Minority House Leader **Hakeem Jeffries** has to say: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78663295/454077622/-1284613058?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzZkYzE2Zi1kOGM2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=usFMuxR3_0eDpLe0QL-zF_2PjZ29Pdlv8VoKQ0UVwWc=&emci=ea0bafce-bac6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=876dc16f-d8c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=25681160) This is what Congresswoman and Minority Whip **Katherine Clark** , shared: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78663296/454077623/-1284613058?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzZkYzE2Zi1kOGM2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=usFMuxR3_0eDpLe0QL-zF_2PjZ29Pdlv8VoKQ0UVwWc=&emci=ea0bafce-bac6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=876dc16f-d8c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=25681160) And here is what Chairman and Congressman **Pete Aguilar** said: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78663297/454077624/-1284613058?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzZkYzE2Zi1kOGM2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=usFMuxR3_0eDpLe0QL-zF_2PjZ29Pdlv8VoKQ0UVwWc=&emci=ea0bafce-bac6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=876dc16f-d8c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=25681160) We are honored to have these leaders standing with David in the fight to create opportunity for everyone. David's proven track record has these leaders fired up and ready to support his campaign, but we want to hear from more members of this team. [**If you're ready to support David Trone for U.S. Senate, can you share why you're on Team Trone?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78663298/454077625/1274491938?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzZkYzE2Zi1kOGM2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=usFMuxR3_0eDpLe0QL-zF_2PjZ29Pdlv8VoKQ0UVwWc=&emci=ea0bafce-bac6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=876dc16f-d8c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=25681160) | [SHARE WHY YOU'RE ON TEAM TRONE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78663299/454077626/1274491938?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzZkYzE2Zi1kOGM2LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=usFMuxR3_0eDpLe0QL-zF_2PjZ29Pdlv8VoKQ0UVwWc=&emci=ea0bafce-bac6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=876dc16f-d8c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=25681160)

I am so proud and so fortunate to call Florida home. This state has given me a better life, a beautiful community, a loving family, the chance to serve my country, and the opportunity to achieve my American Dream. That's why my heart breaks watching far-right extremists like Rick Scott work so hard to destroy everything that makes our state so great.

I'm running for Senate to protect the opportunities that made my story possible, defend the working families who call Florida home, and give our state the leadership we deserve. Polling data shows that my race is already a dead heat, but Rick Scott has already spent MILLIONS of his own fortune to destroy our momentum.
**[That's why I'm asking one final time: Will you please add your name to help me flip Florida blue and defeat Rick Scott? Our Senate majority is on the line here, and we need all hands on deck.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78663468/454078141/-1035118009?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk754-su-nd&refcode=jtk754-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGM4NTJiNDQtZDljNi1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4iOpD-bjLOm1RRYCbUSwKtY7ZugcmbGQfWQvnGQW4O0=&emci=895db9f3-36c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=0c852b44-d9c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=3969733)**

Dear Friend, **[Please rush me your GARVEY FOR SENATE Campaign R.S.V.P. in the next 48 hours to help me win...](https://links.greatamericatoday.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=75f8aba98f1c4859a1573a530ad94990&_e=Ru793ZsrSORlqimXtsLlbI6UKeIuN_Gmw55vkRL3B1-oqmIjBkt9kmFbQQrJ1B7Lz6e9vk453HlFa9nujNKing6vTYq_ufP-4mKEijiuje4pjhmf0PN8kUO5dNWBQBhSQJasjTkJoz-JjPzT7s4CYlj2GmM86Xc0Zod3NFHD-JOs8tLLb8KDEGbJ-oco08Xa6ffzzhTNRB_8TtQ42z00KRCy4xSGxg7VIW75tg4OQeuB3aSaqFCdAGehGfZN6KSuZavHF9xfEAYdhjqXQOC4wkTor7qfLIcNB-89vwEaKSvatMqlYyZO3rcRNN6RlZVLXgIFEySyApkwl7KO2ZqUckypE1VhOarDpKVVMzCC8nHza_EjjN2ENuf3X9Oje34Y9sAlP7wB18TaQ-E7VS9ajg%3D%3D)** ...a California Senate seat that is open for the first time since 1992... ...a Senate seat in a blue state that is winnable for the first time in a long time, precisely because the people of this state are every day seeing their quality of life diminish as a direct result of the radical leftwing policies enacted by the Democrats during the last three decades... ...and a Senate seat that is pivotal to retaking the U.S. Senate and therefore pivotal to America's future. I won't sugarcoat it. This is the single most difficult race in America. I can't do it without you. **[That's why I am counting on you to rush in your GARVEY FOR SENATE campaign R.S.V.P. of $35 today.](https://links.greatamericatoday.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=75f8aba98f1c4859a1573a530ad94990&_e=Ru793ZsrSORlqimXtsLlbI6UKeIuN_Gmw55vkRL3B1-oqmIjBkt9kmFbQQrJ1B7Lz6e9vk453HlFa9nujNKing6vTYq_ufP-4mKEijiuje4pjhmf0PN8kUO5dNWBQBhSQJasjTkJoz-JjPzT7s4CYlj2GmM86Xc0Zod3NFHD-JOs8tLLb8KDEGbJ-oco08Xa6ffzzhTNRB_8TtQ42z00KRCy4xSGxg7VIW75tg4OQeu3xdH8FyzUaHwApoGgEATyP8Ss2kYT5403Fj1Fjm4g8VCTIll1VfqyFiuLgkjLIO68Ts5MzrYmQXSibJyhDHDy-L1UXoKLYdfkV84sCFo8s2WspJxthIN_UV2BeczW8Vya8yxoWqZjumTHl6n9mrQEoyGhCWVSFWeissLN8TrpPg%3D%3D)** Here's the thing. As it now stands, 100% of Californians are being forced to live with:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
That's what led me to enter this race. **[And that's why I'm urging you to join me by rushing me your GARVEY FOR SENATE Campaign R.S.V.P. without delay.](https://links.greatamericatoday.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=75f8aba98f1c4859a1573a530ad94990&_e=Ru793ZsrSORlqimXtsLlbI6UKeIuN_Gmw55vkRL3B1-oqmIjBkt9kmFbQQrJ1B7Lz6e9vk453HlFa9nujNKing6vTYq_ufP-4mKEijiuje4pjhmf0PN8kUO5dNWBQBhSQJasjTkJoz-JjPzT7s4CYlj2GmM86Xc0Zod3NFHD-JOs8tLLb8KDEGbJ-oco08Xa6ffzzhTNRB_8TtQ42z00KRCy4xSGxg7VIW75tg4OQetPi5UUHW8YQkmIanxtXUpGWeZviW6TdKDWOR1d80sDu25uO1gaKvS0-a5Yl6XNnTZfzjjQHwpOYXbj2KBPtX6FA1RDsQHqk9am_j7ULHwRB97T3bU4o3IP6ft38PkI7eNpKl6AVVms5FKJrnfoLGcB-TWZOvAcddek6gU1988L_A%3D%3D)** I get up every day and ask God to give me the strength to make a difference in people's lives. This really gets to heart of why I'm running... You see, the same dream and the same opportunity I was given is fading. It's fading all across America. But it's fading at an even faster pace right here in California. I pray you'll stand with me today.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate
---
|
---
| | P.S. If you agree we cannot afford to find out whether the American Dream is down to its _final inning_ , its _final out,_ or its _final strike_ and are ready to turn back the clock on the decline please rush your R.S.V.P. of $35 today.
---
[**DONATE $35**](https://links.greatamericatoday.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=75f8aba98f1c4859a1573a530ad94990&_e=Ru793ZsrSORlqimXtsLlbI6UKeIuN_Gmw55vkRL3B1-oqmIjBkt9kmFbQQrJ1B7Lz6e9vk453HlFa9nujNKing6vTYq_ufP-4mKEijiuje4pjhmf0PN8kUO5dNWBQBhSQJasjTkJoz-JjPzT7s4CYlj2GmM86Xc0Zod3NFHD-JOs8tLLb8KDEGbJ-oco08Xa6ffzzhTNRB_8TtQ42z00KRCy4xSGxg7VIW75tg4OQesvclZHgR4bnrsVrdxTws5kpJN9y4vc5h6I3XXGaT_bce6i7NAGnQIQRe4PO4NRKe3tfaZUyz6eLS6zgIYGTRxc2eJr7_kYC2rfDycB5G6grCBxMUSXadL_KwV39gC-Obju7yvt3KkiLVNTgxOehHomc54WG1WAK_qFDuEE8pA4iQ%3D%3D)
---
| | |
---
|
---
**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.
---
[**More About Me**](https://links.greatamericatoday.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=75f8aba98f1c4859a1573a530ad94990&_e=Ru793ZsrSORlqimXtsLlbMJHI2yETAD6Ewog3_TObhrj8S5HnWTxFB4FjWpVZJtEEsGWfdI-CsbC-B_JPKM6wFqYlEc12yDqjK7fA0sa3M8BJ0FTlZZfDg9Wk7Zk4ezw5R-2tg8JmTXTvmBJAJrE0mYTNQjGmgbtear4IbLX50BZqfYhtzz3U3PSf8SHGzngeCV7ZigZnsnrI7QCfuUS05GjKBsKRAg9ox5_RJEGl0XCARCcwXKPCnQ4rbkI4scF)

name: Bob Casey
subject: Asking for $5
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
I have a simple question.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1934%2E552475%2EVhKA78)
$5, Peter.
That’s what I’m asking you to contribute to my re-election campaign to defend Pennsylvania’s critical seat and stop the GOP from taking the Senate.
$5 might not seem like much, but when everyone chips in, we can build a winning campaign in a critical Senate battleground.
$5 today is what we need to go up against our mega-millionaire Republican opponent and a dark money GOP PAC supporting him that has already amassed a record-breaking amount — over $18 million — to spend against us.
[**We need a lot of supporters chipping in to fight back. Please, Peter, will you donate $5 right now? I need your help to build the strongest possible defense to keep Pennsylvania blue.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240208-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240208-2&refcode2=1934_552475_VhKA78&akid=1934%2E552475%2EVhKA78)
Pennsylvania is going to be key in Democrats’ fight to defend our razor-thin Senate majority and the White House in 2024. We need all the support we can get to make that happen.
November will be here before we know it. The $5 donations that we raise now will determine what happens to Pennsylvania — and our Nation — then.
[**Will you give $5 now? We will put your donation to work right away in our fight to keep our Commonwealth blue.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240208-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240208-2&refcode2=1934_552475_VhKA78&akid=1934%2E552475%2EVhKA78)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240208-2?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240208-2-el&refcode2=1934_552475_VhKA78&akid=1934%2E552475%2EVhKA78) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240208-2?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240208-2-el&refcode2=1934_552475_VhKA78&akid=1934%2E552475%2EVhKA78) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240208-2?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240208-2-el&refcode2=1934_552475_VhKA78&akid=1934%2E552475%2EVhKA78) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240208-2?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240208-2-el&refcode2=1934_552475_VhKA78&akid=1934%2E552475%2EVhKA78) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240208-2?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240208-2-el&refcode2=1934_552475_VhKA78&akid=1934%2E552475%2EVhKA78) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240208-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240208-2&refcode2=1934_552475_VhKA78&akid=1934%2E552475%2EVhKA78)

I'm proud to have you by my side in this fight.
With gratitude,
Bob
Bob Casey is running for Senate to cut through the gridlock, stand up to powerful corporate special interests, and fight for hardworking Pennsylvanians. clean_body: I have a simple question. $5, Peter. That’s what I’m asking you to contribute to my re-election campaign to defend Pennsylvania’s critical seat and stop the GOP from taking the Senate. $5 might not seem like much, but when everyone chips in, we can build a winning campaign in a critical Senate battleground. $5 today is what we need to go up against our mega-millionaire Republican opponent and a dark money GOP PAC supporting him that has already amassed a record-breaking amount — over $18 million — to spend against us. Pennsylvania is going to be key in Democrats’ fight to defend our razor-thin Senate majority and the White House in 2024. We need all the support we can get to make that happen. November will be here before we know it. The $5 donations that we raise now will determine what happens to Pennsylvania — and our Nation — then. Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue. I'm proud to have you by my side in this fight. With gratitude, Bob Bob Casey is running for Senate to cut through the gridlock, stand up to powerful corporate special interests, and fight for hardworking Pennsylvanians.

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: Clarence Thomas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
Friends,
Today, the Supreme Court of the United States heard oral arguments for a case on whether Trump is eligible to appear on the Colorado ballot after attempting to overturn the 2020 election.
This case could very well shift the course of the 2024 election. But who is listening to this case?
Clarence Thomas.
Yep. The same Supreme Court Justice whose wife was directly involved in the plot to overturn the 2020 election has refused to recuse himself from this case. And he will be one of the Justices who determine whether Trump’s insurrection — that his own wife Ginny Thomas supported and participated in — will bar him from being on the ballot.
But that's not all, Clarence Thomas has taken money from billionaires — the same billionaires who have supported Trump.
His wife’s consulting firm also stands to gain if Trump is re-elected.
**This is a clear ethics violation and a disgrace to the legitimacy of the highest court of law in the country. Clarence Thomas should not be able to participate in this case due to multiple conflicts of interest.**
[**If you agree, add your name to demand Clarence Thomas to recuse himself from this case.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/em240208_clarence_thomas_ballot_case/?source=em240208-1-tt&refcode2=5195.196590.EwZ7v6&t=1&akid=5195%2E196590%2EEwZ7v6)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/em240208_clarence_thomas_ballot_case/?source=em240208-1-tt&refcode2=5195.196590.EwZ7v6&t=2&akid=5195%2E196590%2EEwZ7v6)
Thank you for standing up for our democracy,
Mandela

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=5195%2E196590%2EEwZ7v6). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=4&akid=5195%2E196590%2EEwZ7v6)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=5195_196590_EwZ7v6&akid=5195%2E196590%2EEwZ7v6)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=6&akid=5195%2E196590%2EEwZ7v6)

Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
